notes: BRKF: Brokerage fee paid to a broker for services provided., COMM: Commission (fee) paid for services provided. Based on ISO20022 External code set 'ExternalChargeType1Code'.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Clearing System Instruction Reference Id
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Clearing System Instruction Reference Id
description: Unique reference identification, as assigned by a clearing system, to unambiguously identify the instruction related to the accounting entry in the current account system.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Account BBAN
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Account BBAN
description: The BBAN of the account of the counterparty, related to the accounting entry in the current account system.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Account Currency Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Account Currency Code
description: The 3-letter code according to the ISO 4217 standard of the currency in which the account is held of the counterparty of the accounting entry in the current account system.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Account IBAN
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Account IBAN
description: The IBAN of the account of the counterparty, related to the accounting entry in the current account system.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Address Line1
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Address Line1
description: The first line of text of the address of the counterparty related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: First line filled with address data, mostly streetname and house number. Only filled when explicitly mentioned in the payment transaction.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Address Line2
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Address Line2
description: The second line of text of the address of the counterparty related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Second line filled with address data, mostly zipcode and place of residence. Only filled when explicitly mentioned in the payment transaction.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Agent Address Line1
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Agent Address Line1
description: The first line of text of the address of the counterparty agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: First line filled with address data, mostly streetname and house number. Only filled when explicitly mentioned in the payment transaction.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Agent Address Line2
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Agent Address Line2
description: The second line of text of the address of the counterparty agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Second line filled with address data, mostly zipcode and place of residence. Only filled when explicitly mentioned in the payment transaction.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Agent BIC
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Agent BIC
description: BIC code of the counterparty agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: BIC Code is allocated to financial institutions by the ISO 9362 Registration Authority under an international identification scheme. Counterparty Agent is equal to the Creditor Agent (Financial institution servicing an account for the creditor) in case of a debit booking and equal to the Debtor Agent (Financial institution servicing an account for the debtor) in case of a credit booking.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Agent Clearing System Identification Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Agent Clearing System Identification Code
description: Code identifying the clearing system of the counterparty agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: The value should be as defined by ISO20022 codeset 'ExternalClearingSystemIdentification1Code'.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Agent Clearing System Member Id
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Agent Clearing System Member Id
description: Member Identification of the clearing system for the counterparty agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Agent Country Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Agent Country Code
description: ISO 2-character code of the country of the address of the counterparty agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Agent Name
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Agent Name
description: Name of the counterparty agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Counterparty Agent is equal to the Creditor Agent (Financial institution servicing an account for the creditor) in case of a debit booking and equal to the Debtor Agent (Financial institution servicing an account for the debtor) in case of a credit booking.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Birth Date
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Birth Date
description: Date of birth of the counterparty related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: When counterparty is a person, private fields are present, counterparty organization fields are excluded.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty City Of Birth Name
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty City Of Birth Name
description: Name of the city of birth of the counterparty related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: When counterparty private fields are present, counterparty organization fields are excluded.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Country Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Country Code
description: ISO 2-character code of the country of the address of the counterparty related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: This is the country code as delivered by the initiating party. In case the field is empty AND the payment is a SEPA payment,  fills the field with the country code from the IBAN. In any other case the field is left empty.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Country Of Birth Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Country Of Birth Code
description: Code of the country of birth of the counterparty related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: This is a non iso country code. When counterparty private fields are present, counterparty organization fields are excluded.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Id
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Id
description: Unique identification of the counterparty related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: This other identification is assigned by an institution using an identification scheme.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Identification Scheme Name Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Identification Scheme Name Code
description: Name of the identification scheme in a coded form used for identifiying the counterpary related to the accouting entry in the current account system.
notes: When identification scheme name code is present, proprietary identification scheme name cannot be present. Based on ISO20022 External code set 'ExternalPersonIdentification1Code'. e.g. CCPT: PassportNumber.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Internal Suspence Account Id
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Internal Suspence Account Id
description: Unambiguous identification of an internal suspense account used for the counter booking related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: This is applicable for cards transactions.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Name
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Name
description: Name of the counterparty to be reported to the customer related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Always equal to either 'Counterparty Name According to Originator 'or 'Counterparty Name According to Bank'.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Organisation BEI Or BIC
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Organisation BEI Or BIC
description: BIC or BEI code allocated to the counterparty organisation related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: BIC or BEI code is allocated to organisations by the ISO 9362 registration authority under an international identification scheme. When counterparty organization fields are present, counterparty private fields are excluded. Counterparty is equal to the creditor in case of a debit booking and equal to the debtor in case of a credit booking.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Organisation Id
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Organisation Id
description: Unique identification of a counterparty organisation related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: This other identification is assigned by an institution using an identification scheme. When identification is present, scheme name code or scheme name propriatary also needs to be present.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Organisation Identification Scheme Name Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Organisation Identification Scheme Name Code
description: Name of the identification scheme in a coded form allocated to the counterparty organisation related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: BANK: BankPartyIdentification When Initiating party organization fields are present, initiating party private fields are excluded. When identification scheme name code is present, proprietary identification scheme name cannot be present. Based on ISO20022 'external list Code ExternalOrganisationIdentification1Code'.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Organisation Proprietary Identification Scheme Name
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Organisation Proprietary Identification Scheme Name
description: Name of the identification scheme in a proprietary form allocated to the counterparty organisation related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Proprietary form means free text form. When propriatary identification scheme name is present, identification scheme name code cannot be present.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Proprietary Identification Scheme Name
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Counterparty Proprietary Identification Scheme Name
description: Name of the identification scheme in proprietary form used for identifiying the counterpary related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: When propriatary identification scheme name is present, identification scheme name code cannot be present.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Event Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Event Code
description: A code that indicates the event that originated the accounting entry in the current account system.
domain_values:
0001' till '9999' See also
External code sets | ISO20022
notes: Used to differentiate the current account utilisation bookings.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Facility Available Amount Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Facility Available Amount Code
description: Code which indicates the amount available of all the facilities related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Only filled in case account is part of facility structure. DBIT: facility breach, negative amount available, CRDT: no facility breach at any level, positive amount available, NULL: only for single accounts and only if the amount available was calculated all the way to the top facility.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry GMT Datetime
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry GMT Datetime
description: Datetime in GMT when the accounting entry is processed in the current account system.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party Address Line1
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party Address Line1
description: The first line of text of the address of the initiating party related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: First line filled with address data, mostly streetname and house number. Only filled when explicitly mentioned in the payment transaction.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating party Address Line2
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating party Address Line2
description: The second line of text of the address of the initiating party related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Second line filled with address data, mostly zipcode and place of residence. Only filled when explicitly mentioned in the payment transaction.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party Birth Date
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party Birth Date
description: Data of birth of the initiating party related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: When Initiating party private fields are present, initiating party organization fields are excluded.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party City Of Birth Name
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party City Of Birth Name
description: Name of the city of birth of the initiating party related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: When Initiating party private fields are present, initiating party organization fields are excluded.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party Country Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party Country Code
description: ISO 2-character code of the country of the address of the initiating related to the accounting entry in the current account system.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party Country Of Birth Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party Country Of Birth Code
description: Code of the country of birth of the initiating party related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: This is a non iso country code. When Initiating party private fields are present, initiating party organization fields are excluded.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party Id
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party Id
description: Unique identification of the Initiating party related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: This identification is assigned by an institution using an identification scheme.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party Name
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party Name
description: Name of the initiating party related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Initiating party is the party that initiated the payment that is reported in the entry.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party Organisation Id
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party Organisation Id
description: Unique identification allocated to the organisation of the initiating party related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: When Initiating party organization fields are present, initiating party private fields are excluded.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party Organisation Identification BEI Or BIC
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party Organisation Identification BEI Or BIC
description: BIC or BEI code allocated to the organisation of the initiating party related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: When Initiating party organization fields are present, initiating party private fields are excluded. Initiating party is the party that initiated the payment that is reported in the entry.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party Organisation Identification Scheme Name Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party Organisation Identification Scheme Name Code
description: Name of the identification scheme in a coded form allocated to the organisation of the initiating partyrelated to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: BANK: BankPartyIdentification When Initiating party organization fields are present, initiating party private fields are excluded. When identification scheme name code is present, proprietary identification scheme name cannot be present. Based on ISO20022 'external list Code ExternalOrganisationIdentification1Code'.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party Organisation Proprietary Identification Scheme Name
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party Organisation Proprietary Identification Scheme Name
description: Name of the identification scheme in a proprietary form allocated to the organisation of the initiating party related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: When propriatary identification scheme name is present, identification scheme name code cannot be present.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party Proprietary Identification Scheme Name
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party Proprietary Identification Scheme Name
description: Name of the identification scheme in proprietary form used for identifiying the initiating party related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: When propriatary identification scheme name is present, identification scheme name code cannot be present.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party Scheme Name Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Initiating Party Scheme Name Code
description: Name of the identification scheme in a coded form used for identifiying the initiating party related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: When identification scheme name code is present, proprietary identification scheme name cannot be present. Based on ISO20022 External code set 'ExternalPersonIdentification1Code'. e.g. CCPT: PassportNumber.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Instructed Amount Currency Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Instructed Amount Currency Code
description: The 3-letter code according to the ISO 4217 standard of the currency of the instructed amount related to accounting entry in the current account system.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Instructed Currency Amount
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Instructed Currency Amount
description: The instructed amount related to the accounting entry in the current account system, expressed in the currency as instructed.
notes: This is the amount of money to be moved between the debtor and creditor, before deduction of charges. Also called original ordered amount. Only filled when the ordered amount is different than the booking amount, or when it was in a different currency.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Instructed Currency Amount Text
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Instructed Currency Amount Text
description: The instructed amount related to the accounting entry in the current account system, expressed in the currency as instructed, formatted as text with decimal indicator.
notes: This is the amount of money to be moved between the debtor and creditor, before deduction of charges. Also called the original ordered amount. Only filled when the ordered amount is different than the booking amount, or when it was in a different currency.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Instruction Id
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Instruction Id
description: Unique identification to unambiguously identify the instruction related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Assigned by an instructing party for another instructed party. The instruction identification is a point to point reference that can be used between the instructing party and other instructed party to refer to the individual instruction. It can be included in several messages related to the instruction.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Instruction Transaction Priority Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Instruction Transaction Priority Code
description: Code that indicates the priority of the transaction related to the accounting entry in the current account system as provided in the initial payment instruction.
notes: See ISO20022 codeset Priority2Code.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Interbank Settlement Date
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Interbank Settlement Date
description: Date on which the interbank settlement related to the accounting entry in the current account system takes place.
notes: Date on which the amount of money ceases to be available to the agent that owes the money and becomes available to the agent that receives the money.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent1 Address Line1
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent1 Address Line1
description: The first line of text of the address of the first intermediary agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: First line filled with address data, mostly streetname and house number. Only filled when explicitly mentioned in the payment transaction.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent1 Address Line2
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent1 Address Line2
description: The second line of text of the address of the first intermediary agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Second line filled with address data, mostly zipcode and place of residence. Only filled when explicitly mentioned in the payment transaction.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent1 BIC
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent1 BIC
description: BIC of the first intermediary agent between the debtor's agent and the creditor's agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: If more than one intermediary agent is present, then intermediary agent1 identifies the agent between the debtor agent and the intermediary agent2.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent1 Clearing System Identification Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent1 Clearing System Identification Code
description: Code identifying the clearing system of the first intermediary agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: The value should be as defined by ISO20022 codeset 'ExternalClearingSystemIdentification1Code'.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent1 Clearing System Member Id
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent1 Clearing System Member Id
description: Member Identification of a clearing system for the first intermediary agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: If more than one intermediary agent is present, then Intermediary Agent1 identifies the agent between the Debtor Agent and the Intermediary Agent2.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent1 Country Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent1 Country Code
description: ISO 2-character code of the country of the address of the first intermediary agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent1 Name
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent1 Name
description: Name of the first intermediary agent between the debtor's agent and the creditor's agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent2 Address Line1
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent2 Address Line1
description: The first line of text of the address of the second intermediary agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: First line filled with address data, mostly streetname and house number. Only filled when explicitly mentioned in the payment transaction.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent2 Address Line2
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent2 Address Line2
description: The second line of text of the address of the second intermediary agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Second line filled with address data, mostly zipcode and place of residence. Only filled when explicitly mentioned in the payment transaction.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent2 BIC
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent2 BIC
description: BIC of the second intermediary agent between the debtor's agent and the creditor's agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: If more than one intermediary agent is present, then intermediary agent2 identifies the agent between the intermediary agent1 and the intermediary agent3.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent2 Clearing System Identification Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent2 Clearing System Identification Code
description: Code identifying the clearing system of the second intermediary agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: The value should be as defined by ISO20022 codeset 'ExternalClearingSystemIdentification1Code'.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent2 Clearing System Member Id
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent2 Clearing System Member Id
description: Member Identification of a clearing system for the second intermediary agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: If more than two intermediary agents are present, then Intermediary Agent2 identifies the agent between the Intermediary Agent1 and the Intermediary Agent3.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent2 Country Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent2 Country Code
description: ISO 2-character code of the country of the address of the second intermediary agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent2 Name
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent2 Name
description: Name of the second intermediary agent between the debtor's agent and the creditor's agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent3 Address Line1
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent3 Address Line1
description: The first line of text of the address of the third intermediary agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: First line filled with address data, mostly streetname and house number. Only filled when explicitly mentioned in the payment transaction.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent3 Address Line2
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent3 Address Line2
description: The second line of text of the address of the third intermediary agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Second line filled with address data, mostly zipcode and place of residence. Only filled when explicitly mentioned in the payment transaction.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent3 BIC
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent3 BIC
description: BIC of the third intermediary agent between the debtor's agent and the creditor's agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: If more than one intermediary agent is present, then intermediary agent3 identifies the agent between the itermediary agent3 and the creditor agent.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent3 Clearing System Identification Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent3 Clearing System Identification Code
description: Code identifying the clearing system of the third intermediary agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: The value should be as defined by ISO20022 codeset 'ExternalClearingSystemIdentification1Code'.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent3 Clearing System Member Id
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent3 Clearing System Member Id
description: Member Identification of a clearing system for the third intermediary agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: If Intermediary Agent3 is present, then it identifies the agent between the Intermediary Agent 2 and the Creditor Agent.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent3 Country Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent3 Country Code
description: ISO 2-character code of the country of the address of the third intermediary agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent3 Name
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Intermediary Agent3 Name
description: Name of the third intermediary agent between the debtor's agent and the creditor's agent related to the accounting entry in the current account system.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Mandate Id
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Mandate Id
description: Unique identification to unambiguously identify the mandate related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Is assigned by the creditor and is applicable only for direct debit.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Mandate Signature Date
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Mandate Signature Date
description: Date on which the direct debit mandate has been signed by the debtor related to the accounting entry in the current account system.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Message Payment Information Id
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Message Payment Information Id
description: Unique identification to identify the payment information within the message, related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: It is the customer reference on a batch level, assigned by the sending party. In case of a batch booking, this is the assigned batch-id by the customer. In case of an booking for a single transaction, this is the assigned batch id of the original batch, in which the initiated payment was included by the customer. In case of an booking for a single R-transaction, this is the assigned batch id of the batch, in which the original payment corresponding to the R-transaction was included by the customer.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Messsage Id
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Messsage Id
description: Unique identification asssigned by the instructing party for the underlying message related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: The underlying message is the customer reference on file level.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Original Transaction Id
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Original Transaction Id
description: Unique identification to identify the original transaction related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Assigned by the original first instructing agent. This is the transaction identification of the original transaction.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry POI Card Transaction Datetime
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry POI Card Transaction Datetime
description: Local date and time of the card transaction assigned by the POI related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: This is assigned by the POI = Point Of Interaction.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry POI Card Transaction UTC Datetime
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry POI Card Transaction UTC Datetime
description: Date and time in UTC of the card transaction assigned by the POI related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: This is assigned by the POI = Point Of Interaction.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Proprietary Amount Currency Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Proprietary Amount Currency Code
description: The 3-letter code according to the ISO 4217 standard of the currency of the proprietary amount related to the accounting entry in the current account system.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Proprietary Amount Exchange Rate
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Proprietary Amount Exchange Rate
description: The exchange rate used to calculate the proprietary amount related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Factor used to convert the instructed amount (source amount) to the proprietary amount (target amount).

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Proprietary Amount Exchange Rate Text
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Proprietary Amount Exchange Rate Text
description: The exchange rate used to calculate the proprietary amount related to the accounting entry in the current account system, formatted as text.
notes: Factor used to convert the instructed amount (source amount) to the proprietary amount (target amount). Exchange Rate formatted conform ISO20022. The exchange rate contains a maximum of 11 numbers and a decimal point. Of those 11 numbers, maximum 10 decimals can appear after the decimal point. Trailing zeroes are suppressed. If an exchange rate does not have any decimals, the decimal point will not be shown. The exchange rate value is stored adjusted to the left.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Proprietary Amount Exchange Source Amount Currency Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Proprietary Amount Exchange Source Amount Currency Code
description: The 3-letter code according to the ISO 4217 standard of the currency of the source amount which is exchanged to proprietary amount related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Proprietary amount exchange source currency code will only be filled in case the related rate is available.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Proprietary Amount Exchange Target Currency Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Proprietary Amount Exchange Target Currency Code
description: The 3-letter code according to the ISO 4217 standard of the currency of the proprietary amount i.e. target amount which is exchanged from the source amount related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Proprietary Amount Exchange Target Currency will only be filled in case the related Rate is available.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Proprietary Amount Exchange Unit Currency Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Proprietary Amount Exchange Unit Currency Code
description: The 3-letter code according to the ISO 4217 standard of the unit currency of the exchange rate used for converting the proprietary amount related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Proprietary Amount Exchange Unit Currency will only be filled in case the related Rate is available. For example: exchange Rate: 1 EUR = 1,23456 USD. Unit Currency = EUR

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Proprietary Amount Type Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Proprietary Amount Type Code
description: The code of the type of the proprietary amount related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Only amount type 'ISB' (= Interbank Settlement Amount) is supported. Source is Payment Engine e.g. GPP, PEX and UPF.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Proprietary Currency Amount
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Proprietary Currency Amount
description: The proprietary amount, expressed in the currency of the account related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: This is the amount of the transaction including the charges, the amount of money that is settled interbank for the underlying transaction.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Proprietary Currency Amount Text
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Proprietary Currency Amount Text
description: The proprietary amount, expressed in the currency of the account related to the accounting entry in the current account system, formatted as text with decimal indicator.
notes: This is the amount of the transaction including the charges, the amount of money that is settled interbank for the underlying transaction.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Proprietary Purpose Text
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Proprietary Purpose Text
description: Text that specifies the high level purpose in a proprietary form, of the transaction related to accounting entry in the current account system.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Purpose Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Purpose Code
description: Code that specifies the high level purpose of the transaction related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: IPPS: InstantPaymentsAtPOS. See ISO20022 ExternalCodeList, tab 11-Purpose, for the complete list.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Record Last Change UTC Datetime
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Record Last Change UTC Datetime
description: Date and time expressed in UTC when a record related to an accounting entry in the current account system was last changed.
notes: This is a technical field. A record can be changed when for example a detailed transaction type is updated.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Reference Clearing System Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Reference Clearing System Code
description: Code which identifies from which clearing system the reference is received related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: ABE: EBA Euro1 Step1,EBA: EBA Euro1,ERP: EBA Step1,INC: DE and NL Equens,TGT: Target,XCT: EBA Step2

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Reject Reason Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Reject Reason Code
description: Code that specifies the reason for the rejection of the transaction related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Code that specifies the reason for the R-transaction, correction booking or reversal booking as published in an external reason code list resp. as defined by the ISO20022 Codeset 'CancellationReason5Code'.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Related Specification Reference Text
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Related Specification Reference Text
description: Text of the specification reference outside the payment factory related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: E.g. link to a card transaction overview or an interest specification (RPK nota).

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Related Specification Type Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Related Specification Type Code
description: Code of the type of the related specification reference of the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Not yet in use.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Replaced Reservation Id
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Replaced Reservation Id
description: Unique identification of the reservation replaced by the booking related to the accounting entry in the current account system.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry R Transaction Reason Type Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry R Transaction Reason Type Code
description: Code that indicates the reason type of the R-transactions related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: RJCTSC: Reject SEPA Credit transfer, CNCLSC: Request for Cancellation SEPA Credit transfer, RTRNSC: Return SEPA Credit transfer. The reason can be a result of a processed R transaction, a reversal or a correction.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Scheme Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Scheme Code
description: A code that indicates the scheme related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
domain_values:
NS02','NS01','II01','IR01','TR01' etc See also
External code sets | ISO20022
notes: For example whether a transaction from a Payment Engine is 'on us' or 'not on us'. This is filled by a code that the Payment Engines sends in their transaction request to CNA. These codes are dynamic and get changed often.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Scheme Creditor Id
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Scheme Creditor Id
description: Unique identifier for a legal entity assuming the role of the creditor in a direct debit scheme related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Credit party that signs the mandate.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Sequence Type Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Sequence Type Code
description: Code which identifies the direct debit sequence type related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Values: FRST=First, RCUR=Recurrent, FNAL=final or OOFF=one-off. Defined by ISO20022 codeset 'SequenceType1Code'.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Structured Remittance Information Creditor Reference Entity Text
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Structured Remittance Information Creditor Reference Entity Text
description: Text about the entity that assigns the creditor reference in the structured remittance information related to accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: The entity that assigns the creditor reference is also called the issuer. This is a free text field containing the issuer information and can be something like the bank code or bank name.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Structured Remittance Information Creditor Reference Type Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Structured Remittance Information Creditor Reference Type Code
description: Code that provides the type of creditor reference in the structured remittance information related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: SCOR: Document is a structured communication reference provided by the creditor to identify the referred transaction. Value in accordance with ISO20022 codeset 'DocumentType3Code'.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Structured Remittance Information Reference Id
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Structured Remittance Information Reference Id
description: Unique reference id in the structured remittance information, as assigned by the creditor, to unambiguously refer to the payment transaction related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: If available, the initiating party should provide this reference in the structured remittance information, to enable reconciliation by the creditor upon receipt of the amount of money.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Swift Transaction Type Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Swift Transaction Type Code
description: Code to indicate the SWIFT transaction type of the financial transaction related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Only for international transactions. This is used in customer account statements or bank statements. NMSC = Miscellaneous,NTRF = Transfer,NDDT = Direct Debit,NSTO = Stonding Order,NRTI = Returned Item

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Transaction Category Purpose Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Transaction Category Purpose Code
description: Code that specifies the high level purpose of the transaction related to the accounting entry in the current account system, based on a set of predefined categories.
notes: See ISO20022 ExternalCodeList, tab 4-CategoryPurpose, for the complete list. Either the Category Purpose Code is provided or the Category Purpose Proprietary, not both. e.g. SALA - Salary payment,DCRD- Debit Card Payment

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Transaction Control UTC Datetime
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Transaction Control UTC Datetime
description: The control date and time in UTC of a transaction related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: This timestamp is used to guarantee timeliness, correctness and completeness of the processed transaction.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Transaction Delivery System Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Transaction Delivery System Code
description: Code to indicate the delivery system from which the transaction related to the accounting entry is delivered to the current account system.
notes: GP6: cross border,FT5: FTM,CTE: SEPA ,PE2: instant payments.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Transaction Id
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Transaction Id
description: Unique identification to unambiguously identify the transaction related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Assigned by the first instructing agent. This identification is passed on, unchanged, throughout the entire interbank chain. For transactions that are initiated through bank channels, this identification is assigned to the transaction by bank. For transactions that are received from third party banks, this identification is assigned by a third party bank. The transaction identification can be used for reconciliation, tracking or to link tasks relating to the transaction on the interbank level.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Transaction Local Instrument Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Transaction Local Instrument Code
description: Code that indicates the local instrument of the transaction related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Based on ISO20022 'ExternalLocalInstrument1Code'. Either the local instrument code is provided for a transaction or the local instrument proprietary, not both. e.g. ACCEPT - Acceptgiro payment, CORE - Business to Customer SEPA Direct Debit, B2B - Business to Business SEPA Direct Debit, IDEAL - iDeal payment

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Transaction Proprietary Category Purpose Text
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Transaction Proprietary Category Purpose Text
description: Text that specifies the high level purpose of the transaction related to accounting entry in the current account system, with a proprietary code.
notes: Either the category purpose code is provided or the proprietary category purpose (non ISO20022 code), not both.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Transaction Proprietary Local Instrument Text
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Transaction Proprietary Local Instrument Text
description: Text that indicates the local instrument of the transaction related to the accounting entry in the current account system, with a proprietary code.
notes: Either the local instrument code is provided for a transaction or the proprietary local instrument (non ISO20022 code), not both.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Creditor City Of Birth Name
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Creditor City Of Birth Name
description: Name of the city of birth of the ultimate creditor related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: When ultimate creditor private fields are present, ultimate creditor organization fields are excluded.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Creditor Country Of Birth Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Creditor Country Of Birth Code
description: Code of the country of birth of the ultimate creditor related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: This is a non iso country code. When ultimate creditor private fields are present, ultimate creditor organization fields are excluded.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Creditor Id
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Creditor Id
description: Unique identification of the ultimate creditor related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: When ultimate creditor private fields are present, ultimate creditor organization fields are excluded.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Creditor Identification Birth Date
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Creditor Identification Birth Date
description: Data of birth of the ultimate creditor related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: When ultimate creditor private fields are present, ultimate creditor organization fields are excluded.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Creditor Name
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Creditor Name
description: Name of the ultimate creditor related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Ultimate creditor is the ultimate party to which an amount of money is due.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Creditor Organisation Id
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Creditor Organisation Id
description: Unique identification allocated to the organisation of the ultimate creditor related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: When ultimate creditor organization fields are present, ultimate creditor private fields are excluded.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Creditor Organisation Identification BEI or BIC
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Creditor Organisation Identification BEI or BIC
description: BIC or BEI code allocated to the organisation of the ultimate creditor related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Ultimate creditor is the ultimate party to which an amount of money is due. When ultimate creditor organization fields are present, ultimate creditor private fields are excluded.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Creditor Organisation Identification Scheme Name Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Creditor Organisation Identification Scheme Name Code
description: Name of the identification scheme in a coded form used for identifiying the ultimate creditor organisation related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: BANK: BankPartyIdentification When Initiating party organization fields are present, initiating party private fields are excluded. When identification scheme name code is present, proprietary identification scheme name cannot be present. Based on ISO20022 'external list Code ExternalOrganisationIdentification1Code'.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Creditor Organisation Proprietary Identification Scheme Name
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Creditor Organisation Proprietary Identification Scheme Name
description: Name of the identification scheme in proprietary form used for identifiying the ultimate creditor organization related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: When propriatary identification scheme name is present, identification scheme name code cannot be present.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Creditor Proprietary Identification Scheme Name
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Creditor Proprietary Identification Scheme Name
description: Name of the identification scheme in proprietary form used for identifiying the ultimate creditorr related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: When propriatary identification scheme name is present, identification scheme name code cannot be present.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Creditor Scheme Name Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Creditor Scheme Name Code
description: Name of the identification scheme in a coded form used for identifiying the ultimate creditor related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: When identification scheme name code is present, proprietary identification scheme name cannot be present. Based on ISO20022 External code set 'ExternalPersonIdentification1Code'. e.g. CCPT: PassportNumber.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Debtor Birth Date
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Debtor Birth Date
description: Date of birth of the ultimate debtor related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: When ultimate debtor private fields are present, ultimate debtor organization fields are excluded.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Debtor City Of Birth Name
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Debtor City Of Birth Name
description: Name of the city of birth of the ultimate debtor related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: When ultimate debtor private fields are present, ultimate debtor organization fields are excluded.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Debtor Country Of Birth Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Debtor Country Of Birth Code
description: Code of the country of birth of the ultimate debtor related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: This is a non iso country code. When ultimate debtor private fields are present, ultimate debtor organization fields are excluded.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Debtor Id
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Debtor Id
description: Unique identification of the ultimate debtor related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: When ultimate debtor private fields are present, ultimate debtor organization fields are excluded.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Debtor Identification Scheme Name Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Debtor Identification Scheme Name Code
description: Name of the identification scheme in a coded form used for identifiying the ultimate debtor related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: When identification scheme name code is present, proprietary identification scheme name cannot be present. Based on ISO20022 External code set 'ExternalPersonIdentification1Code'. e.g. CCPT: PassportNumber.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Debtor Name
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Debtor Name
description: Name of the ultimate debtor related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Ultimate party that owes an amount of money to the (ultimate) creditor.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Debtor Organisation Id
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Debtor Organisation Id
description: Unique identification allocated to the organisation of the ultimate debtor related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: When ultimate debtor organization fields are present, ultimate debtor private fields are excluded.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Debtor Organisation Identification BEI Or BIC
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Debtor Organisation Identification BEI Or BIC
description: BIC or BEI code allocated to the organisation of the ultimate debtor related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: Ultimate debtor is the ultimate party that owes an amount of money to the (ultimate) creditor. When ultimate debtor organization fields are present, ultimate debtor private fields are excluded.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Debtor Organisation Identification Scheme Name Code
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Debtor Organisation Identification Scheme Name Code
description: Name of the identification scheme in a coded form used for identifiying the ultimate debtor organisation related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: BANK: BankPartyIdentification When Initiating party organization fields are present, initiating party private fields are excluded. When identification scheme name code is present, proprietary identification scheme name cannot be present. Based on ISO20022 'external list Code ExternalOrganisationIdentification1Code'.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Debtor Organisation Proprietary Identification Scheme Name
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Debtor Organisation Proprietary Identification Scheme Name
description: Name of the identification scheme in proprietary form used for identifiying the ultimate debtor organization related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: When propriatary identification scheme name is present, identification scheme name code cannot be present.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Debtor Proprietary Identification Scheme Name
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry Ultimate Debtor Proprietary Identification Scheme Name
description: Name of the identification scheme in proprietary form used for identifiying the ultimate debtor related to the accounting entry in the current account system.
notes: When propriatary identification scheme name is present, identification scheme name code cannot be present.

term_name: Current Account Accounting Entry UTC Datetime
display_name: Current Account Accounting Entry UTC Datetime
description: Datetime in UTC when the accounting entry is processed in the current account system.

term_name: Current Account Allowed Overdraft Amount Currency Code
display_name: Current Account Allowed Overdraft Amount Currency Code
description: ISO standard 4217 (3 characters) code of the currency of the allowed overdraft amount of the current account.

term_name: Current Account Allowed Overdraft Currency Amount
display_name: Current Account Allowed Overdraft Currency Amount
description: Amount of the allowed overdraft of the current account expressed in a specific currency.

term_name: Current Account Balance Currency Code
display_name: Current Account Balance Currency Code
description: ISO standard 4217 (3 characters) code of the currency in which the balance of the current account is expressed.

term_name: Current Account Balance Debit Credit Code
display_name: Current Account Balance Debit Credit Code
description: Code to indicate whether the balance of the current account is debit or a credit balance from the point of view of the account holder.
notes: Possible values:,- CRDT = Credit, this means a positive balance for the account holder. ,- DBIT = Debit, this means a negative balance or balance equal zero for the account holder.

term_name: Current Account Balance Requested Datetime
display_name: Current Account Balance Requested Datetime
description: Date and time in CET when the balance of the current account is requested.

term_name: Current Account Balance Type Code
display_name: Current Account Balance Type Code
description: Code to indicate the balance type of the current account.
notes: The meaning of the balance is determined by the balance type: 1.ITBD indicates the book balance at requested moment of time. 2.XPCD indicates Interim Booked Balance minus temporary bookings. 3.LRLD indicates ITBD minus reservations (including temporary bookings) and Allowed Overdraft on the account and Restrictions. 4.ITAV indicates Value balance calculated at requested moment of time.

term_name: Current Account Currency Balance
display_name: Current Account Currency Balance
description: Balance of the current account expressed in a specific currency.

term_name: Current Account Currency Code
display_name: Current Account Currency Code
description: The ISO Standard 4217 code (3 characters) of the currency of the current account

term_name: Current Account Facility Flag
display_name: Current Account Facility Flag
description: Flag which indicates whether the current account is part of a facility or not.
notes: This flag is filled only for COF accounts.

term_name: Current Account Service Response Code
display_name: Current Account Service Response Code
description: Code to indicate the response of the service at the level of the current account.
notes: OK : For the specific account, all relevant balances are delivered. ,A002 : Account is unknown in CNA,B002 : For the specific account, at least one relevant balance is not delivered,B006 : Technical Error

term_name: Curtailment Start Month Number
display_name: Curtailment Start Month Number
description: The number of the month in which the curtailment is taking place for the first time or has taken place for a specific credit agreement.
notes: The month is displayed as a number (01, 02, 03 etc)

term_name: Debit Account Currency Code
display_name: Debit Account Currency Code
description: 3-letter currency code of debit account according to ISO standard 4217

term_name: Debit Interest Agreement Basic Payment Agreement Bank Code
display_name: Debit Interest Agreement Basic Payment Agreement Bank Code
description: The code of the bank administering the Basic Payment Agreement that is associated with the debit interest agreement.

term_name: Debit Interest Agreement Basic Payment Agreement General Ledger Financial Entity Code
display_name: Debit Interest Agreement Basic Payment Agreement General Ledger Financial Entity Code
description: The code of the financial entity of the basic payment agreement where the debit interest bookings are registered in the general ledger.

term_name: Debit Interest Agreement Basic Payment Agreement General Ledger Operating Unit Code
display_name: Debit Interest Agreement Basic Payment Agreement General Ledger Operating Unit Code
description: The code of the operating unit of the basic payment agreement where the debit interest bookings are registered in the general ledger.
domain_values: General Ledger Operating Unit Code (Finance is owner)

term_name: Debit Interest Agreement Basic Payment Agreement IBAN
display_name: Debit Interest Agreement Basic Payment Agreement IBAN
description: The IBAN of a Basic Payment Agreement associated with the debit interest agreement

term_name: Debit Interest Agreement Calculation Method Code
display_name: Debit Interest Agreement Calculation Method Code
description: The code indicating the calculation method of the debit interest agreement
notes: Within CROS the next codes are used: 1 = 30/360, 2 = juist/360, 3 = juist/juist, 4 = 30/juist, 5= 30/365, 6 = juist/365 The first value represent the number of days in the month, the second represents the number of days in the year. Default value: 3

term_name: Debit Interest Agreement Currency Code
display_name: Debit Interest Agreement Currency Code
description: The code of the currency of the debit interest agreement
notes: The ISO Standard 4217 (3 characters) code that identifies the currency.

term_name: Debit Interest Agreement Debit Interest Structure Bank Code
display_name: Debit Interest Agreement Debit Interest Structure Bank Code
description: The code of the bank that can use the debit interest structure for a debit interest agreement.

term_name: Debit Interest Agreement Debit Interest Structure Id
display_name: Debit Interest Agreement Debit Interest Structure Id
description: The Id of the Debit interest structure for a debit interest agreement

term_name: Debit Interest Agreement End Date
display_name: Debit Interest Agreement End Date
description: The end date of the debit interest agreement

term_name: Debit Interest Agreement RPK Cluster Bank Code
display_name: Debit Interest Agreement RPK Cluster Bank Code
description: The code of the bank administering the RPK Cluster that is associated with the debit interest agreement.

term_name: Debit Interest Agreement RPK Cluster General Ledger Financial Entity Code
display_name: Debit Interest Agreement RPK Cluster General Ledger Financial Entity Code
description: The code of the financial entity of the RPK Cluster where the debit interest bookings are registered in the general ledger.

term_name: Debit Interest Agreement RPK Cluster General Ledger Operating Unit Code
display_name: Debit Interest Agreement RPK Cluster General Ledger Operating Unit Code
description: The code of the operating unit of the RPK Cluster where the debit interest bookings are registered in the general ledger.
domain_values: General Ledger Operating Unit Code (Finance is owner)

term_name: Debit Interest Agreement RPK Cluster Number
display_name: Debit Interest Agreement RPK Cluster Number
description: The number of the RPK Cluster associated with the debit interest agreement

term_name: Debit Interest Agreement Start Date
display_name: Debit Interest Agreement Start Date
description: The start date of the debit interest agreement

term_name: Debit Interest Calculation Method Code
display_name: Debit Interest Calculation Method Code
description: Code indicating the debit interest calculation method.
notes: Within CROS the next codes are used: 1 = 30/360, 2 = juist/360, 3 = juist/juist, 4 = 30/juist, 5= 30/365, 6 = juist/365 The first value represent the number of days in the month, the second represents the number of days in the year. Default value: 3

term_name: Debit Interest Structure Add Subtract Percentage
display_name: Debit Interest Structure Add Subtract Percentage
description: The Add/Subtract percentage to be applied over the Basic interest percentage while determining the nominal interest percentage of the Debit Interest Structure.
notes: Percentage can be a Negative (-) or Positive (+) rate.

term_name: Debit Interest Structure Bank Code
display_name: Debit Interest Structure Bank Code
description: The code of the bank that can use the Debit interest structure.

term_name: Debit Interest Structure Basic Percentage Interest Link Bank Code
display_name: Debit Interest Structure Basic Percentage Interest Link Bank Code
description: The code of the bank of the Interest Link for determining the Basic interest percentage of the Debit Interest Structure.

term_name: Debit Interest Structure Basic Percentage Interest Link Id
display_name: Debit Interest Structure Basic Percentage Interest Link Id
description: The id of the interest link for determining the basic interest percentage of the debit interest structure.

term_name: Debit Interest Structure Currency Code
display_name: Debit Interest Structure Currency Code
description: The code of the currency for which the Debit Interest Structure is applicable
notes: The ISO Standard 4217 (3 characters) code that identifies the currency.

term_name: Debit Interest Structure Description
display_name: Debit Interest Structure Description
description: The description of the Debit Interest Structure

term_name: Debit Interest Structure End Date
display_name: Debit Interest Structure End Date
description: The end date of Debit Interest Structure
notes: The total period is including the end date.

term_name: Debit Interest Structure Fixed Percentage
display_name: Debit Interest Structure Fixed Percentage
description: The fixed interest percentage of the Debit Interest Structure
notes: Percentage can be a Negative (-) or Positive (+) rate.

term_name: Debit Interest Structure ID
display_name: Debit Interest Structure ID
description: The Id of the Debit Interest Structure

term_name: Debit Interest Structure Maximum Percentage
display_name: Debit Interest Structure Maximum Percentage
description: The maximum interest percentage which cannot be exceeded to determine the nominal interest percentage of the Debit Interest Structure.
notes: Percentage can be a Negative (-) or Positive (+) rate.

term_name: Debit Interest Structure Maximum Percentage Interest Link Bank Code
display_name: Debit Interest Structure Maximum Percentage Interest Link Bank Code
description: The code of the bank of the Interest Link for determining the Maximum interest percentage for the Debit Interest Structure.

term_name: Debit Interest Structure Maximum Percentage Interest Link Id
display_name: Debit Interest Structure Maximum Percentage Interest Link Id
description: The id of the interest link for determining the maximum interest percentage for the debit interest structure.

term_name: Debit Interest Structure Minimum Percentage
display_name: Debit Interest Structure Minimum Percentage
description: The minimum interest percentage below which the nominal interest percentage cannot go for the Debit Interest Structure.
notes: Percentage can be a Negative (-) or Positive (+) rate.

term_name: Debit Interest Structure Minimum Percentage Interest Link Bank Code
display_name: Debit Interest Structure Minimum Percentage Interest Link Bank Code
description: The code of the bank of the Interest Link for determining the Minimum interest percentage for the Debit Interest Structure.

term_name: Debit Interest Structure Minimum Percentage Interest Link Id
display_name: Debit Interest Structure Minimum Percentage Interest Link Id
description: The id of the interest link for determining the minimum interest percentage for the debit interest structure.

term_name: Debit Interest Structure Nominal Percentage
display_name: Debit Interest Structure Nominal Percentage
description: The calculated interest percentage of the Debit Interest Structure.
notes: The Floating rate is calculated using the Basic/Minimum/Maximum percentage related attributes. The calculation starts with using the Basic percentage on which an Add/Subtract percentage is applied. After this, the nominal rate is checked to be above the minimum percentage. If not, the minimum percentage is used as nominal rate. If yes, then the nominal rate is checked to be lower than the maximum percentage. If not, the maximum percentage is used as nominal rate. If yes, then rate determined is used as the nominal rate. The Fixed rate is taken from the Fixed Percentage attribute

term_name: Debit Interest Structure Percentage End Date
display_name: Debit Interest Structure Percentage End Date
description: The End date of the interest percentage of the Debit Interest Structure
notes: The total period is including the end date.

term_name: Debit Interest Structure Percentage Start Date
display_name: Debit Interest Structure Percentage Start Date
description: The Start date of the interest percentage of the Debit Interest Structure

term_name: Debit Interest Structure Start Date
display_name: Debit Interest Structure Start Date
description: The start date of Debit Interest Structure

term_name: Debit Interest Structure Type Code
display_name: Debit Interest Structure Type Code
description: The code of the type of the Debit Interest Structure
notes: P Primaire debetrente,S Secundaire debetrente,O Krediet Overschrijdingsrente

term_name: Debit Interest Tariff Table Recommended Account Type Code
display_name: Debit Interest Tariff Table Recommended Account Type Code
description: Code that indicates whether the debit interest tariff table is part of the set of tariff tables that is recommended for accounts with or without a Facility Agreement.
notes: Only filled for debit interest tariff tables. Possible values: M (met): debit interest tariff table is recommended for accounts with a Facility Agreement Z (zonder): debit interest tariff table is recommended for accounts without a Facility Agreement B (beide): debit interest tariff table is recommended for accounts with and without a Facility Agreement.

term_name: Debtor IBAN
display_name: Debtor IBAN
description: Account number of the debtor in IBAN format.

term_name: Debtor Payment Account Basic Payment Product Number
display_name: Debtor Payment Account Basic Payment Product Number
description: The unique identifying number for a basic payment product (BBP) of the payment account of the debtor.
notes: Code (number) indicating a product related to a Basic Payment Agreement (BBO). Also called 'accounttype'.

term_name: Delivering System Code
display_name: Delivering System Code
description: Code of the system that delivers the agreement
notes: DeliveryChannel: MBK, RTI, PSD, BMK, BZK, BIP etc. Determined in ROM and used in downstream systems for transaction recognition.

term_name: Detailed Transaction Type Accountability Presentation Cluster Code
display_name: Detailed Transaction Type Accountability Presentation Cluster Code
description: The code to identify a presentation cluster, intended to group a set of detailed transaction types in presenting during the accountability process.
notes: presentation cluster ID

term_name: Detailed Transaction Type Basic Payment Agreement Number Of Corrections
display_name: Detailed Transaction Type Basic Payment Agreement Number Of Corrections
description: Number of corrections on financial transactions per basic payment agreement which are categorized by detailed transaction types.
notes: For billing purposes.

term_name: Detailed Transaction Type Basic Payment Agreement Number Of Transactions
display_name: Detailed Transaction Type Basic Payment Agreement Number Of Transactions
description: Number of financial transactions per basic payment agreement which are categorized by detailed transaction types.
notes: For billing purposes.

term_name: Detailed Transaction Type Bracket Lower Limit Number Of Units
display_name: Detailed Transaction Type Bracket Lower Limit Number Of Units
description: The number of units that indicates the lower limit of the bracket related to the detailed transaction type.

term_name: Detailed Transaction Type Bracket Number
display_name: Detailed Transaction Type Bracket Number
description: The number of the bracket related to the detailed transaction type.

term_name: Detailed Transaction Type Bracket Start Date
display_name: Detailed Transaction Type Bracket Start Date
description: The start date of the bracket related to the detailed transaction type.

term_name: Detailed Transaction Type Bracket Tariff Amount
display_name: Detailed Transaction Type Bracket Tariff Amount
description: The tariff amount in euros of the bracket related to the detailed transaction type.

term_name: Detailed Transaction Type Bracket Tariff Start Date
display_name: Detailed Transaction Type Bracket Tariff Start Date
description: The start date of the tariff of the bracket related to the detailed transaction type.

term_name: Detailed Transaction Type Bracket Upper Limit Number Of Units
display_name: Detailed Transaction Type Bracket Upper Limit Number Of Units
description: The number of units that indicates the upper limit of the bracket related to the detailed transaction type.

term_name: Detailed Transaction Type Category Code
display_name: Detailed Transaction Type Category Code
description: The code of the category indicating the kind of the Detailed Transaction Type
notes: Possible values are T -- Financial Transactions O -- Other Transactions B -- Batch Transactions

term_name: Detailed Transaction Type Code
display_name: Detailed Transaction Type Code
description: The code to indicate the detailed type of a financial transaction.
notes: Further detailing of Transaction Type, used among others, for billing. In principle only for internal usage. Example: detailed transaction type code 23 stands for 'opname geldautomaat niet-' within transaction group 'GA - Geldautomaat'

term_name: Detailed Transaction Type Dutch Description
display_name: Detailed Transaction Type Dutch Description
description: The description of the Detailed Transaction Type in Dutch language

term_name: Detailed Transaction Type End Date
display_name: Detailed Transaction Type End Date
description: The end date of the period till when the Detailed Transaction Type is valid.

term_name: Detailed Transaction Type English Description
display_name: Detailed Transaction Type English Description
description: The description of the Detailed Transaction Type in English language

term_name: Detailed Transaction Type Foreign Payments Indicator
display_name: Detailed Transaction Type Foreign Payments Indicator
description: The indicator to determine whether the transactions for the detailed transaction type belong to the foreign payments stream.
notes: J - Yes,N - No. Foreign payments means not only the currency flow (payments) between the the SEPA countries and the Non-SEPA region, but also the foreign currency flow resulting from a transaction between a euro account and a non-euro account within the SEPA region or between two non-euro accounts within the SEPA region.

term_name: Detailed Transaction Type Real Payment Flag
display_name: Detailed Transaction Type Real Payment Flag
description: Flag to indicate if the detailed transaction type is used for a real payment.
notes: Y - Yes, N - No. Besides real payments that are meant for payments made by a customer in favor of another party, which means it concerns a real payment transaction, there are also payment transactions meant to manage the payment account and/or that are initiated by the bank for example for settlement of interest, commision and costs. In that case the transaction is not considered as a real payment transaction.

term_name: Detailed Transaction Type Start Date
display_name: Detailed Transaction Type Start Date
description: The start date of the period from when the Detailed Transaction Type is valid.

term_name: Detailed Transaction Type VAT Code
display_name: Detailed Transaction Type VAT Code
description: The code identifying the VAT tariff that must be used for the detailed transaction type.
notes: H: BTW hoog tarief, L: BTW laag tarief, X: Nul tarief

term_name: DGS Reference Date
display_name: DGS Reference Date
description: The date for which the data for the Deposito Garantie Stelsel are determined.
notes: For the Deposito Garantie Stelsel at one specific moment, the reference date, a set of data per customer are determined that DNB needs to carry out this guarantee. For example for the interest data it concerns the accrued interest since the last interest settlement. That is what trhe customer has a right to at that moment.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Account Administration System Code
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Account Administration System Code
