description: A code which indicates the system in which an account in the digital account report request is administered.
notes: This code indicates in which backend system the data for the account in the digital account report request can be found. Eg 01, 28 or 1200 indicates a Payment account system, 02 indicates a Savings account system, 1104 or 1140 indicates a multibank account system and 1141 a Ventura account system.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Account Booking Source System Code
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Account Booking Source System Code
description: The three character code for the back end source system in which the bookings are administered for an account in the digital account report request.
notes: Examples are: AZS = Savings, CNA = New current account, MB9 = Multibank.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Account Currency Code
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Account Currency Code
description: The ISO 4217 three character code of the currency of the account in the digital account report request.
notes: The unique Identification of a  bank account can be done on the basis of the account number and currency code combination. The currency codes are the ISO 4217 three character currency codes eg EUR, GBP, KWD, USD.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Account End Of Day Format End Date
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Account End Of Day Format End Date
description: The requested date on which the end of day statement period should end for an account in the digital account report request.
notes: This date is supplied in the incoming XML message of the requestor or determined by the application logic. This date applies only to the formats of type end of day and is not used for formats of type intraday.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Account End Of Day Format Start Date
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Account End Of Day Format Start Date
description: The requested date on which the end of day format period should begin for an account in the digital account report request.
notes: This date is supplied in the incoming XML message of the requestor or determined by the application logic. This date applies only to the formats of type end of day and is not used for formats of type intraday.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Account Id
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Account Id
description: The identification of the account in the digital account report request.
notes: One digital account report request may contain up to 5000 account Id's or numbers. Each account Id (or number) may have 1 or more digital account statements generated. Account Id's can have differing formats. An IBAN eg: NL020119694721, a BBAN eg: 119694721 or another international bank account number type eg: 032180000118359719 (a CLABE format).

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Account Intraday Format End Date
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Account Intraday Format End Date
description: The requested date on which the intraday statement period should end for an account in the digital account report request.
notes: This date is supplied in the incoming XML message of the requestor.This date applies only to the formats of type intraday and is not used for formats of type end of day. This date may also be empty (in which case the application logic determines the end date).

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Account Intraday Format Start Point Description
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Account Intraday Format Start Point Description
description: The requested description of a point from which the intraday statement period should begin for an account in the digital account report request.
notes: This starting point description is supplied in the incoming XML message of the requestor or determined by the application logic. This starting point description can be either a date (eg. '2019-01-17', a date and timestamp (eg. '2017-05-03-13.02.10.001234') or a date and booking sequence number (eg. '2017-08-01.674714'). This starting point description applies only to the formats of type intraday and is not used for formats of type end of day.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Account Number Format Code
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Account Number Format Code
description: A code for the format of the account number received in the digital account report request.
notes: I= IBAN, O = other. In the XML request message for a digital account report, the account number can be filled in either an XML IBAN tag or in an XML Id tag. This code indicates in which XML tag the account number is present. Note: The assumption is that the requestor has placed the account number in the correct tag for its format.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Account Number Of Bookings
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Account Number Of Bookings
description: The number of bookings delivered for an account present in the digital account report request.
notes: A digital account report request can consist of multiple accounts. This number indicates at account level the total number of bookings delivered for the request.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Account Number Of Statements
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Account Number Of Statements
description: The number of statements delivered for an account present in the digital account report request.
notes: A digital account report request can consist of multiple accounts. This number indicates at account level how many statements have been delivered.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Account Processing Result Code
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Account Processing Result Code
description: A code which indicates the processing outcome of an account in the digital account report request.
notes: This code Identifies the result of processing an account associated with a digital account report request. For example: VSI00000 means that the account has been successfully processed for the particular request, VSI00011 means that the account could not be found in the back end administration systems.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Account Sequence Number
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Account Sequence Number
description: The sequence number determined for the account in the digital account report request.
notes: Each account in a digital account report request is assigned a sequence number determined by the order the accounts appear in the request. For example, if there are 10 accounts in the request, then each account will be assigend a number from 1 to 10 depending on the position of the account in the request. The first account will be assigned the number 1 and the last account will be assigned the number 10.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Account Suppress Empty Statement Flag
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Account Suppress Empty Statement Flag
description: An indicator for whether empty statements i.e. statements without any bookings should be generated or not for an account in a digital account report request.
notes: 0 = Generate empty statements , 1 = Do NOT generate empty statements. By default statements for a requested period are generated irrespective of whether there are bookings present in the statement or not. This flag indicates whether statements should only be generated for the statement period(s) in which there are bookings present, in other words, indicates whether empty statements should be supressed.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Batch Process Start Datetime
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Batch Process Start Datetime
description: Date and Time in CET logged when processing of the batch for the digital account report request starts.
notes: Digital account report requests can be processed in one of two ways: online (the result is returned to the requestor as part of a session) or via batch (the result is output to a file system to be retrieved by the requestor). This date timestamp indicates the time in CET that the batch processing for a batch type of request has been started. The format is:YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss:SSSSSS' e.g. 2017-05-02 16:05:10.001235.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Calendar Type Code
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Calendar Type Code
description: The code of the type of calendar requested in the digital account report request which is used to determine the reporting period to which a financial booking belongs as well as the date of a statement.
notes: There are 2 types of calendar which can be used for determining a statement or reporting period. This can be by book day calendar, determined by the bank's own systems' closing moments, or by gregorian calendar which is the 24 hours period belonging to a particular date in CET. The bank's book day typically runs on normal weekdays from around 7pm to the following weekday around 7 pm. This means for example, 1 book day can begin on FrIday 7pm and end on Monday 7 pm. A calendar day on the other hand is always 1 whole day from mIdnight to just before mIdnight of the following day, every day of the week.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Channel Name
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Channel Name
description: The name of the channel through which a digital account report request has been made.
notes: There are various channels though which the digital account report requests can be made. For example: BETALEN-ONTVANGEN-COCKPIT (BOC) or -INTERNET-BANKIEREN (RIB).

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Compress Transaction Type Code List Text
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Compress Transaction Type Code List Text
description: A textual list of transaction type codes including whether debit, credit or both, which are to be compressed per statement for a digital account report request.
notes: Compressed bookings are bookings which are presented as 1 booking reflecting the total value amount of the indivIdual bookings. For example: 'Id C' = All credit Ideal bookings having the same value date for each statement date will be compressed. If the requesting customer has 10 credit Ideal bookings of 5 euros each all with the same value date and will appear on the same statement, then there will be one credit Ideal booking presented of 50 euros. The textual list can contain a maximum of 10 transaction type codes and the associated credit, debit or both criteria.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Data Collection End Datetime
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Data Collection End Datetime
description: Date and time logged in CET when the process of data collection for the digital account report request is finished.
notes: The data needed for a digital account report request is collected from various back end systems. This date and timestamp (logged) in CET indicates the date and time this sub process of handling the request ends. The format is:YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss:SSSSSS' e.g. 2017-05-02 16:05:10.001235.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Data Collection Result Code
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Data Collection Result Code
description: A code which indicates the result of the data collection process associated with a digital account report request.
notes: This code Identifies the result of the data collection process of a digital account report request. For example: VSI00000 means that the data collection has been successfully carried out for the particular request, VSI00021 means that an error occurred during the data collection process, VSI00024 means that none of the account numbers in the request was found or allowed.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Data Collection Start Datetime
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Data Collection Start Datetime
description: Date and Time in CET logged when the process of data collection for the digital account report request starts.
notes: The data needed to fulfill a digital account report request is collected from various back end systems. This date and timestamp (logged) indicates the date and time this sub process of handling the request begins. The format is:YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss:SSSSSS' e.g. 2017-05-02 16:05:10.001235.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Data Mapping Process End Datetime
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Data Mapping Process End Datetime
description: Date and time logged in CET when the data mapping sub process for the digital account report request is finished.
notes: The data mapping sub process is responsible for mapping the data to conform to the output formats (for all formats except CSV). This date and timestamp (logged) in CET indicates the date and time this sub process of handling the request ends. The format is:YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss:SSSSSS' e.g. 2017-05-02 16:05:10.001235.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Data Mapping Process Start Datetime
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Data Mapping Process Start Datetime
description: Date and time logged in CET when the data mapping sub process for the digital account report request starts.
notes: The data mapping sub process is responsible for mapping the data to conform to the output formats (for all formats except CSV). This date and timestamp (logged) in CET indicates the date and time this sub process of handling the request starts. The format is:YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss:SSSSSS' e.g. 2017-05-02 16:05:10.001235.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Delivery Method Name
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Delivery Method Name
description: The name of the method in which the digital account report is delivered to the requestor.
notes: The digital account report can be delivered in one of two ways: Directly to the requestor via method RETRIEVE or to a place on the file system where the requestor can collect the file via method PUSH.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request End Status Description
display_name: Digital Account Report Request End Status Description
description: The description of the end status of the digital account report request.
domain_values: E.g. Report delivering completed,Request failed,Data collection started
notes: This status describes where the process for a digital account report request has ended. 'Report delivering completed' is a succesful return to the requestor. Unsuccessful statuses are for example 'Request failed' and 'Data collection started'.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Format Name
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Format Name
description: The name of the format for which the digital account report request has been made.
notes: These are standard formats such as CAMT053, CSV, Digital statements in PDF form, MT942.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Format Version Number
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Format Version Number
description: The version number of the format for which the digital account report request has been made.
notes: When changes are made to a standard format, the version number of the format is increased. For minor changes there is a decimal increment eg. 1.0 to 1.1 and for major changes the increment is to the next whole number e.g. 2.1 to 3.0.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Id
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Id
description: The unique identifier of a digital account report request assigned by the processing application.
notes: All data collected and formatted for the digital account report request is Identified by this request Id. A digital account report can contain a set of bookings over any period whereas a statement is a set of bookings contiguous to the previous statement (unless the first statement). As the processing application does not know the history of the requests made, the more generic term report is used. Also a report can contain multiple statements for multiple account numbers.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Language Code
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Language Code
description: The code in the digital account report request indicating the language in which the output should be delivered.
notes: EN -- Engels,NL -- Nederlands

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Number Of Bookings
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Number Of Bookings
description: The total number of bookings delivered for a digital account report request.
notes: A digital account report request can result in none, one or multiple bookings over the total possible statements delivered in the report.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Number Of Statements
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Number Of Statements
description: The total number of statements delivered for a digital account report request.
notes: A digital account report request can result in none, one or multiple statements, depending on the format, number of accounts and the reporting period requested.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Output File Size Number Of Bytes
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Output File Size Number Of Bytes
description: The size of the output file in bytes of the report generated for a digital account report request.
notes: This field is only filled when the requested digital account report is for format type PDF.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Output File Version Code
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Output File Version Code
description: The version code of the output file containing the digital account report which is delivered to the requestor of the digital account report.
notes: The output file can have varying metadata. This version code indicates which metadata is present in the output file.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request PDF Creation End Datetime
display_name: Digital Account Report Request PDF Creation End Datetime
description: Date and time logged in CET when the sub process for creating the PDF for a digital account report request is finished.
notes: An external system transforms the digital account report into a PDF. This Date and timestamp is logged in CET when the PDF is received from the external system. The format is:YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss:SSSSSS' e.g. 2017-05-02 16:05:10.001235.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request PDF Creation Start Datetime
display_name: Digital Account Report Request PDF Creation Start Datetime
description: Date and time logged in CET when the sub process for creating the PDF for a digital account report request starts.
notes: An external system transforms the digital account report into a PDF. This date and timestamp is logged in CET when the data is sent to the external system for processing. The format is:'YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss:SSSSSS' e.g. 2017-05-02 16:05:10.001235.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Received Datetime
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Received Datetime
description: Date and Time in CET when the digital account report request is received.
notes: This date and time(stamp) Identifies the moment (logged) in CET in which the request for the digital account report is received. The format is:YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss:SSSSSS' e.g. 2017-05-02 16:05:10.001235.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Report Sent Datetime
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Report Sent Datetime
description: Date and time logged in CET when the digital account report has been sent to the requestor associated with the digital account report request.
notes: The date and timestamp on which the final digital account report is sent back to the requestor.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Statement Booking Sort Order Code
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Statement Booking Sort Order Code
description: A code indicating how the statement bookings are to be sorted for a digital account report request.
notes: Currently the default sort order (Code = 1) is the presentation per statement from oldest to newest booking. The alternative sort order (Code = 2) is per statement by highest absolute transaction amount, first all debit transactions and then all credit transactions.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Sub Process Name
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Sub Process Name
description: Name of a subprocess used for a digital account report request.
notes: Extra or subprocessing is used depending on the way in which digital account report requests are made. SUBSCRIPTION for when the requests are generated according to subscription data, or DEFAULT when the requests are generated by the requestors directly.

term_name: Digital Account Report Request Subscription Flag
display_name: Digital Account Report Request Subscription Flag
description: An indicator for whether the digital account report request has originated from a subscription.
notes: This indicator is derived from the subscription id which is generated by the application. If this field is filled then the indicator is 1 (yes a subscription request), if the field is empty, the indicator is 0 (no not a subscription request.

term_name: Discount Arrangement Code
display_name: Discount Arrangement Code
description: The unique identification of a discount arrangement.
notes: 30: Schuldsanering; 302: Startersvoordeel (regeling 2020); 340: Verenigingen en Stichtingen; 400: WRR abonnement saldocompensatie

term_name: Distribution Channel Description
display_name: Distribution Channel Description
description: Description of the distribution channel.

term_name: Distribution Channel Financial Transaction Allowed Flag
display_name: Distribution Channel Financial Transaction Allowed Flag
description: Flag that indicates if a distribution channel is allowed to pass a financial transaction or not.
notes: J - Ja,N - Nee

term_name: Distribution Channel Id
display_name: Distribution Channel Id
description: The identification of the channel through which a message is delivered to the bank organisation or by which system the message was generated in the bank organisation.
notes: ACB: W&R ACBS verwerking,ALN: Leningen,APN: Non Fiat Platform

term_name: End of Day Balance Currency Number of Decimals
display_name: End of Day Balance Currency Number of Decimals
description: The number of decimals in which the currency of the end of day balance is expressed.

term_name: End of Day Balance Date
display_name: End of Day Balance Date
description: The date of the end of day balance.

term_name: End of Day Balance Payment Account Currency Code
display_name: End of Day Balance Payment Account Currency Code
description: The ISO Standard 4217 (3 characters) code of the currency of the payment account for which the end of day balance is determined.
notes: ISO 3 standard,' 3-lettercode'.

term_name: End of Day Balance Payment Account IBAN
display_name: End of Day Balance Payment Account IBAN
description: IBAN of the payment account for which the end of day balance is determined.

term_name: End of Day Balance Year Month
display_name: End of Day Balance Year Month
description: The year and month of the date for the end of day balance.
notes: Format: YYYYMM

term_name: End of Day Closing Available Value Currency Smallest Unit Balance
display_name: End of Day Closing Available Value Currency Smallest Unit Balance
description: The end of day closing available value balance of the account expressed in the smallest unit of the currency.
notes: Without D/C indication: negative is debit balance, positive is credit balance.

term_name: End of Day Closing Booked Currency Smallest Unit Balance
display_name: End of Day Closing Booked Currency Smallest Unit Balance
description: The end of day closing booked balance amount, at the time of the closing of the bookday, expressed in the smallest unit of the currency.
notes: The closing of the book day is 24:00. Without D/C indication: negative is debit balance, positive is credit balance.

term_name: End of Day Day 1 Forward Available Value Currency Smallest Unit Balance
display_name: End of Day Day 1 Forward Available Value Currency Smallest Unit Balance
description: The forward available value balance of the account for the end of day date + 1, expressed in the smallest unit of the currency.
notes: Without D/C indication: negative is debit balance, positive is credit balance.

term_name: End Of Day Day 2 Forward Available Value Currency Smallest Unit Balance
display_name: End Of Day Day 2 Forward Available Value Currency Smallest Unit Balance
description: The forward available value balance of the account for the end of day date + 2, expressed in the smallest unit of the currency.
notes: Without D/C indication: negative is debit balance, positive is credit balance.

term_name: End of Day Day 3 Forward Available Value Currency Smallest Unit Balance
display_name: End of Day Day 3 Forward Available Value Currency Smallest Unit Balance
description: The forward available value balance of the account for the end of day date + 3, expressed in the smallest unit of the currency.
notes: Without D/C indication: negative is debit balance, positive is credit balance.

term_name: End of Day Day 4 Forward Available Value Currency Smallest Unit Balance
display_name: End of Day Day 4 Forward Available Value Currency Smallest Unit Balance
description: The forward available value balance of the account for the end of day date + 4, expressed in the smallest unit of the currency.
notes: Without D/C indication: negative is debit balance, positive is credit balance.

term_name: End Of Month Customer Point Of View Currency Smallest Unit Book Balance
display_name: End Of Month Customer Point Of View Currency Smallest Unit Book Balance
description: The end-of-month book balance of the current account expressed in the smallest unit of the currency of the basic payment agreement, from the customer point of view.
notes: A credit balance for the customer means a balance greater than 0. The customer has money on his account. However, from the banks perspective it is a debit balance while it is a debt from the bank to the customer.

term_name: End Of Month Date
display_name: End Of Month Date
description: Date of the last calendar day of the month

term_name: Euro Direct Debit Agreement Bank Id
display_name: Euro Direct Debit Agreement Bank Id
description: The numeric identification of the bank of the account holder (creditor) in the direct debit agreement

term_name: Euro Direct Debit Agreement Customer External Id
display_name: Euro Direct Debit Agreement Customer External Id
description: The unique external identification of the customer related to the euro direct debit agreement

term_name: Euro Direct Debit Agreement Id
display_name: Euro Direct Debit Agreement Id
description: The unique internal identification of the direct debit agreement

term_name: Euro Direct Debit Agreement Name
display_name: Euro Direct Debit Agreement Name
description: The name of the euro direct debit agreement

term_name: Euro Direct Debit Agreement Suspension Flag
display_name: Euro Direct Debit Agreement Suspension Flag
description: The indicator that shows if the direct debit agreement is suspended
notes: T = Suspended, F = Not suspended If the agreement is suspended then the creditor can't collect during the suspesion time.

term_name: Euro Direct Debit Emandate Flag
display_name: Euro Direct Debit Emandate Flag
description: The indicator to show if the euro direct debit mandate was signed electronicly
notes: T = electronic signing, F = Non electronic signing

term_name: Euro Direct Debit Go Order Allowed Number Of Collections
display_name: Euro Direct Debit Go Order Allowed Number Of Collections
description: The maximum number of payment collections from the debtor account that can be processed due to the customer created euro direct debit whitelist item
notes: If a customer wants to permit a direct debit i.e. for once, then the number of payment collections (frequency) will be put on 1. This can be limited further by adding a start date and/or a end date.

term_name: Euro Direct Debit Go Order Bank Id
display_name: Euro Direct Debit Go Order Bank Id
description: The numeric identification of the bank of the debtor in the accountholder created item on the euro direct debit whitelist.
notes: A 'Go Order' whitelist exists of one or more customer created items or records, which will lead to processing of the delivered direct debits if the data are equal. An item or record exists of minimal an item Id, a debit accountno and one of the other fields.

term_name: Euro Direct Debit Stop Payment Order Suspended Flag
display_name: Euro Direct Debit Stop Payment Order Suspended Flag
description: A flag that indicates if the euro direct debit stop payment order is suspended.

term_name: Euro Direct Debit Stop Payment Order Type Description
display_name: Euro Direct Debit Stop Payment Order Type Description
description: The description that indicates the type of the stop payment order of a euro direct debit was stopped.
notes: Always contains "baseDebtorIBAN".

term_name: Euro Payment Displayed Instruction Id
display_name: Euro Payment Displayed Instruction Id
description: The unique identification of the instruction with euro payments within OPF that is displayed within the GUI of the payment engine.

term_name: Euro Payment Displayed Interchange Id
display_name: Euro Payment Displayed Interchange Id
description: The unique ID within OPF that is used to store the interchange with the euro payments, that is displayed within the Gui of the payment engine.

term_name: Euro Payment Displayed Transaction Id
display_name: Euro Payment Displayed Transaction Id
description: The unique identification of the euro payment transaction within OPF that is displayed within the GUI of the payment engine.

term_name: Euro Payment E-Mandate Approval Type Code
display_name: Euro Payment E-Mandate Approval Type Code
description: The code that indicates the type of approval of the euro payment e-mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment E-Mandate First Signer Date
display_name: Euro Payment E-Mandate First Signer Date
description: The date on which the first signer signed the euro payment e-mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment E-Mandate First Signer Id
display_name: Euro Payment E-Mandate First Signer Id
description: The identification of the first signer of the euro payment e-mandate.
notes: Value is supplied from InternetBanking.

term_name: Euro Payment E-Mandate Second Signer Date
display_name: Euro Payment E-Mandate Second Signer Date
description: The date on which the second signer signed the euro payment e-mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment E-Mandate Second Signer Id
display_name: Euro Payment E-Mandate Second Signer Id
description: The identification of the second signer of the euro payment e-mandate.
notes: Value is supplied from InternetBanking.

term_name: Euro Payment Incoming Instruction Flag
display_name: Euro Payment Incoming Instruction Flag
description: The flag indicating if the instruction with euro payments is incoming.
notes: T=True, F=False

term_name: Euro Payment Incoming Interchange Flag
display_name: Euro Payment Incoming Interchange Flag
description: Flag indicating if the interchange with euro payments is incoming.
notes: T=True, F=False

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Batch Booking Flag
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Batch Booking Flag
description: The flag that indicates if the batch with euro payments should be booked as one total amount on the instructing parties account, or not.
notes: true: it concerns a Batch booking, meaning one total booking. false: it concerns a Bulk booking, meaning that every transactions with the batch will be booked separately.

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Classification Code
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Classification Code
description: The code of the classification of the instruction, indicating the nature of the payments within the batch.

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Creation Datetime
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Creation Datetime
description: Date and time on which the instruction with euro payments was created.
notes: When it concerns an incoming batch, this is the creation date as read in the contents of the message, which should refer to the date the file was created by the sending party. When it concerns an outgoing batch, then this date is equal to the transport date. Format: yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm:ss:nnnnnn

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Delivery Channel Code
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Delivery Channel Code
description: The code of the channel that was used for the delivery of the instruction with euro payments.
notes: e.g. EXP, FLP, RTI

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Direct Debit Creditor Id
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Direct Debit Creditor Id
description: Creditor identification for a euro payment instruction direct debit.
notes: Companies have a fixed creditor ID, used for debt collection agreements.

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Direct Debit Debtor Agreement Id
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Direct Debit Debtor Agreement Id
description: Agreement identification for a direct debit euro payments instruction for the debtor.

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Direct Debit Debtor Limit Exceed Approved Flag
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Direct Debit Debtor Limit Exceed Approved Flag
description: Flag showing that the limit exceed of the direct debit euro payment instruction has been approved on the side of the debtor.
notes: Flag that the amount of the limit has been approved.

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Direct Debit Debtor Limit Exceed Declined Flag
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Direct Debit Debtor Limit Exceed Declined Flag
description: Flag showing that the limit exceed of the direct debit euro payment instruction has been declined on the side of the debtor.
notes: Flag that the amount of the limit has been declined.

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Direct Debit Limit Exceed Flag
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Direct Debit Limit Exceed Flag
description: Flag exceed limit indicator for a direct debit euro payment instruction.
notes: Flag that the amount of the total limit has been reached.

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction End To End Id
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction End To End Id
description: The unique identification of the batch with euro payments, as assigned by the initiating party to unumbiguously identify the Instruction throughout the entire end-to-end chain.
notes: This identification is passed on, unchanged, throughout the entire end-to-end chain.

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Id
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Id
description: The unique identification of the instruction with euro payments within the payment engine PEX.

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Initiating Agent BIC
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Initiating Agent BIC
description: The BIC of the bank of the party that initiated the instruction with euro payments.

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Initiating Party Code
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Initiating Party Code
description: Code of the party that initiated the batch with euro payments.
notes: For a SCT (credit transfer) this is the debit party, and in that case the BIC of the bank of the debtor. In case of SDD (direct debit) it concerns the credit party, and in that case the BIC of the bank of the creditor.. However, it can also be the party that initiated the batch on behalf of the debit or credit party.

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Initiator IBAN
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Initiator IBAN
description: The IBAN of the account of the party that initiated the batch with euro payments.

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Interchange Id
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Interchange Id
description: The unique identification of the interchange with the euro payments that contained the instruction.

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Last Modification Datetime
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Last Modification Datetime
description: Date and time on which the instruction with euro payments was changed for the last time.

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Local Instrument Code
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Local Instrument Code
description: The code that indicates the steering (the local instrument) of processing of the transactions in the batch with euro payments, according to a standard SEPA list.
notes: IDEAL, NLDO, ACCEPT, SDN, NLGOV, CORE, B2B, INST. Based on  ISO20022 'ExternalLocalInstrument1Code' list. Also in Dutch it is often called Local Instrument.

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Original Interchange Name
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Original Interchange Name
description: The original name of the interchange file where the instruction with euro payments originated from.

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Preferred Processing Date
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Preferred Processing Date
description: Date at which the initiating party requests that the batch with euro payments will be processed.
notes: Format 'yyyy-mm-dd'

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Processing Scheme Code
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Processing Scheme Code
description: The code of the scheme that determines the processing of the instruction with the euro payments.
notes: 'SDDCORE' = SEPA Direct Debit Core, 'SDDB2B' = SEPA Direct Debit Business to Business, 'SCT' = SEPA Credit Transfer

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Reference Id
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Reference Id
description: The id of the reference of the batch with euro payments, as assigned by the instructing party.
notes: This reference is sent to the next party in the chain to unambiguously identify the instruction.

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Settlement Amount
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Settlement Amount
description: The total amount in euro of all transactions within the instruction with euro payments, that is settled.

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Settlement Currency Code
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Settlement Currency Code
description: The ISO character 3 code of the currency of the amount of the instruction with euro payments, that is settled.

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Settlement Date
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Settlement Date
description: Date on which the payment is settled between the debit and credit party, concerning the batch with euro payments.
notes: Format 'yyyy-mm-dd'

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Status Code
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Status Code
description: The code of the status of the instruction with euro payments.

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Total Number Of Credit Transactions
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Total Number Of Credit Transactions
description: The total number of credit transactions in the instruction with euro payments.

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Total Number of Debit Transactions
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Total Number of Debit Transactions
description: The total number of debit transactions in the instruction with euro payments.

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Total Number Of Transactions
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Total Number Of Transactions
description: The total number of transactions in the batch with euro payments.

term_name: Euro Payment Instruction Type Code
display_name: Euro Payment Instruction Type Code
description: Code that indicates the type of the original instruction with euro payments.

term_name: Euro Payment Interchange Channel Input Method Code
display_name: Euro Payment Interchange Channel Input Method Code
description: The code of the manner in which the interchange with euro payments was offered to the input channel of bank.
domain_values: OB, MS, MF, FI, DA, SP
notes: OB: Online Bookkeeping,MS: Manual Single transaction (handmatige initiatie),MF: Manual File (handmatige initiatie),FI: File Import,DA: Directe Aanlevering (straight delivery),SP: Single Payment (individuele opdracht)

term_name: Euro Payment Interchange Creation Datetime
display_name: Euro Payment Interchange Creation Datetime
description: Date and time on which the interchange with euro payments was created.
notes: In case it is an incoming file, then this is the creation date as read in the content of the message, which should refer to the date the file was created by the sending party. When it is an outgoing file, this date is equal to the transport date.

term_name: Euro Payment Interchange Delivery Channel Code
display_name: Euro Payment Interchange Delivery Channel Code
description: The code of the channel that was used for the delivery of the interchange with euro payments.
notes: e.g. EXP, FLP, RTI

term_name: Euro Payment Interchange Delivery Channel Customer Id
display_name: Euro Payment Interchange Delivery Channel Customer Id
description: Identification of the customer who has delivered the interchange with euro payments, as stored in the delivery channel.

term_name: Euro Payment Interchange Delivery Channel Status Code
display_name: Euro Payment Interchange Delivery Channel Status Code
description: The code of the status of the interchange with euro payments as known in the delivery channel.

term_name: Euro Payment Interchange Delivery Method Code
display_name: Euro Payment Interchange Delivery Method Code
description: Code that indicates how the interchange with euro payments was delivered to the channel.

term_name: Euro Payment Interchange Duplicate Flag
display_name: Euro Payment Interchange Duplicate Flag
description: The flag indicating if it concerns a duplicate of the interchange with euro payments.
notes: T = True en F = False

term_name: Euro Payment Interchange External Party Id
display_name: Euro Payment Interchange External Party Id
description: The idenfication of the online bookkeeping party that submitted the interchange with euro payments.
notes: This attribute is mandatory when input method code is 'OB'.

term_name: Euro Payment Interchange External Reference Id
display_name: Euro Payment Interchange External Reference Id
description: The id of the external reference of the interchange with euro payments.

term_name: Euro Payment Interchange Format Name
display_name: Euro Payment Interchange Format Name
description: Name of the format of the interchange with the euro payments.

term_name: Euro Payment Interchange Id
display_name: Euro Payment Interchange Id
description: The unique ID of the interchange with the euro payments within OPF.

term_name: Euro Payment Interchange Last Modification Datetime
display_name: Euro Payment Interchange Last Modification Datetime
description: Date and time on which the interchange with euro payments was changed for the last time.

term_name: Euro Payment Interchange Name
display_name: Euro Payment Interchange Name
description: Name of the interchange with the euro payments.

term_name: Euro Payment Interchange Participant Id
display_name: Euro Payment Interchange Participant Id
description: The identification of the participant who has sent the interchange with euro payments, or to whom this interchange is sent.
notes: For example, ROM/EQUENS.

term_name: Euro Payment Interchange Status Code
display_name: Euro Payment Interchange Status Code
description: The code of the status of the interchange with euro payments.

term_name: Euro Payment Interchange Transport Datetime
display_name: Euro Payment Interchange Transport Datetime
description: Date and time that the interchange with euro payments has been received or submitted.
notes: If it is an incoming file, then this is the date the interchange was received in the system. In case it is an outgoing file, then this is the date the interchange was submitted.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Amendment Reason Code
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Amendment Reason Code
description: The code that indicates the reason of amendment of the euro payment mandate.
domain_values: 01 - OrgMndtID, 02- OrgCredSchID, 03 - OrgCredSchIDNm, 04 - OrgDebAccntNr, 05 - OrgDebAccntAgnt and 04, 06 OrgMndtID and 01, 99 Any other combination.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Approval Datetime
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Approval Datetime
description: The date and time on which the approval for the euro payment mandate was given.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Approval Status Code
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Approval Status Code
description: The code that indicates the status of approval of the euro payment mandate.
notes: Approval is used with B2B and E-mandates.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Bankswitch Flag
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Bankswitch Flag
description: Flag indicating whether the creditor is using the 'bank switch service' for the euro payments mandate.
domain_values: T: TRUE, F: FALSE or NULL
notes: When for an incoming direct debit the bankswitch applies the indicator is put on T. When bankswitch does not apply it is either Null or F.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate BVA Flag
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate BVA Flag
description: The flag that indicates whether the euro payment mandate was created in BVA.
notes: BVA an application which is the user interface of PEX (payment processing software).

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Change Reason Description
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Change Reason Description
description: The description of the reason why the euro payment mandate was changed.
notes: As supplied by the creditor of the euro payment mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Creation Datetime
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Creation Datetime
description: The date and time of when the euro payment mandate was created.
notes: Indicates the exact moment when someone gave permission (e.g., to a company or bank) to automatically withdraw money from their account.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Creditor Account IBAN
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Creditor Account IBAN
description: The IBAN of the account of the creditor related to the euro payment mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Creditor BIC
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Creditor BIC
description: The Bank Identifier Code (BIC) of the bank of the creditor of the euro payment mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Creditor Id
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Creditor Id
description: The identification of the creditor of the euro payment mandate.
notes: This is based on an official identification. In NL, the chamber of commerce.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Creditor Identification Code
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Creditor Identification Code
description: The code that indicates the identification of the creditor of the euro payment mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Creditor Name
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Creditor Name
description: The name of the creditor of the euro payment mandate.
notes: The creditor is the receiver of the funds for the direct debit for which the mandate is applicable.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Creditor Postal Address Line 1
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Creditor Postal Address Line 1
description: The first line of the postal address of the creditor of the euro payment mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Creditor Postal Address Line 2
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Creditor Postal Address Line 2
description: The second line of the postal address of the creditor of the euro payment mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Creditor Reference Id
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Creditor Reference Id
description: The reference identification of the euro payment mandate as given by the creditor.
notes: This reference is not unique, and needs to be seen in combination with Creditor Party Identification, Debtor Account, Creditor Account and the SEPA processing scheme.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Creditor Residence Country Code
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Creditor Residence Country Code
description: The ISO char 2 code of the country of residence of the creditor of the euro payment mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Creditor Threshold Amount
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Creditor Threshold Amount
description: The threshold indicating the maximal amount in euros that can be collected within the euro payment mandate as indicated by the creditor.
notes: Any direct debit with an amount above this threshold will be rejected.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Creditor Type Code
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Creditor Type Code
description: The code that indicates the type of creditor of the euro payment mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Debtor Account IBAN
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Debtor Account IBAN
description: The IBAN of the debtor account of the euro payment mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Debtor BIC
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Debtor BIC
description: The bank Identifier Code (BIC) of the bank of debtor of the euro payment mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Debtor Id
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Debtor Id
description: The identification of the debtor of the euro payment mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Debtor Identification Type Code
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Debtor Identification Type Code
description: The code that indicates the type of identification of the debtor of the euro payment mandate.
notes: Can be used if the debtor is not a person.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Debtor Issuer Id
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Debtor Issuer Id
description: The issuer identification of the debtor of the euro payment mandate.
notes: The party that issued the identification for the debtor.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Debtor Name
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Debtor Name
description: The name of the debtor of the euro payment mandate.
notes: The debtor is the party where the direct debit is being debited.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Debtor Postal Address Line 1
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Debtor Postal Address Line 1
description: The first line of the postal address of the debtor of the euro payment mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Debtor Postal Address Line 2
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Debtor Postal Address Line 2
description: The second line of the postal address of the debtor of the euro payment mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Debtor Reference Id
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Debtor Reference Id
description: The reference identification of the debtor of the euro payment mandate used by the creditor.
notes: Used with E-mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Debtor Residence Address Country Code
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Debtor Residence Address Country Code
description: The ISO char 2 code of the country of residence of the debtor of the euro payment mandate.
notes: This can be different from the country of the bank branch.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate E-mandate Flag
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate E-mandate Flag
description: A flag indicating if the euro payment mandate is an electronically signed mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate End Date
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate End Date
description: The end date of the euro payment mandate.
notes: This date is being extended every time a direct debit is collected. When the end date expires the mandate is Cancelled.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate First Signer Name
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate First Signer Name
description: The name of the first signer of the euro payment mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Id
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Id
description: The unique identification of the mandate (collection) as stored in the PEX system for a euro payment.
notes: If the mandate is updated the mandate record can be replaced or updated. When replaced the DebtorMandateKey will be new. When updated the version of the mandate will be updated.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Identification Cause Version Transaction Id
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Identification Cause Version Transaction Id
description: The identification of the transaction which caused a new version/record of the euro payment mandate to be made.
notes: Euro payment transaction table - payment transaction key.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Last Modification Datetime
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Last Modification Datetime
description: The date and time when the last modification was made to the euro payment mandate.
notes: For every change of the mandate record the date and time will be updated. Also the update version will be incremented with 1.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Last Transaction Id
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Last Transaction Id
description: The identification of the last transaction of the euro payment mandate.
notes: Points to table: Euro payment transactions - transaction ID.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Latest Version Id
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Latest Version Id
description: The identification of the latest version of the euro payment mandate.
notes: When a mandate is updated and a new record is created, the newest version will have value T while the previous version will be updated to F.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Number Of Updates
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Number Of Updates
description: The number of updates that were done on the euro payment mandate.
notes: The version is incremented with 1 every time there is an update on the mandate, also when no new record is created of the mandate. For example when the latest direct debit is added to the mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Original Debit IBAN
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Original Debit IBAN
description: The IBAN of the original debit party of the euro payment mandate.
notes: This is the IBAN that was last changed. Earlier updated IBAN needs to be looked up under earlier mandate version.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Original Debtor BIC
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Original Debtor BIC
description: The Bank Identifier Code (BIC) of the bank of the original debtor of the euro payment mandate.
notes: This is the original debtor BIC from the last time the number was changed.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Paper Copy Creditor Request Datetime
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Paper Copy Creditor Request Datetime
description: The date and time when the creditor was requested the paper copy of the euro payment mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Paper Copy Creditor Request Status Code
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Paper Copy Creditor Request Status Code
description: The status code of the request to receive a paper copy of the signed euro payment mandate from the creditor.
notes: This is requested when the debtor claims an unauthorized direct debit for which he wants to have a refund by the bank.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Processing Scheme Code
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Processing Scheme Code
description: The code of the scheme that determines the processing of the euro payment mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Purchase Order Id
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Purchase Order Id
description: The identification of the purchase order of the euro payment mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Purge Day Datetime
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Purge Day Datetime
description: The date and time on which the euro payment mandate would be purged/removed.
notes: When no further collections are executed.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate bank Branch Code
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate bank Branch Code
description: The code that indicates the bank branch which processes the euro payment mandate.
domain_values: 1600; bank (NL branch), 2100; bank Antwerp branch, 2600; bank Frankfurt branch
notes: Can be for both debtor and/or creditor party.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Reason Text
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Reason Text
description: The text that describes the reason of the euro payment mandate.
notes: The creditor has to supply a reason in free reason text to the debtor why the (E-)mandate is requested to be signed.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Second Signer Name
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Second Signer Name
description: The name of the second signer of the euro payment mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Signature Date
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Signature Date
description: The date on which the euro payment mandate was signed.
notes: Mostly this is the date on which the mandate became active.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Start Date
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Start Date
description: The start date of the euro payment mandate.
notes: This can be later than the creation date of the mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Status Code
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Status Code
description: The code that indicates the status of the euro payment mandate.
notes: Mandates that are actively used have status active.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Type Code
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Type Code
description: The code that indicates the type of the euro payment mandate.
notes: Recurring or one-off.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Ultimate Creditor Id
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Ultimate Creditor Id
description: The identification of the ultimate creditor of the euro payment mandate.
notes: This is based on an official identification. In NL, the chamber of commerce.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Ultimate Creditor Name
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Ultimate Creditor Name
description: The name of the ultimate creditor of the euro payment mandate.
notes: The ultimate creditor is the receiver of the funds for the direct debit for which the mandate is applicable. It can be used when different from the accountholder.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Ultimate Creditor Type Code
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Ultimate Creditor Type Code
description: The code that indicates the type of ultimate creditor of the euro payment mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Ultimate Debtor Name
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Ultimate Debtor Name
description: The name of the ultimate debtor of the euro payment mandate.
notes: When this is different from the accountholder.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Ultimate Debtor Party Id
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Ultimate Debtor Party Id
description: The identification of the ultimate debtor party of the euro payment mandate.
notes: When this is an organization.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Ultimate Debtor Party Identification Type Code
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Ultimate Debtor Party Identification Type Code
description: The code that indicates the type of identification of the ultimate debtor party of the euro payment mandate.
notes: When this is an organization.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Ultimate Debtor Party Issuer Id
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Ultimate Debtor Party Issuer Id
description: The issuer identification of the ultimate debtor party of the euro payment mandate.
notes: When this is an organization.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Ultimate Debtor Type Code
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Ultimate Debtor Type Code
description: The code that indicates the type of ultimate debtor of the euro payment mandate.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Validation Reference Number
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Validation Reference Number
description: The reference number that shows the validation of the euro payment mandate.
notes: This is an internal reference number from InternetBanking.

term_name: Euro Payment Mandate Version Number
display_name: Euro Payment Mandate Version Number
description: The version number of the euro payment mandate.
notes: Every time a key field on the mandate is updated the version number is incremented with 1.

term_name: Euro Payment Original Instruction Id
display_name: Euro Payment Original Instruction Id
description: The unique identification of the original payment instruction with euro payments.
notes: This can be a SCT or SDD instruction, but also an instruction releated to earlier R-messages (i.e. a Return).

term_name: Euro Payment Original Transaction Id
display_name: Euro Payment Original Transaction Id
description: The unique identification of the original euro payment transaction.
notes: This can be a SCT or SDD, but also an earlier R-message (i.e. a Return).

term_name: Euro Payment Outgoing Instruction Flag
display_name: Euro Payment Outgoing Instruction Flag
description: Flag indicating if the instruction with euro payments is outgoing.
notes: T=True, F=False

term_name: Euro Payment Receiver Party BIC
display_name: Euro Payment Receiver Party BIC
description: The BIC of the receiving party of the euro payment.

term_name: Euro Payment Reconciliation Id
display_name: Euro Payment Reconciliation Id
description: The unique meaningless identification of the reconciliation record for the euro payments.

term_name: Euro Payment Reconciliation Instruction Id
display_name: Euro Payment Reconciliation Instruction Id
description: The unique identification of the R-transaction for the batch with euro payments.
notes: Like the original instruction, this R-transaction also has a an instruction Id.

term_name: Euro Payment Reconciliation Last Modification Datetime
display_name: Euro Payment Reconciliation Last Modification Datetime
description: Date and time on which the reconciliation record for euro payments was changed for the last time.
notes: Format: yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm:ss

term_name: Euro Payment Reconciliation Last Modification UTC Datetime
display_name: Euro Payment Reconciliation Last Modification UTC Datetime
description: Date and time, expressed in UTC, on which the reconciliation record for euro payments was changed for the last time.
notes: Format: yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm:ss. His attribute is specifically added to the Defined archive in EDL.

term_name: Euro Payment Reconciliation Transaction Id
display_name: Euro Payment Reconciliation Transaction Id
description: The unique identification of the of the R-transaction for the euro payment transaction.
notes: Like the original transaction, the R-transaction also has a transaction Id.

term_name: Euro Payment Reconciliation Type Code
display_name: Euro Payment Reconciliation Type Code
description: Code for the type of reconciliation for euro payments.
notes: The reconciliation type can be for transactions or instructions. The reconciliation type code between Instructions is indicated with Instr-Instr, and between transactions with trn-trn.

term_name: Euro Payment Reconciliation Valid Flag
display_name: Euro Payment Reconciliation Valid Flag
description: Flag that indicates if the reconciliation of the euro payment was valid.
notes: When reconciliation is successful value is 'T' else 'F'.

term_name: Euro Payment Sending Party BIC
display_name: Euro Payment Sending Party BIC
description: The BIC of the sending party of the euro payment.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Additional Recognition Parameter Text
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Additional Recognition Parameter Text
description: Text that contains the additional recognition parameter of the euro payment transaction.
notes: The text contains a series of parameters.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Bank Switch Flag
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Bank Switch Flag
description: A flag indicating if for the euro payment transaction the creditor is using the 'bank switch service' ('overstap service').
notes: T=True, F=False.The creditor has moved from bank to another bank, and therefore the transaction is rerouted to the other bank.

display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Blacklist Creditor Bank Country Code

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Blacklist Creditor Party Agent Bank Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Blacklist Creditor Party Agent Bank Id

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Blacklist Creditor Party Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Blacklist Creditor Party Id

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Blacklist Credit Party Account IBAN
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Blacklist Credit Party Account IBAN

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Blacklist Credit Party Endorse Status Flag
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Blacklist Credit Party Endorse Status Flag

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Blacklist Credit Party Last Modification Datetime
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Blacklist Credit Party Last Modification Datetime

notes: Format: yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm:ss

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Blacklist Credit Party Name
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Blacklist Credit Party Name
description: The name that indicates the credit party on the blacklist of a euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Blacklist Credit Party Record Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Blacklist Credit Party Record Id

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Blacklist Issue Outcome Code
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Blacklist Issue Outcome Code
description: The outcome code of the action that is being taken when an issue meets the criteria of the euro payment transaction on the blacklist.
notes: Processor if this rule is triggered e.g. Reject, Worklist Item.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Blacklist Processing Scheme Code
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Blacklist Processing Scheme Code
description: The code of the scheme that detemines the processing of the euro payment transaction on a blacklist.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Blacklist bank Branch Code
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Blacklist bank Branch Code
description: The code that indicates the bank branch which processes the euro payment transaction on a blacklist.
domain_values: 1600; bank (NL branch), 2100; bank Antwerp branch, 2600; bank Frankfurt branch, 3100; bank London branch
notes: Can be for both debtor and/or creditor party.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Category Purpose Code
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Category Purpose Code
description: Code that specifies the high level purpose of the euro payment transaction, as is published in an external ISO category purpose code list.
notes: See for the complete list the ISO20022 'ExternalCategoryPurpose1Code' list. This code is used by the initiating party to provide information concerning the processing of this transaction and could therefore trigger special processing by any of the agents involved in the payment chain depending of the capabilities of these agents.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Classification Code
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Classification Code
description: The code of the classification of the euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Creditor Account IBAN
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Creditor Account IBAN

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Creditor Account Proxy Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Creditor Account Proxy Id

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Creditor Bank BIC
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Creditor Bank BIC

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Creditor Bank BIC 2

display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Creditor Id

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Debtor R-Transaction Compensation Amount
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Debtor R-Transaction Compensation Amount
description: Compensation amount in euros ordered by the debtor PSP from the creditor PSP for a R-Transaction of a direct debit euro payment transaction.
notes: The Debtor PSP has the right to receive compensation, called the Refund compensation, from the Creditor PSP for the related interest loss incurred by the Debtor PSP in case of a refund.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Delivery Channel Code
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Delivery Channel Code
description: The code of the channel that was used for the delivery of the euro payment transaction.
notes: e.g. EXP, FLP, RTI

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Delivery Channel Customer Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Delivery Channel Customer Id
description: Identification of the customer who has delivered the euro payment transaction, as stored in the delivery channel.
notes: The customer id as represented in the delivery channel from which the transaction is received.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Direct Debit Sequence Type Code
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Direct Debit Sequence Type Code
description: The code gives the type of sequence of the euro payment, in case it is a direct debit transaction.
notes: FRST (first), RCUR (recurrent), FNAL (final), OOFF (one-off). Only used in SDDCore and SDDB2B. Is not (longer) Mandatory.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction End To End Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction End To End Id
description: The identification of the euro payment transaction, assigned by the initiating party, that remains unchanged throughout the entire end-to-end chain.
notes: This identification is passed on, unchanged, throughout the entire end-to-end chain.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Id
description: The unique identification of the euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Incoming Currency Code
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Incoming Currency Code
description: The ISO character 3 code of the currency of the amount of the incoming euro payment transaction.
notes: For SEPA this is always EUR.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Incoming Settlement Amount
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Incoming Settlement Amount
description: The amount in euro that has been settled for an incoming euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Incoming Settlement Date
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Incoming Settlement Date
description: Date in the incoming euro payment transaction that the payment should be settled between the debit and credit party.
notes: Format 'yyyy-mm-dd'

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Initiating Party Address Line1
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Initiating Party Address Line1
description: The first line of text of the address of the initiating party of a euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Initiating Party Address Line2
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Initiating Party Address Line2
description: The second line of text of the address of the initiating party of a euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Initiating Party Address Town Name
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Initiating Party Address Town Name

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Initiating Party Contact Details Name
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Initiating Party Contact Details Name
description: The name of the initiating party contact details of a euro payment transaction.
notes: Name being the full name (first and last name).

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Initiating Party Organisation BIC
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Initiating Party Organisation BIC
description: The organisation Bank Identifier Number (BIC) of the initiating party of a euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Initiating Party Organisation LEI
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Initiating Party Organisation LEI
description: The organisation legal entity identifier (LEI) of the initiating party of a euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Initiating Party Organisation Other Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Initiating Party Organisation Other Id
description: The other organisation identification of the initiating party of a euro payment transaction.
notes: Unspecified ID not being LEI or BIC.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Initiating Party Organisation Other Issuer Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Initiating Party Organisation Other Issuer Id
description: The identification of the other issuer that issued the organisation identification of the initiating party of an euro payment transaction.
notes: Other issuer being e.g. third party organisations, payment intermediaries, or specialized payment services that acts on behalf of another organisation.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Initiating Party Private Other Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Initiating Party Private Other Id
description: The other private identification of the initiating party of a euro payment transaction.
notes: Unspecified ID not being Date and Place of Birth.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Initiating Party Private Other Issuer Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Initiating Party Private Other Issuer Id
description: The identfication of the other issuer which issued the private identification of the initiating party of a euro payment transaction.
notes: Other issuer being third party organisation such as a payment intermediary or specialized payment service, rather than a central authority or the intiating party itself.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Initiating Party Residence Country Code
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Initiating Party Residence Country Code
description: The code that indicates the country of residence of the initiating party of a euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Instructed Amount
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Instructed Amount
description: The amount in euro of the euro payment transaction, that should be moved between the debtor and the creditor, before deduction of charges.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Instructed Transaction Date
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Instructed Transaction Date
description: The date instructed by the initiator of the euro payment transaction as processing date.
notes: Format 'yyyy-mm-dd'

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Instructing Agent BIC
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Instructing Agent BIC
description: The BIC of the instructing agent of the euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Instructing Agent Transaction Reference Number
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Instructing Agent Transaction Reference Number
description: Reference number of the euro payment transaction given by the instructing party.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Instruction Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Instruction Id
description: The unique identification of the batch in which the euro payment transaction has been delivered.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Interchange Format Name
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Interchange Format Name
description: Name of the format of the interchange used to transport the euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Last Modification Datetime
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Last Modification Datetime
description: Date and time on which the euro payment transaction was changed for the last time.
notes: Format: yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm:ss

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Line 2 Unstructured Description
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Line 2 Unstructured Description
description: The second line of free format text that can be added to the euro payment transaction.
notes: The second line can be added for example in case of bankswitch. It is always added by bank.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Linked Canceled Transaction Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Linked Canceled Transaction Id
description: The id of the canceled transaction that is linked to this euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Linked Rejected Transaction Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Linked Rejected Transaction Id
description: The id of the rejected transaction that is linked to this euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Local instrument Code
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Local instument Code
description: The code that indicates the steering (the local instrument) of processing of the euro payment transaction, according to a standard SEPA list.
notes: IDEAL, NLDO, ACCEPT, SDN, NLGOV, CORE, B2B, INST. Based on  ISO20022 'ExternalLocalInstrument1Code' list. Also in Dutch it is often called Local Instrument.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Mandate Adjustment Flag
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Mandate Adjustment Flag
description: A flag indicating if the mandate has been adjusted within the euro payment direct debit transaction.
notes: T=True,F=False

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Mandate Credit Party Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Mandate Credit Party Id
description: The identification of the credit party that has signed the mandate, which has been used for the euro payment direct debit transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Mandate Group Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Mandate Group Id
description: The identification of the group the mandate of the euro payment transaction belongs to, in case it concerns a direct debit transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Mandate Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Mandate Id
description: The identification of the mandate for the euro payment transaction, in case it is a direct debit transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Mandate Reference Name
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Mandate Reference Name
description: The name of the used mandate reference of the euro payment transaction, in case it is a direct debit transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Original End To End Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Original End To End Id
description: The original identification of the euro payment transaction, assigned by the initiating party, that remains unchanged throughout the entire end-to-end chain.
notes: This identification is passed on, unchanged, throughout the entire end-to-end chain.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Original Instructed Date
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Original Instructed Date
description: The date the euro payment transaction should be processed, as originally requested by the initiator.
notes: Format 'yyyy-mm-dd'

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Original Mandate Credit Account IBAN
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Original Mandate Credit Account IBAN
description: The IBAN of the credit account in the original mandate, in case the mandate for this euro payment direct debit transaction has been adjusted.
notes: Only used if Euro Payment Transaction Mandate Adjustment Flag is 'T'.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Original Mandate Debit Account IBAN
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Original Mandate Debit Account IBAN
description: The IBAN of the debit account in the original mandate, in case the mandate for this euro payment direct debit transaction has been adjusted.
notes: Only used if Euro Payment Transaction Mandate Adjustment Flag is 'T'.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Outgoing Transaction Flag
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Outgoing Transaction Flag
description: A flag indicating if the euro payment transaction is an outgoing transaction.
notes: T (true): Outgoing transaction F (false): Incoming transaction

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Pre Settlement Cancellation Flag
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Pre Settlement Cancellation Flag
description: A flag indicating if the euro payment transaction has been cancelled before settlement took place.
notes: T=True, F=False

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Processing Date
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Processing Date
description: The date of the business day on which the euro payment transaction is processed.
notes: Format 'yyyy-mm-dd' if filled. NULL value occurs.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Processing Scheme Code
