display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Processing Scheme Code
description: The code of the scheme that determines the processing of the euro payment transaction.
notes: 'SDDCORE' = SEPA Direct Debit Core, 'SDDB2B' = SEPA Direct Debit Business to Business, 'SCT' = SEPA Credit Transfer

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Proprietary Category Purpose Code
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Proprietary Category Purpose Code
description: Code that specifies the high level purpose of the euro payment transaction with a proprietary code.
notes: The proprietary category purpose code can contain codes outside of the predefined set categories. The meaning is aligned between sender and receiver.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction bank Branch Code
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction bank Branch Code
description: The code of the bank branch involved in the euro payment transaction.
notes: 1600; bank (NL branch), 2100; bank Antwerp branch, 2600; bank Frankfurt branch, 3100; bank London branch)

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction - Flag
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction - Flag
description: A flag indicating if it concerns a euro payment transaction in which both debit and credit account are a bank account.
notes: T (true): Both debit as credit IBAN are bank accounts. F (false): 1 IBAN is of an external party.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Rejected Flag
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Rejected Flag
description: A flag indicating if the euro payment transaction was rejected by the order manager before the processing started.
notes: T=True, F=False

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Reject Reason Description
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Reject Reason Description
description: The description of the reason why the euro payment transaction was rejected.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Reversed Transaction Batch Flag
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Reversed Transaction Batch Flag
description: A flag indicating if the reversed euro payment transaction was part of a batch instruction.
notes: T=True, F=False

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction R-Transaction Charges Amount
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction R-Transaction Charges Amount
description: Charges amount in euros for processsing a R-Transaction euro payment transaction.
notes: The charges amount that banks apply for the processing of euro payment R-Transactions.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction R-Transaction Classification Code
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction R-Transaction Classification Code
description: The code of the classification of the euro payment R-transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction R-Transaction Flag
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction R-Transaction Flag
description: A flag indicating if the euro payment transaction is a R-transaction.
notes: T=True, F=False

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction R-transaction Interbank Settlement Amount
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction R-transaction Interbank Settlement Amount
description: The amount in euro of the euro payment R-transaction that has been settled between the banks.
notes: This amount is equal to the amount of the original booking entry. This amount comes from a XML-field and therefore has a format of 256 characters. It differs from the standard format in a PACS-message. It has a maximum length of 15 positions. It has the dot as decimal separator, and has in total 5 decimals. It does not contain a plus or minus sign (this is dicated by the type of PACS message).

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction R-transaction Interbank Settlement Date
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction R-transaction Interbank Settlement Date
description: Date that the euro payment R-transaction has been settled between the banks.
notes: Format 'yyyy-mm-dd'

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction R-Transaction Level Code
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction R-Transaction Level Code
description: The code indicating the level of rejection of the euro payment R-transaction.
notes: An R-Transaction that is a normal transaction has level 1. An R-Transaction that is another R-Transaction with level n has the level n+1.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction R-Transaction Post Settlement Flag
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction R-Transaction Post Settlement Flag
description: A flag indicating if in case of a R-transaction for a euro payment the transaction was rejected or returned after settlement has occurred.
notes: T=True, F=False

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction R-transaction  Status Code
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction R-transaction  Status Code
description: The SEPA ISO code of the status of processing the euro payment R-transaction, which is used internally by bank in case of problems during the processing of the transaction.
notes: Based on ISO20022 External code sets.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction R-Transaction Refund Flag
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction R-Transaction Refund Flag
description: A flag indicating if the R-transaction of a euro payment is a refund.
notes: T=True, F=False. After an automatic direct debit transaction, the debited party can request for a refund to undo this direct debit transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction R-Transaction Status Code
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction R-Transaction Status Code
description: The code of the status of the euro payment R-transaction.
notes: ISO20022 Codeset 'CancellationReason5Code'.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction R-transaction Status Originator BIC
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction R-transaction Status Originator BIC
description: The BIC of the financial institution that has sent the status of the returned euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Settlement Amount
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Settlement Amount
description: The amount in euro of the euro payment transaction that is settled.
notes: Note that if the incoming settlement amount is not the same as the outgoing settlement amount (due to charges for instance), this attribute contains the latter.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Settlement Currency Code
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Settlement Currency Code
description: The ISO character 3 code of the currency of the amount of the euro payment transaction, that is settled.
notes: For SEPA this is always EUR.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Settlement Date
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Settlement Date
description: Date that the euro payment transaction is settled between the debit and the credit party.
notes: Format 'yyyy-mm-dd'

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Status Code
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Status Code
description: The code of the status of the euro payment transaction.
domain_values: Cancelled, Rejected, Processed, Released, Postponed,Created, Reconciled, Approved, AwaitingApproval, Warehoused, IncomingInterchange, OutgoingInterchangeRejected.
notes: The end status on instruction level are: Cancelled, Rejected and Processed. Other statuses are: Released, Postponed, Created, Reconciled, Approved, AwaitingApproval, Warehoused. IncomingInterchangeRejected, OutgoingInterchangeRejected.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Structured Creditor Remittance Information Reference Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Structured Creditor Remittance Information Reference Id
description: The reference identification in the structured creditor remittance information of a euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Structured Description
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Structured Description
description: The structured description of the euro payment transaction.
notes: Is also called the 'Payment reference'. It is a unique code printed on an invoice. When the invoice is paid, this reference is given to the payment order, so that the creditor can more easy check if the invoice has been paid. The maximum length of the NL reference is 16. De maximum length of the ISO reference is 25 and start with RF. The length of the Belgian reference is 12. Other /own references have a maximum length of 35.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Structured Description Type Code
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Structured Description Type Code
description: Code to indicate the type of structured description used within the euro payment transaction.
notes: For euro payments only the type SCOR is allowed: StructuredCOmmunicationReference.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Structured Description Type Issuer Code
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Structured Description Type Issuer Code
description: Code of the issuer of the type of structured description used within the euro payment transaction.
notes: It is allowed to use CUR (Currence = Netherlands), ISO (European), BBA (Belgium) or other values.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Address Town Name
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Address Town Name
description: Name of the town of the postal address of the ultimate creditor of a euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Contact Details Name
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Contact Details Name
description: The name of the ultimate creditor contact details of a euro payment transaction.
notes: Name being the full name (first and last name).

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Name
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Name
description: The name of the ultimate creditor of the euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Organisation LEI
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Organisation LEI
description: The organisation legal entity identifier (LEI) of the ultimate creditor of a euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Organisation Other Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Organisation Other Id
description: The other organisation identification of the ultimate creditor of a euro payment transaction.
notes: Unspecified ID not being LEI or BIC.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Organisation Other Issuer Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Organisation Other Issuer Id
description: The identification of the other issuer that issued the organisation identification of the ultimate creditor of an euro payment transaction.
notes: Other issuer being e.g. third party organisations, payment intermediaries, or specialized payment services, rather than a central authority, or the creditor themselves.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Organization BIC
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Organization BIC
description: The BIC of the organisation of the ultimate creditor of the europayment transaction.
notes: Not used by bank.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Postal Address Country Code
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Postal Address Country Code
description: The ISO char 2 country code of the country of the postal address of the ultimate creditor within the euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Postal Address Line 1
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Postal Address Line 1
description: The 1st line of the postal address of the ultimate creditor within the euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Postal Address Line 2
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Postal Address Line 2
description: The 2nd line of the postal address of the ultimate creditor within the euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Postal Address Line 3
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Postal Address Line 3
description: The 3rd line of the postal address of the ultimate creditor within the euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Postal Address Line 4
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Postal Address Line 4
description: The 4th line of the postal address of the ultimate creditor within the euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Postal Address Line 5
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Postal Address Line 5
description: The 5th line of the postal address of the ultimate creditor within the euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Postal Address Line 6
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Postal Address Line 6
description: The 6th line of the postal address of the ultimate creditor within the euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Postal Address Line 7
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Postal Address Line 7
description: The 7th line of the postal address of the ultimate creditor within the euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Private Other Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Private Other Id
description: The other private identification of the ultimate creditor of a euro payment transaction.
notes: Unspecified ID not being Date and Place of Birth.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Private Other Issuer Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Private Other Issuer Id
description: The identfication of the other issuer which issued the private identification of the ultimate creditor of a euro payment transaction.
notes: Other issuer being third party organisation such as a payment intermediary or specialized payment service, rather than a central authority or the ultimate creditor itself.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Residential Address Country Code
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Creditor Residential Address Country Code
description: The ISO char 2 country code of the country of the residential address of the ultimate creditor within the euro payment transaction.
notes: If a payment is made to another party, then we call this party the creditor. However, in some cases it can be that this creditor is not the ultimate beneficiary. For example in case of a payment for a debt, and the payment is done to a third party.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Address Town Name
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Address Town Name
description: Name of the town of the postal address of the ultimate debtor of  a euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Contact Details Name
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Contact Details Name
description: The name of the ultimate debtor contact details of a euro payment transaction.
notes: Name being the full name (first and last name).

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Name
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Name
description: The name of the ultimate debtor of the euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Organisation LEI
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Organisation LEI
description: The organisation legal entity identifier (LEI) of the ultimate debtor of a euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Organisation Other Issuer Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Organisation Other Issuer Id
description: The identification of the other issuer that issued the organisation identification of the ultimate debtor of an euro payment transaction.
notes: Other issuer being e.g. third party organisations, payment intermediaries, or specialized payment services, rather than a central authority.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Organization BIC
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Organization BIC
description: The BIC of the organisation of the ultimate debtor of the europayment transaction.
notes: Not used by bank.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Organization Other Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Organization Other Id
description: The other organisation identification of the ultimate debtor of a euro payment transaction.
notes: Unspecified ID not being LEI or BIC.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Postal Address Country Code
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Postal Address Country Code
description: The ISO char 2 country code of the country of the postal address of the ultimate debtor within the euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Postal Address Line 1
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Postal Address Line 1
description: The 1st line of the postal address of the ultimate debtor within the euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Postal Address Line 2
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Postal Address Line 2
description: The 2nd line of the postal address of the ultimate debtor within the euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Postal Address Line 3
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Postal Address Line 3
description: The 3rd line of the postal address of the ultimate debtor within the euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Postal Address Line 4
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Postal Address Line 4
description: The 4th line of the postal address of the ultimate debtor within the euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Postal Address Line 5
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Postal Address Line 5
description: The 5th line of the postal address of the ultimate debtor within the euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Postal Address Line 6
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Postal Address Line 6
description: The 6th line of the postal address of the ultimate debtor within the euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Postal Address Line 7
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Postal Address Line 7
description: The 7th line of the postal address of the ultimate debtor within the euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Private Other Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Private Other Id
description: The other private identification of the ultimate debtor of a euro payment transaction.
notes: Unspecified ID not being Date of Birth or BIC.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Private Other Issuer Id
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Private Other Issuer Id
description: The identfication of the other issuer which issued the private identification of the ultimate debtor of a euro payment transaction.
notes: Other issuer being third party organisation such as a payment intermediary or specialized payment service, rather than a central authority.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Residential Address Country Code
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Ultimate Debtor Residential Address Country Code
description: The ISO char 2 country code of the country of the residential address of the ultimate debtor within the euro payment transaction.

term_name: Euro Payment Transaction Unstructured Description
display_name: Euro Payment Transaction Unstructured Description
description: The free format text that is given by the initiating party to the euro payment transaction.
notes: This free text can be extended with information about the processing by the initiating bank and by bank. For normal euro paymetns, maximal 140 positions can be read. For urgent domestic payments, a maximum of 96 positions applies. For world payments, multibank payments and urgent payments, a maximum of 98 positions applies.

term_name: FATF Not Allowed Party Name
display_name: FATF Not Allowed Party Name
description: The name of an initiating or receiving party that is not allowed according to FATF.
notes: Example: the name Mickey Mouse is not allowed.

term_name: General Ledger Financial Entity Bank Code
display_name: General Ledger Financial Entity Bank Code
description: The number of the office to which the financial entity belongs in the General Ledger.
notes: Only for local banks, the office number is same as the financial entity

term_name: General Ledger Financial Entity Code
display_name: General Ledger Financial Entity Code
description: The code in the General ledger under which the bookings concerning the Account agreement is reported
notes: Financial entity is the booking Entity where the contract is held and posted in the General Ledger and reported. It is possible that the contract is (commercially) owned by a different Entity (called off-shore books). Standard GFS functionality is that it can process Multi Legal Entities. A standard Financial entity in GFS is a Reporting entity.

term_name: General Ledger Financial Entity Operating Unit Description
display_name: General Ledger Financial Entity Operating Unit Description
description: The description indicating the portfolio, defined by the Financial Entity and underlying Operating Unit in the General Ledger.
domain_values: General Ledger Operating Unit Code (Finance is owner)

term_name: General Ledger Operating Unit Code
display_name: General Ledger Operating Unit Code
description: The code in the General ledger under which the Account agreement related Profit-loss is managed.
domain_values: General Ledger Operating Unit Code (Finance is owner)
notes: An Operating Unit is a single commercial area, within Business Unit at the lowest level or physical (incl. back-office) unit within an office. Operating Unit is the level to post the journal (aka booking) entries. The Glossaries provide therefore only journal lines at OU level (= lowest level). Therefore at Operating Unit level a closed balance sheet & profit & loss is present. Operating Units manage own cash accounts with Central Cash Management Operating Unit GT700000 in the same Financial entity.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Bank Debit Account Id
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Bank Debit Account Id
description: Identification of the debit account of a bank on which the funds are booked in case of an incoming cross border payment order.
notes: For a loro account an IBAN and for a nostro account an IBAN or a G-tag (as administrated in the nostro account administration).

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Bank To Bank Information Text
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Bank To Bank Information Text
description: Information for bank received in the incoming cross border payment order Swift message
notes: Field 72 Swift message

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Charges Bearer Code
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Charges Bearer Code
description: The ISO code which indicates the party which bears the charges for the transaction of an incoming cross border payment order.
notes: CRED means all transaction charges are to be borne by the beneficiary customer (=BEN in field 71A Swift message). SHAR means shared charges. Orderning customer pays the charges of his own bank, beneficairy pays charges of his own bank (=SHA in field 71A Swift message). Value DEBT means all charges getting paid by ordening party (both charges own bank as charges beneficiary bank)(=OUR in field 71A Swift message).

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Charges Received Currency Amount
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Charges Received Currency Amount
description: Amount denominated in the currency of the amount which bank has received from the sending bank for an incoming cross border payment order.
notes: Currency of the amount which the sending bank has paid in the MT103 (field 71G) Concerns charges OUR.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Charges Received Currency Code
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Charges Received Currency Code
description: The code base on the ISO Standard (4217 (3 characters) of the currency of the amount which bank has received from the sending bank for an incoming cross border transaction.
notes: Currency of the amount which the sending bank has paid in the MT103 (field 71G) Concerns charges OUR.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Credit Exchange Rate
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Credit Exchange Rate
description: Exchange rate which is used to determine the credit amount (based on the amount in other currency) in case of an incoming cross border payment order.
notes: Needed when currency of the credit account differs from the currency of the transaction. Example: Currency of transation is USD and curreny of account is EUR. Rate can be: 1 EUR = 1,23453 USD.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Creditor Account Number
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Creditor Account Number
description: Account number of the creditor (end customer) of an incoming cross border payment order.
notes: Can be IBAN (Inter Bank Account Number) or BBAN (Basis Bank Account Number).

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Creditor Agent BIC
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Creditor Agent BIC
description: Bank Identifier Code (BIC) of the bank of the final creditor (beneficiary) in case of an incoming cross border payment order.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Debit Account Booked Currency Amount
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Debit Account Booked Currency Amount
description: Amount which is settled between banks and is booked on the debit account (always a loro- or nostro account) for an incoming cross border payment quoted in the currency of the debit account number.
notes: The currency of the payment order can be found in Currency Code.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Debit Account Currency Code
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Debit Account Currency Code
description: The ISO Standard 4217 (3 characters) code that identifies the currency of the amount which is booked on the debit account in case of an incoming cross border payment order.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Debit Exchange Rate
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Debit Exchange Rate
description: Exchange rate which is used to determine the debit amount (based on the amount in other currency) in case of an incoming cross border payment order.
notes: Needed when currency of the debit account differs from the currency of the transaction. Example: Currency of transation is USD and curreny of account is EUR. Rate can be: 1 EUR = 1,23453 USD.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Debtor Account Number
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Debtor Account Number
description: Debtor (ordering customer) account number of an incoming cross border payment.
notes: This means the account number as received in Swift message field 50A or 50K. Can be IBAN (Inter Bank Account Number) or BBAN (Beneficiairy Bank Account Number).

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Debtor Agent BIC
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Debtor Agent BIC
description: Bank Identifier Code (BIC) of the bank of the debtor (ordering customer) as delivered by the sending party (in an incoming Swift message) in case of an incoming cross border payment order.
notes: Field 52 of a Swift Message

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Debtor Agent Name
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Debtor Agent Name
description: Name of the bank of the debtor (ordering customer) as delivered by the sending party (in an incoming Swift message) in case of an incoming cross border payment order.
notes: Field 52 of a Swift Message

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Debtor Country Code
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Debtor Country Code
description: ISO alpha-2 country code of the debtor (ordering customer) for an incoming cross border payment order.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Debtor End-To-End Id
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Debtor End-To-End Id
description: Unique identification for an incoming cross border payment order and delivered by the ordering customer which is available during the whole payments process chain between ordering customer and final beneficiary customer.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Debtor Name
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Debtor Name
description: Name of the debtor (ordering customer) for an incoming cross border payment order.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Debtor Postal Code Town Name
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Debtor Postal Code Town Name
description: Postal code and town of the debtor (ordering customer) for an incoming cross border payment order.
domain_values: No domain values required for 'Postal Code'.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Debtor Street Address Line
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Debtor Street Address Line
description: Address (street and number) of the debtor (ordering customer) for an incoming cross border payment order.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Intermediary Agent BIC
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Intermediary Agent BIC
description: Bank Identifier Code (BIC) of an intermediary agent in incoming cross border payment order determined in the payment engine.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Invoice Reference Id
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Invoice Reference Id
description: Reference of the invoice sent by the payment engine to the sending bank for an incoming cross border payment order (with charges OUR).
notes: The invoice is sent by means of a SWIFT 191 message. The reference is stated in field 20 of the outgoing MT191.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Non STP Reason Code
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Non STP Reason Code
description: Code which identifies the reason why an incoming cross border payment order isn't classified as STP.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Original Creditor Account Number
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Original Creditor Account Number
description: Account number as received in incoming Swift message of the creditor (end customer) of an incoming cross border payment order.
notes: Can be IBAN (Inter Bank Account Number) orBBAN (Basis Bank Account Number).

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Original Currency Amount
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Original Currency Amount
description: Amount denominated in the currency of the transfer of an incoming cross border payment order.
notes: Amount received by bank as stated in field 33B of an incoming SWIFT message. The currency of the payment order can be found in Currency Code.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Original Currency Code
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Original Currency Code
description: The code based on the ISO Standard 4217 (3 characters) of the currency of an incoming cross border payment order initiated by the debtor of an incoming payment order.
notes: The instructed currency of the amount stated in field 33B of an incoming SWIFT message.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order bank Rejection Reason Code
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order bank Rejection Reason Code
description: ISO code of the reason of rejecting the original incoming cross border payment order by bank
notes: for external code set names: see ISO20022 Codeset 'ExternalPaymentTransactionStatus1Code', 'ExternalReturnReason1Code', 'ExternalStatusReason1Code'.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order bank Return Reason Code
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order bank Return Reason Code
description: ISO code of the reason of returning the original incoming cross border payment order by bank
notes: for external code set names: see ISO20022 Codeset 'ExternalPaymentTransactionStatus1Code', 'ExternalReturnReason1Code', 'ExternalStatusReason1Code'.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Receiver Correspondent Bank BIC
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Receiver Correspondent Bank BIC
description: Bank Identifier Code (BIC) of the receiver's correspondent of the receiver of the message as delivered by the sending party in case of an incoming cross border payment order.
notes: Field 54 of a Swift Message

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Receiver Correspondent Bank Name
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Receiver Correspondent Bank Name
description: Name of the receiver's correspondent of the cross border payment order as delivered by the sending party in case of an outgoing cross border payment order.
notes: Field 54 of a Swift Message

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Reference Id
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Reference Id
description: Unique identification created by the payment engine for an incoming cross border payment order.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Related Reference Id
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Related Reference Id
description: Related reference in field 21 of an incoming MT 202 (COV) Swift message with is related to another related message.
notes: Related reference in field 21 of an incoming MT 202 (COV) Swift message with is related to another related message.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Remittance Information Text
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Remittance Information Text
description: Information from ordering customer to beneficiary in case of an incoming cross border payment order.
notes: Swift message field 70. This attribute specifies either the details of the individual transaction or a reference to another message containing the details which are to be transmitted to the beneficiary customer.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sender Correspondent Bank BIC
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sender Correspondent Bank BIC
description: Bank Identifier Code (BIC) of the sender's correspondent of the cross border payment order as delivered by the sending party in case of an incoming cross border payment order.
notes: Field 53 of a Swift Message

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sender Correspondent Bank Name
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sender Correspondent Bank Name
description: Name of the sender's correspondent of the cross border payment order as delivered by the sending party in case of an incoming cross border payment order.
notes: Field 53 of a Swift Message

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sender Fee Currency Amount
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sender Fee Currency Amount
description: Amount denominated in s specific currency which a sending bank has to pay for an incoming cross border transaction.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sender Fee Currency Code
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sender Fee Currency Code
description: The code based on the ISO Standard 4217 (3 characters) of the currency of the amount which a sending bank has to pay for an incoming cross border transaction.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sender First Charges Currency Amount
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sender First Charges Currency Amount
description: The amount expressed in a specific currency of the transaction charges of an incoming cross border payment, deducted from the original ordered amount by previous (sending) bank in the transaction chain. Concerns first deducted charges (charges BEN or SHA in case of an intermediary agent) .
notes: Part of field 71F of an incoming Swift message.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sender First Charges Currency Code
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sender First Charges Currency Code
description: The ISO Standard 4217 (3 characters) code that identifies the currency of the transaction charges of an incoming cross border payment, deducted by previous (sending) bank(s) in the transaction chain. Concerns first deducted charges (charges BEN or SHA in cases of an intermediary agent).
notes: Part of field 71F of an incoming Swift message.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sender Invoiced Currency Code
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sender Invoiced Currency Code
description: The code based on the ISO Standard 4217 (3 characters) of the currency of the amount which bank has invoiced for an incoming cross border payment order.
notes: Invoiced in GPP via MT191

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sender Second Charges Currency Amount
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sender Second Charges Currency Amount
description: The amount expressed in a specific currency of the transaction charges of an incoming cross border payment, deducted from the original ordered amount by previous (sending) bank in the transaction chain. Concerns second deducted charges (charges BEN or SHA in case of an intermediary agent) .
notes: Part of field 71F of an incoming Swift message.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sender Second Charges Currency Code
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sender Second Charges Currency Code
description: The ISO Standard 4217 (3 characters) code that identifies the currency of the transaction charges of an incoming cross border payment, deducted by previous (sending) bank(s) in the transaction chain. Concerns second deducted charges (charges BEN or SHA in cases of an intermediary agent).
notes: Part of field 71F of an incoming Swift message.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sender Third Charges Currency Amount
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sender Third Charges Currency Amount
description: The amount expressed in a specific currency of the transaction charges of an incoming cross border payment, deducted from the original ordered amount by previous (sending) bank in the transaction chain. Concerns third deducted charges (charges BEN or SHA in case of an intermediary agent) .
notes: Part of field 71F of an incoming Swift message.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sender Third Charges Currency Code
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sender Third Charges Currency Code
description: The ISO Standard 4217 (3 characters) code that identifies the currency of the transaction charges of an incoming cross border payment, deducted by previous (sending) bank(s) in the transaction chain. Concerns third deducted charges (charges BEN or SHA in cases of an intermediary agent).
notes: Part of field 71F of an incoming Swift message.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sending Bank Invoiced Currency Amount
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sending Bank Invoiced Currency Amount
description: Amount denominated in the currency of the amount which bank has invoiced for an incoming cross border payment order.
notes: Invoiced in GPP via MT191

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sending Bank Invoice Flag
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Sending Bank Invoice Flag
description: Flag which indicates if the payment engine has sent an invoice (MT191) for this incoming cross border payment order or not.
notes: Value 'true' means MT191 is sent by the payment engine Value 'false' means MT191 is not sent by the payment engine

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Submitting Bank Reference Id
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Submitting Bank Reference Id
description: Reference created by Submitting Bank for an incoming cross border payment order
notes: Field 20 incoming Swift message.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Swift Message Type Code
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Order Swift Message Type Code
description: Type of Swift message on which the incoming cross border payment order is processed.
notes: E.g. SWIFT_103, SWIFT_202 etc.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Receiver Charges Currency Amount
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Receiver Charges Currency Amount
description: The amount expressed in a specific currency of the transaction charges due to the receiver (bank) for an incoming cross border payment order paid by ordering bank (charges OUR) and received in the interbank settlement amount.
notes: Part of field 71G of an incoming Swift message. This identifies the amount of charges due, which have been prepaid and included in the received interbank settlement amount.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Receiver Charges Currency Code
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Receiver Charges Currency Code
description: The ISO Standard 4217 (3 characters) code that identifies the currency of the transaction charges due to the receiver (bank) for an incoming cross border payment order paid by ordering bank (charges OUR).
notes: Part of field 71G of an incoming Swift message. This identifies the currency of charges due, which have been prepaid and included in the received interbank settlement amount.

term_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Swift Message Text
display_name: Incoming Cross Border Payment Swift Message Text
description: The text of the complete SWIFT message which bank receives from other bank for an incoming cross border payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Amount
display_name: Instant Payment Order Amount
description: Amount of money moved between the instructing agent and the instructed agent for an Instant Payment order. Expressed in Euro's.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Bank Switch Flag
display_name: Instant Payment Order Bank Switch Flag
description: Flag to indicate whether the credit account was in the bankswitch when the Instant Payment Order was executed.
notes: Y - Yes,N - No.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Category Purpose Code
display_name: Instant Payment Order Category Purpose Code
description: Code that specifies the high level purpose of the transaction of an Instant Payment Order, as is published in an external category purpose code list (See ISO20022 ExternalCodeList, tab 4-CategoryPurpose, for the complete list).
notes: This code is used by the initiating party to provide information concerning the processing of this transaction and could therefore trigger special processing by any of the agents involved in the payment chain depending of the capabilities of these agents. Most used codes are SALA, GOVT, LOAN. See for the complete list ISO20022 'ExternalCategoryPurpose1Code' list.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Clearing Channel Code
display_name: Instant Payment Order Clearing Channel Code
description: Code of the clearing channel to be used to process the payment instruction of an Instant Payment Order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Confirmation Datetime
display_name: Instant Payment Order Confirmation Datetime
description: Date and time of the reception of the confirmation of the Instant Payment Order by bank. Expressed in UTC time zone (UTC+0.00).
notes: bank initiates the payment, and gets the confirmation from the other bank or bank received a payment, authorized it, sends Ok to CSM. After that bank receives the final confirmation from Equens

term_name: Instant Payment Order Credit Booking Id
display_name: Instant Payment Order Credit Booking Id
description: Unique identification assigned by bank of the credit booking for an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Account IBAN
display_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Account IBAN
description: IBAN of the account of the creditor (beneficiary customer) of an Instant Payment order.
notes: No monitoring. Direct data exchange between UPF ('FOT,1,2,3' messages) and Sanction application.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Account Proxy Id
display_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Account Proxy Id
description: The proxy/alias indentification of the account of the creditor of the instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Address Line1
display_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Address Line1
description: Information that locates and identifies a specific address of the debtor, as defined by postal services, presented in free format text.
notes: First line filled with address data, mostly streetname and house number. Only filled when explicitly mentioned in the payment transaction.;No monitoring. Direct data exchange between UPF ('FOT,1,2,3' messages) and Sanction application.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Address Line2
display_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Address Line2
description: Information that locates and identifies a specific address of the debtor, as defined by postal services, presented in free format text.
notes: Second line filled with address data, mostly zipcode and place of residence. Only filled when explicitly mentioned in the payment transaction.;No monitoring. Direct data exchange between UPF ('FOT,1,2,3' messages) and Sanction application.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor BIC
display_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor BIC
description: BIC of the creditor account (beneficiary customer) for an Instant Payment Order
notes: No monitoring. Direct data exchange between UPF ('FOT,1,2,3' messages) and Sanction application.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Country Code
display_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Country Code
description: ISO alpha-2 country code of the address of the creditor (beneficiary customer) of an Instant Payment.
notes: No monitoring. Direct data exchange between UPF ('FOT,1,2,3' messages) and Sanction application.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Name
display_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Name
description: Name by which the creditor party is known and which is usually used to identify that party.
notes: No monitoring. Direct data exchange between UPF ('FOT,1,2,3' messages) and Sanction application.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Organisation Identification BIC
display_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Organisation Identification BIC
description: The organisation identification BIC of the creditor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Organisation Identification Issuer Name
display_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Organisation Identification Issuer Name
description: The name of the entity that issued the organisation identification of the creditor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Organisation Identification LEI
display_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Organisation Identification LEI
description: The legal entity identifier (LEI) organisation identification of the creditor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Organisation Other Id
display_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Organisation Other Id
description: The other organisation identification of the creditor of an instant payment order.
notes: Unspecified ID not being LEI or BIC.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Private Identification Issuer Name
display_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Private Identification Issuer Name
description: The name of the entity that issued the private identification of the creditor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Private Other Id
display_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Private Other Id
description: The other private identification of the creditor of an instant payment order.
notes: Unspecified ID not being Date and Place of Birth.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Town Name
display_name: Instant Payment Order Creditor Town Name
description: Name of the town of the postal address of the creditor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Cycle Number
display_name: Instant Payment Order Cycle Number
description: Settlement cycle sequence number where multiple transactions are performed by the CSM
notes: Instant payments is reported 24 times per day. Per settlement Cycle a Cycle number is assigned

term_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Account Currency Code
display_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Account Currency Code
description: The code based on the ISO Standard 4217 (3 characters) that identifies the currency of the debit account number of the ordering customer (the debtor) for an outgoing cross border payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Account IBAN
display_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Account IBAN
description: IBAN of the account of the debtor (ordering customer) for an Instant Payment order.
notes: No monitoring. Direct data exchange between UPF ('FOT,1,2,3' messages) and Sanction application.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Account Proxy Id
display_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Account Proxy Id
description: The proxy/alias identification of the account of the debtor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Address Line1
display_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Address Line1
description: Information that locates and identifies a specific address of the debtor, as defined by postal services, presented in free format text.
notes: First line filled with address data, mostly streetname and house number. Only filled when explicitly mentioned in the payment transaction.;No monitoring. Direct data exchange between UPF ('FOT,1,2,3' messages) and Sanction application.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Address Line2
display_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Address Line2
description: Information that locates and identifies a specific address of the debtor, as defined by postal services, presented in free format text.
notes: Second line filled with address data, mostly zipcode and place of residence. Only filled when explicitly mentioned in the payment transaction.;No monitoring. Direct data exchange between UPF ('FOT,1,2,3' messages) and Sanction application.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor BIC
display_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor BIC
description: BIC of the debtor account (initiating customer) of an Instant Payment Order
notes: No monitoring. Direct data exchange between UPF ('FOT,1,2,3' messages) and Sanction application.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Country Code
display_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Country Code
description: ISO alpha-2 country code of the address of the debtor (ordering customer) for an Instant Payment order.
notes: Only filled when explicitly mentioned in the payment transaction.;No monitoring. Direct data exchange between UPF ('FOT,1,2,3' messages) and Sanction application.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Name
display_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Name
description: Name of the debtor (ordering customer) for an Instant Payment order.
notes: No monitoring. Direct data exchange between UPF ('FOT,1,2,3' messages) and Sanction application.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Organisation Identification BIC
display_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Organisation Identification BIC
description: The organisation identification BIC of the debtor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Organisation Identification Issuer Name
display_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Organisation Identification Issuer Name
description: The name of the entity that issued the organisation identification of the debtor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Organisation Identification LEI
display_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Organisation Identification LEI
description: The legal entity identifier (LEI) organisation identification of the debtor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Organisation Other Id
display_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Organisation Other Id
description: The other organisation identification of the originator of an instant payment order.
notes: Unspecified ID not being LEI or BIC.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Private Identification Issuer Name
display_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Private Identification Issuer Name
description: The name of the entity that issued the private identification of the debtor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Private Other Id
display_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Private Other Id
description: The other private identification of the originator of an instant payment order.
notes: Unspecified ID not being Date and Place of Birth.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Town Name
display_name: Instant Payment Order Debtor Town Name
description: Name of the town of the postal address of the debtor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Description Line1
display_name: Instant Payment Order Description Line1
description: First description line of the Instant Payments Order which is provided by the customer. This will be visible on the account statement
notes: No monitoring. Direct data exchange between UPF ('FOT,1,2,3' messages) and Sanction application.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Description Line2
display_name: Instant Payment Order Description Line2
description: Second description line of the Instant Payments Order which is provided by the customer. This will be visible on the account statement
notes: No monitoring. Direct data exchange between UPF ('FOT,1,2,3' messages) and Sanction application.

term_name: Instant Payment Order End To End Id
display_name: Instant Payment Order End To End Id
description: Unique identification, as assigned by the original initiating party, to unambiguously identify the original transaction
notes: No monitoring. Direct data exchange between UPF ('FOT,1,2,3' messages) and Sanction application. This identification is passed on, unchanged, throughout the entire end-to-end chain.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Final Status Code
display_name: Instant Payment Order Final Status Code
description: Code of the final status of an Instant Payment Order.
notes: ACTC = Accepted (Normaal verwerkt),RJCT = Reject. Pending is not a final status and shall not be included in the dataset.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Fraud Action Code
display_name: Instant Payment Order Fraud Action Code
description: Code that indicates how a fraud alert of an Instant Payment Order is processed.
notes: Ignore:IFRM

term_name: Instant Payment Order Fraud Alert Flag
display_name: Instant Payment Order Fraud Alert Flag
description: Flag to indicate whether the Instant Payment transaction was fraud suspicious or not.
notes: T=True

term_name: Instant Payment Order Fraud Indication Marker Code
display_name: Instant Payment Order Fraud Indication Marker Code
description: Code corresponding with the Fraud Indication Marker which is received from the Fraud System or send by the other bank together with the Instant Payment Order
notes: Position 1 This position is used to indicate the probability of the fraud and can only contain one of the following values: 1-3

term_name: Instant Payment Order Fraud Resolution Code
display_name: Instant Payment Order Fraud Resolution Code
description: Code that gives the final resolution of a fraud suspected transaction.
notes: Stop: Instant Payment order will not be processed. A booking is made to the frozen assets account. Go or Timeout: Instant Payment Order will be processed.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Fraud Timeout Flag
display_name: Instant Payment Order Fraud Timeout Flag
description: Flag to indicate whether the check on fraud of the Instant Payment by Riskshield resulted in a timeout.
notes: True (T): There was a timeout / False (F): No timeout. An Instant Payment Order will be processed when a the fraud check is not executed fast enough, and a timeout occurs.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Information Id
display_name: Instant Payment Order Information Id
description: Unique identification, as assigned by a sending party, to unambiguously identify the payment Information group within the message for an Instant Payment Order.
notes: An ISO20022 message has three levels of information, each level has its own identification. Level 1: Message/Group level Level 2: Payment Information Group Level 3: Payment Information/Transaction

term_name: Instant Payment Order Initiating Bank Name
display_name: Instant Payment Order Initiating Bank Name
description: Name of the bank of the initiating party in an Instant Payment Order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Initiation Datetime
display_name: Instant Payment Order Initiation Datetime
description: Date and time at which the payment was initiated by the initiating customer. Expressed in UTC time zone (UTC+0.00).

term_name: Instant Payment Order Instructed Agent BIC
display_name: Instant Payment Order Instructed Agent BIC
description: The BIC of the instructed agent of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Instructing Agent BIC
display_name: Instant Payment Order Instructing Agent BIC
description: The BIC of the instructing agent of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Instruction Priority Code
display_name: Instant Payment Order Instruction Priority Code
description: Code of the urgency or order of importance that the instructing party would like the Instructed party to apply to the processing of the instruction of an Instant Payment Order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Interbank Acceptance Datetime
display_name: Instant Payment Order Interbank Acceptance Datetime
description: Date and time when the payment order from the initiating party meets the processing conditions of the account servicing agent. Expressed in UTC time zone (UTC+0.00).
notes: This means that the account servicing agent has received the payment order and has applied checks such as authorisation, availability of funds.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Interbank Settlement Date
display_name: Instant Payment Order Interbank Settlement Date
description: Date on which the amount of money ceases to be available to the debtor bank that owes it and when the amount of money becomes available to the creditor bank to which it is due.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Internal Reject Reason Code
display_name: Instant Payment Order Internal Reject Reason Code
description: Account administration code identifying the detailed reason for a rejection (reason-result-code) of an Instant Payment Order, for internal use within bank.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Internal Reject Reason Group Code
display_name: Instant Payment Order Internal Reject Reason Group Code
description: Account administration code identifying the common reason for a rejection (reason-result-code) of an Instant Payment Order, for internal use within bank.
domain_values: ACCOUNT-AGREEMENT-ERROR, ACCOUNT/FACILITY-BLOCKED, INCORRECT-STATUS, INSUFFICIENT-BAL-ACCOUNT, INSUFFICIENT-BAL-FACILITY, OTHER, PENDING-CLOSURE, PROHIBITION, UNALLOWED BALANCE, UNALLOWED-BALANCE, UNKNOWN-ACCOUNT

term_name: Instant Payment Order Local Instrument Code
display_name: Instant Payment Order Local Instrument Code
description: Code that specifies a user community specific payment instrument for an Instant Payment Order as published in an external local instrument code list
notes: Based on ISO20022 'ExternalLocalInstrument1Code' list. Currently used within SEPA transactions. For Instant Payments codes INSTNT01, INSTTC01 and INST are used.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Order Manager Processing Action Code
display_name: Instant Payment Order Order Manager Processing Action Code
description: A code that indicates the processing action requested by the order manager of an instant payment order.
notes: The order manager can request the payment engine to apply specific processing actions for different payment processing flows.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Payment Engine Receiving Channel Id
display_name: Instant Payment Order Payment Engine Receiving Channel Id
description: The identification of the receiving channel of the payment engine of an instant payment order.
notes: Internal Payment Engine channel ID on which the payment was received. This could be a channel on which the order managers deliver payments or of the CSM delivering payments to the payment engine.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Payment Method Code
display_name: Instant Payment Order Payment Method Code
description: Code that specifies the means of payment that will be used to move the amount of money in the Instant Payment.
notes: Payment method can be credittransfer, TransferAdvice, etc. For Instant Payments TRF (CreditTransfer) is used.

term_name: Instant Payment Order bank Batch Id
display_name: Instant Payment Order bank Batch Id
description: Unique identification (Batch-ID), as assigned by the bank, to unambiguously identify a batch with Payment Orders. The identification is for bank internal (traceability) use only, and may therefore not be used in customer reporting.

term_name: Instant Payment Order bank Booking Id
display_name: Instant Payment Order bank Booking Id
description: Unique booking reference as assigned by bank to identify the booking of an Instant Payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order bank Delivery Channel Id
display_name: Instant Payment Order bank Delivery Channel Id
description: The identification of the channel though which the outgoing Instant payment order is delivered to bank

term_name: Instant Payment Order bank File Id
display_name: Instant Payment Order bank File Id
description: Unique identification (file-id), as assigned by the bank, to unambiguously identify a file with Payment Orders. The identification is for bank internal (traceability) use only, and may therefore not be used in customer reporting.

term_name: Instant Payment Order bank Transaction Id
display_name: Instant Payment Order bank Transaction Id
description: By bank assigned identification of an Instant Payment Order for tracebility purposes.
notes: This identification will always be assigned by bank and will be the unique reference for Controlability purposes ('Controleerbaarheid'). For Outbound not-on-us transactions this Data element has the same value as Instant Payment OrderTransaction Identification.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Rejecting Bank BIC
display_name: Instant Payment Order Rejecting Bank BIC
description: BIC of the party that rejected the Instant Payment

term_name: Instant Payment Order Reject Reason Code
display_name: Instant Payment Order Reject Reason Code
description: An ISO20022 code of the reason of rejection of an Instant Payment Order.
notes: ISO20022 Codeset 'CancellationReason5Code'.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Requested Execution Date
display_name: Instant Payment Order Requested Execution Date
description: Date at which the Instant Payment instruction must be executed.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Result Code
display_name: Instant Payment Order Result Code
description: Result code of the instant payment order, received from the Account administration or Payment Engine
notes: 001 Request Successfully processed, 002 Request Rejected, 003 Request Postponed, 008 Image request ,900 Technical error

term_name: Instant Payment Order Sanction Alert Flag
display_name: Instant Payment Order Sanction Alert Flag
description: Flag that indicates whether the Instant Payment was suspicious for Sanction or not.
notes: T=True

term_name: Instant Payment Order Sanction Resolution Code
display_name: Instant Payment Order Sanction Resolution Code
description: Code that gives the final resolution of a sanction suspected transaction.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Service Level Code
display_name: Instant Payment Order Service Level Code
description: Code of a pre-agreed level of service between the parties for an Instant Payment Order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Settlement Account IBAN
display_name: Instant Payment Order Settlement Account IBAN
description: The account IBAN of the settlement account of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Standing Order Flag
display_name: Instant Payment Order Standing Order Flag
description: Indicator if the instant payment order is initiated as standing order.
notes: Is only applicable in case the payment order is initiated by a bank customer.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Structured Creditor Remittance Information Reference Id
display_name: Instant Payment Order Structured Creditor Remittance Information Reference Id
description: The reference identification in the structured creditor remittance information of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Structured Creditor Remittance Information Reference Issuer Name
display_name: Instant Payment Order Structured Creditor Remittance Information Reference Issuer Name
description: The name of the issuer in the reference of the structured creditor remittance information of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Transaction Id
display_name: Instant Payment Order Transaction Id
description: Unique identification, as assigned by the first instructing agent, to unambiguously identify the transaction that is passed on, unchanged, throughout the entire interbank chain, for an Instant Payment Order.
notes: The transaction identification can be used for reconciliation, tracking or to link tasks relating to the transaction on the interbank level.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Creditor Address Line1
display_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Creditor Address Line1
description: The first line of text of the address of the ultimate creditor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Creditor Address Line2
display_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Creditor Address Line2
description: The second line of text of the address of the ultimate creditor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Creditor Address Town Name
display_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Creditor Address Town Name
description: Name of the town of the postal address of the ultimate creditor of of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Creditor Country Code
display_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Creditor Country Code
description: ISO alpha-2 country code of the address of the creditor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Creditor Name
display_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Creditor Name
description: The name of the ultimate creditor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Creditor Organisation Identification BIC
display_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Creditor Organisation Identification BIC
description: The organisation identification BIC of the ultimate creditor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Creditor Organisation Identification Issuer Name
display_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Creditor Organisation Identification Issuer Name
description: The name of the entity that issued the organisation identification of the ultimate creditor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Creditor Organisation Identification LEI
display_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Creditor Organisation Identification LEI
description: The legal entity identifier (LEI) organisation identification of the ultimate creditor of an Instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Creditor Organisation Other Id
display_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Creditor Organisation Other Id
description: The other organisation identification of the ultimate creditor of an instant payment order.
notes: Unspecified ID not being LEI or BIC.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Creditor Private Identification Issuer Name
display_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Creditor Private Identification Issuer Name
description: The name of the entity that issued the private identification of the ultimate creditor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Creditor Private Other Id
display_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Creditor Private Other Id
description: The other private identification of the ultimate creditor of an instant payment order.
notes: Unspecified ID not being Date and Place of Birth.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Debtor Address Line1
display_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Debtor Address Line1
description: The first line of text of the address of the ultimate creditor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Debtor Address Line2
display_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Debtor Address Line2
description: The second line of text of the address of the ultimate creditor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Debtor Address Town Name
display_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Debtor Address Town Name
description: Name of the town of the postal address of the ultimate debtor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Debtor Country Code
display_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Debtor Country Code
description: ISO alpha-2 country code of the address of the ultimate debtor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Debtor Name
display_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Debtor Name
description: The name of the ultimate debtor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Debtor Organisation Identification BIC
display_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Debtor Organisation Identification BIC
description: The organisation identification BIC of the ultimate debtor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Debtor Organisation Identification Issuer Name
display_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Debtor Organisation Identification Issuer Name
description: The name of the entity that issued the organisation identification of the ultimate debtor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Debtor Organisation Identification LEI
display_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Debtor Organisation Identification LEI
description: The organisation identification legal entity identifier (LEI) of the ultimate debtor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Debtor Organization Other Id
display_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Debtor Organization Other Id
description: The other organisation identification of the originator of an instant payment order.
notes: Unspecified ID not being LEI or BIC.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Debtor Private Identification Issuer Name
display_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Debtor Private Identification Issuer Name
description: The name of the entity that issued the private identification of the ultimate debtor of an instant payment order.

term_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Debtor Private Other Id
display_name: Instant Payment Order Ultimate Debtor Private Other Id
description: The other private identification of the ultimate originator of an instant payment order.
notes: Unspecified ID not being Date of Birth or BIC.

term_name: Interest Charges Settle Period Number Of Units
display_name: Interest Charges Settle Period Number Of Units
description: The value in which the length of the number of interest and provision -settlement-periods is expressed.

term_name: Interest Charges Settle Period Unit Code
display_name: Interest Charges Settle Period Unit Code
description: The code of the value in which the lenth of the period is expressed in order to the settlement of interest and provision.
notes: M: Maand,K: Kwartaal,J: Jaar

term_name: Interest Commission Cost Regular Tariff Office Number
display_name: Interest Commission Cost Regular Tariff Office Number
description: Number of the office which is owner of the information in the tariff table that contains the regular tariff for interest commission and costs.
notes: The combination of the attributes RPK_RGLR_TRFF_OFFC_NO en RPK_RGLR_TRFF_TBL_NO are the unique reference to one occurrence in the tariff table. The referenced tariff table is defined by the value of the attribute RPK_RGLR_TRFF_TBL_CODE. This is the regular tariff table, it does not occur on the signalling lists COK013 or COK021.

term_name: Interest Commission Cost Regular Tariff Table Code
display_name: Interest Commission Cost Regular Tariff Table Code
description: Code indicating the type of the regular tariff table for interest, provision and costs.
notes: Possible values: - D (debit interest)

term_name: Interest Commission Cost Regular Tariff Table Number
display_name: Interest Commission Cost Regular Tariff Table Number
description: Number of the tariff table that contains the regular tariff for interest, commission and costs.
notes: The combination of the attributes RPK_RGLR_TRFF_OFFC_NO en RPK_RGLR_TRFF_TBL_NO are the unique reference to one occurrence in the tariff table. The referenced tariff table is defined by the value of the attribute RPK_RGLR_TRFF_TBL_CODE. This is the regular tariff table, it does not occur on the signalling lists COK013 or COK021.

term_name: Interest Link Bank Code
display_name: Interest Link Bank Code
description: The code of the bank which can use the Interest Link.

term_name: Interest Link Currency Code
display_name: Interest Link Currency Code
description: The code of the currency for which the Interest Link is applicable
notes: The ISO Standard 4217 (3 characters) code that identifies the currency.

term_name: Interest Link Debit Credit Code
display_name: Interest Link Debit Credit Code
description: The code to indicate whether the Interest Link is for Debit or Credit interest
notes: CRDT = Credit, DBIT = Debit

term_name: Interest Link Description
display_name: Interest Link Description
description: The description of the Interest Link

term_name: Interest Link End Date
display_name: Interest Link End Date
description: The end date of the Interest Link

term_name: Interest Link Id
display_name: Interest Link Id
description: The unique id of the interest link.

term_name: Interest Link Percentage
display_name: Interest Link Percentage
description: The interest percentage of the Interest Link
notes: Percentage can be a Negative (-) or Positive (+) rate

term_name: Interest Link Percentage Start Date
display_name: Interest Link Percentage Start Date
description: The start date from which the interest percentage is applicable for the Interest Link

term_name: Interest Link Start Date
display_name: Interest Link Start Date
description: The start date of the Interest Link

term_name: International Bank Account Number
display_name: International Bank Account Number
description: The IBAN (International Bank Account Number - ISO standaard 13616, registration of national IBAN formats is done by SWIFT) of the account number. Abbreviation: IBAN
notes: This is a worldwide unique identification of the account. In case the IBAN contains a bank designation, this can be another bank than the BIC in the same record.

term_name: Lower Limit Credit Facility Smallest Unit Amount
display_name: Lower Limit Credit Facility Smallest Unit Amount
description: Lower limit of the credit-amount in the currency of the basic payment product, expressed in the smallest unit. This is the amount up to which the debit interest tariff is applicable. If credit-agreement-code is M or B, then there is an upper limit calculated, that is the next lower limit minus 1 If credit-agreement-code is Z, then there is no upper limit.
notes: Only applicable to debit interest, for credit interest, commission and costs this is always 0. The combination of the attributes RPK_RGLR_TRFF_OFFC_NO en RPK_RGLR_TRFF_TBL_NO are the unique reference to one occurrence in the tariff table. The referenced tariff table is defined by the value of the attribute RPK_RGLR_TRFF_TBL_CODE.

term_name: Maintenance Cost Charge Flag
display_name: Maintenance Cost Charge Flag
description: An indicator that comprises if maintanance costs have to be charged on an agreement.
notes: J: Ja,N: Nee

term_name: Month
display_name: Month
description: Number of the month the data belong to.

term_name: Mutation Date
display_name: Mutation Date
description: Date on which the change has taken place
notes: This is the date on which the mutation of the concerned attribute has taken place e.g. has been stored in the database.

term_name: Office Administration Location Code
display_name: Office Administration Location Code
description: The code of an administrative organization unit of a local bank.
notes: The location code account can be an identifier for: - a location of a local bank - a branch of a local bank - a department within a branch - a special group. The local banks decide for themselves what location codes they want to use. The management of these codes is therefore entirely the responsibility of the local banks and this information is not known to the central systems. The central systems can therefore not carry out any checks on them. The default value is '00'. There is no direct relationship between the location code account and the local bank location.

term_name: OPF Account Id
display_name: OPF Account Id
description: The unique identification assigned to the account by the system OPF
notes: The Id is used to link the correct account number to the debit / credit side of the transaction or to a list.

term_name: Order Manager Payment Order Creation Datetime
display_name: Order Manager Payment Order Creation Datetime
description: The datetime the payment is created within the order manager.
notes: The creation of the payment order takes place after certrain validations. The time of creation within the order manager is different from the time of initiation by the customer.

term_name: Order Manager Payment Order Status Code
display_name: Order Manager Payment Order Status Code
description: The current status of the payment order as known by the order manager.
notes: Processed, Rejected, Cancelled

term_name: Outgoing Cross Border Payment Order Account Currency Code
display_name: Outgoing Cross Border Payment Order Account Currency Code
description: The code based on the ISO Standard 4217 (3 characters) that identifies the currency of the account number of a cross border payment order.
notes: Needed to link the tables which GPP publishes.

term_name: Outgoing Cross Border Payment Order Bank to Bank Information Text
display_name: Outgoing Cross Border Payment Order Bank to Bank Information Text
description: Information for receiving bank which bank included in the outgoing cross border payment order Swift message.
notes: Field 72 Swift message. Needed for 'Overstapservice' because  add the 'new accountnr with receiving bank'. For B2B also the information of the original message will be passed to the receiving bank.

term_name: Outgoing Cross Border Payment Order Credit Currency Code
display_name: Outgoing Cross Border Payment Order Credit Currency Code
