description: Starting position number of the account number in IBAN, as can be found in the SWIFT IBAN Structure file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure IBAN Bank Identifier Number Of Characters
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure IBAN Bank Identifier Number Of Characters
description: The number of characters used in a bank identifier in IBAN, in the SWIFT IBAN Structure file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure IBAN Bank Identifier Position Number
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure IBAN Bank Identifier Position Number
description: Starting position number of the bank identifier in IBAN, as can be found in the SWIFT IBAN Structure file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure IBAN Branch Identifier Number Of Characters
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure IBAN Branch Identifier Number Of Characters
description: The number of characters used in a branch identifier in IBAN, in the SWIFT IBAN Structure file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure IBAN Branch Identifier Position Number
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure IBAN Branch Identifier Position Number
description: Starting position number of the branch identifier in IBAN, as can be found in the SWIFT IBAN Structure file.
notes: Value is empty if the branch identifier is not applied in the country's IBAN format.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure IBAN Check Digits Number Of Characters
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure IBAN Check Digits Number Of Characters
description: The number of check digits used in IBAN, in the SWIFT IBAN Structure file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure IBAN Check Digits Position Number
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure IBAN Check Digits Position Number
description: Starting position number of the check digits in IBAN, as can be found in the SWIFT IBAN Structure file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure IBAN Country Code Number Of Characters
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure IBAN Country Code Number Of Characters
description: The number of characters used in a country code in IBAN, in the SWIFT IBAN Structure file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure IBAN Country Code Position Number
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure IBAN Country Code Position Number
description: Starting position number of the country code in IBAN, as can be found in the SWIFT IBAN Structure file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure IBAN ISO Country Code
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure IBAN ISO Country Code
description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code prefix of the IBANs, as found in the SWIFT IBAN Structure file.
notes: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure IBAN National Id Number Of Characters
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure IBAN National Id Number Of Characters
description: Number of significant characters of the National ID value that are used by SWIFT to populate the IBAN National Id and that are sufficient to derive the IBAN BIC correctly, in the SWIFT IBAN Structure file.
notes: This number can be different from (that is, smaller than) the length of the national bank/branch identifier defined in the IBAN Registry.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure IBAN Total Number Of Characters
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure IBAN Total Number Of Characters
description: The total number of characters used in an IBAN, in the SWIFT IBAN Structure file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure Mandatory Commence Date
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure Mandatory Commence Date
description: The date from which the IBAN must be used in customer credit payments, in the SWIFT IBAN Structure file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure Modification Code
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure Modification Code
description: Code indicating the update status of a specific record in the SWIFT IBAN Structure file compared to the previous (monthly or daily) publication.
notes: This field is called 'Modification Flag' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure Optional Commence Date
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure Optional Commence Date
description: The date from which the IBAN can start being used in customer credit payments, in the SWIFT IBAN Structure file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure SEPA Flag
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure SEPA Flag
description: Flag indicating whether or not the IBAN is used in one of the SEPA schemes, in the SWIFT IBAN Structure file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure Tag Code
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure Tag Code
description: Code used to tag the specific SWIFT IBAN Structure file in SWIFT Reference data.
notes: For the IBAN Structure file this Tag is always 'IS'.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 Account Number Format Record Id
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 Account Number Format Record Id
description: The record id of the corresponding record, also defining the format of the IBAN, in the SWIFT Account Number Format file, as found in the SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN Account Number Number Of Characters
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN Account Number Number Of Characters
description: The number of characters used in an account number in IBAN, in the SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN Account Number Position Number
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN Account Number Position Number
description: Starting position number of the account number in IBAN, as can be found in the SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN Bank Identifier Number Of Characters
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN Bank Identifier Number Of Characters
description: The number of characters used in a bank identifier in IBAN, in the SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN Bank Identifier Position Number
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN Bank Identifier Position Number
description: Starting position number of the bank identifier in IBAN, as can be found in the SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN Branch Identifier Number Of Characters
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN Branch Identifier Number Of Characters
description: The number of characters used in a branch identifier in IBAN, in the SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN Branch Identifier Position Number
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN Branch Identifier Position Number
description: Starting position number of the branch identifier in IBAN, as can be found in the SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 file.
notes: Value is empty if the branch identifier is not applied in the country's IBAN format.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN Check Digits Number Of Characters
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN Check Digits Number Of Characters
description: The number of check digits used in IBAN, in the SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN Check Digits Position Number
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN Check Digits Position Number
description: Starting position number of the check digits in IBAN, as can be found in the SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN Country Code Number Of Characters
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN Country Code Number Of Characters
description: The number of characters used in a country code in IBAN, in the SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN Country Code Position Number
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN Country Code Position Number
description: Starting position number of the country code in IBAN, as can be found in the SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN Format Reused Tekst
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN Format Reused Tekst
description: Text field for a list of additional countries (comma separated two-letter country codes) that re-use the IBAN format for their domestic accounts, as found in the SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 file.
notes: For example, IM, GG, JE re-use the GB IBAN format. These additional country codes are used within the BICs related to the IBANs. Example IBAN: FR7618319067038600621900064 BIC: SOGENCNNXXX.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN ISO Country Code
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN ISO Country Code
description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code prefix of the IBANs, as found in the SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 file.
notes: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN National Id Number Of Characters
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN National Id Number Of Characters
description: Number of significant characters of the National ID value that are used by SWIFT to populate the IBAN National Id and that are sufficient to derive the IBAN BIC correctly, in the SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 file.
notes: This number can be different from (that is, smaller than) the length of the national bank/branch identifier defined in the IBAN Registry.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN Total Number Of Characters
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 IBAN Total Number Of Characters
description: The total number of characters used in an IBAN, in the SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 ISO 13616 Registered Flag
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 ISO 13616 Registered Flag
description: Flag indicating whether or not the IBAN format has been registered with ISO 13616, as found in the SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 Mandatory Commence Date
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 Mandatory Commence Date
description: The date from which the IBAN must be used in customer credit payments, in the SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 Mandatory IBAN Transaction Types Code
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 Mandatory IBAN Transaction Types Code
description: A code that consists of a comma-separated list of (keywords for) transaction types for which the IBANs are mandatory, in the SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 file.
notes: Code can include the following: CT: Credit Transfer DD: Direct Debit RP: Retail payments IS: Instant payments RT: Real Time payments SEPA: SEPA payments CC: Credit Card DC: Debit Card EM: e-Money CQ: Cheques IB:Inter-bank payments LV: Low Value HV: High Value The list can also contain combinations, for example: CT-SEPA,DD-SEPA,IS-CT-SEPA

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 Modification Code
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 Modification Code
description: Code indicating the update status of a specific record in the SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 file compared to the previous (monthly or daily) publication.
notes: This field is called 'Modification Flag' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 Optional Commence Date
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 Optional Commence Date
description: The date from which the IBAN can start being used in customer credit payments, in the SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 Optional IBAN Transaction Types Code
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 Optional IBAN Transaction Types Code
description: A code that consists of a comma-separated list of (keywords for) transaction types for which the IBANs are optional, in the SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 file.
notes: Code can include the following: CT: Credit Transfer DD: Direct Debit RP: Retail payments IS: Instant payments RT: Real Time payments SEPA: SEPA payments CC: Credit Card DC: Debit Card EM: e-Money CQ: Cheques IB:Inter-bank payments LV: Low Value HV: High Value The list can also contain combinations, for example: CT-SEPA,DD-SEPA,IS-CT-SEPA

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 Record Id
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 Record Id
description: Unique meaningless identification of a record in the SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 file.
notes: All Record Id's start with 'IS'. This field is called 'Record Key' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 SEPA Flag
display_name: SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 SEPA Flag
description: Flag indicating whether or not the IBAN is used in one of the SEPA schemes, in the SWIFT IBAN Structure V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT Local Language Bank Directory SAP Key Id
display_name: SWIFT Local Language Bank Directory SAP Key Id
description: Unique identifier of a record in the Bank Directory SAP file if the National Id Code is included in this file, as found in the SWIFT Local Language file.

term_name: SWIFT Local Language Bank Directoy Plus Key Id
display_name: SWIFT Local Language Bank Directoy Plus Key Id
description: Unique identifier of a record in the Bank Directory Plus file if the National Id Code is included in this file, as found in the SWIFT Local Language file.

term_name: SWIFT Local Language Branch Address Line 1
display_name: SWIFT Local Language Branch Address Line 1
description: The 1st (of 4) address line of the institution/branch which might contain the building name, detailed building information, street name, and number, as found in the SWIFT Local Language file.

term_name: SWIFT Local Language Branch Address Line 2
display_name: SWIFT Local Language Branch Address Line 2
description: The 2nd (of 4) address line of the institution/branch which might contain the building name, detailed building information, street name, and number, as found in the SWIFT Local Language file.

term_name: SWIFT Local Language Branch Address Line 3
display_name: SWIFT Local Language Branch Address Line 3
description: The 3rd (of 4) address line of the institution/branch which might contain the building name, detailed building information, street name, and number, as found in the SWIFT Local Language file.

term_name: SWIFT Local Language Branch Address Line 4
display_name: SWIFT Local Language Branch Address Line 4
description: The 4th (of 4) address line of the institution/branch which might contain the building name, detailed building information, street name, and number, as found in the SWIFT Local Language file.

term_name: SWIFT Local Language Branch City Name
display_name: SWIFT Local Language Branch City Name
description: The name of the city where the institution/branch is located, as found in the SWIFT Local Language file.

term_name: SWIFT Local Language Branch CPS Name
display_name: SWIFT Local Language Branch CPS Name
description: The name of the county, province, state or other administartive region where the institution/branch is located, as found in the SWIFT Local Language file.

term_name: SWIFT Local Language Branch PO Box Number
display_name: SWIFT Local Language Branch PO Box Number
description: The post office box number of the institution/branch and the related ZIP code, as found in the SWIFT Local Language file.
notes: Example 'POB 103352, 40024' This allows customers to use the full POB address: POB 103352 40024, DUESSELDORF (CITY).

term_name: SWIFT Local Language Branch ZIP Code
display_name: SWIFT Local Language Branch ZIP Code
description: The zip code belonging to the place where the institution/branch is located, as found in the SWIFT Local Language file.

term_name: SWIFT Local Language Institution Name
display_name: SWIFT Local Language Institution Name
description: The trading name of the institution as found in the SWIFT Local Language file.

term_name: SWIFT Local Language ISO Country Code
display_name: SWIFT Local Language ISO Country Code
description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for the country belonging to the local language, as found in the SWIFT Local Language file.
notes: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2

term_name: SWIFT Local Language ISO Language Code
display_name: SWIFT Local Language ISO Language Code
description: The three-character ISO 639.2 code of the language, as found in the SWIFT Local Language file.
notes: Example: JPN = Japanese

term_name: SWIFT Local Language ISO Language Script Code
display_name: SWIFT Local Language ISO Language Script Code
description: The four-character ISO 15925 code of the language script, as found in the SWIFT Local Language file.
notes: Example: HANI (Kanji) and HRKT (Katakana) = Japanse scripts

term_name: SWIFT Local Language Modification Code
display_name: SWIFT Local Language Modification Code
description: Code indicating the update status of a specific record in the SWIFT Local Language file compared to the previous (monthly or daily) publication.
notes: This field is called 'Modification Flag' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT Local Language National Id
display_name: SWIFT Local Language National Id
description: The National identifier of the institution/branch as found in the SWIFT Local Language file.

term_name: SWIFT Local Language National Id Type Code
display_name: SWIFT Local Language National Id Type Code
description: Code indicating the National Id Type of an entity, as found in the SWIFT Local Language file.
notes: This is the name of the national code or the name/acronym of the national code provider. Examples: BLZ for the German NATIONAL ID ABA for the US NATIONAL ID

term_name: SWIFT Local Language Office Type Code
display_name: SWIFT Local Language Office Type Code
description: Code indicating the office type according to the entities hierarchy of the entity, as found in the SWIFT Local Language file.
domain_values: HO - Head Office,MP - Main Payments Office,DB - Domestic Branch or department,SB - Sub Domestic Branch,FB - Foreign Branch,SF - Sub Foreign Branch,UC - Unclassified

term_name: SWIFT Local Language Record Id
display_name: SWIFT Local Language Record Id
description: Unique meaningless identification of a record in the SWIFT Local Language file.
notes: All Record Id's start with 'LL'. This field is called 'Record Key' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT National Id Format Bank Directory Plus National Id Type Code
display_name: SWIFT National Id Format Bank Directory Plus National Id Type Code
description: A code representing an acronym of the national ID as used in the Bank Directory Plus file, called the national id type, as found in the SWIFT National Id Format file.

term_name: SWIFT National Id Format Clearing System Name
display_name: SWIFT National Id Format Clearing System Name
description: The name of the clearing system or the banking authority in the country that issues the national Ids, as found in the SWIFT National Id Format file.

term_name: SWIFT National Id Format Comment
display_name: SWIFT National Id Format Comment
description: Commentary text field used for any other comments for users of the SWIFT National Id Format file.

term_name: SWIFT National Id Format ISO Country Code
display_name: SWIFT National Id Format ISO Country Code
description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for the country in which the National Id's are used for clearing payments, as found in the SWIFT National Id Format file.
notes: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2

term_name: SWIFT National Id Format ISO Country Name
display_name: SWIFT National Id Format ISO Country Name
description: The ISO 3166-1 name of the country in which the National Id's are used for clearing payments, as found in the SWIFT National Id Format file.

term_name: SWIFT National Id Format Letter Format National Id
display_name: SWIFT National Id Format Letter Format National Id
description: A National Id in letter format in the SWIFT National Id Format file.
notes: Approximation of the account number format using letters. For the meaning of the letters, see the corresponding elements in the field 'elements'. Each 'element' corresponds to a unique letter. It might include separators.

term_name: SWIFT National Id Format Main National Id Code
display_name: SWIFT National Id Format Main National Id Code
description: Code indicating whether or not a National Id is considered the most important or mostly used (main) national id in the country, if applicable, in the SWIFT National Id Format file.
notes: Corresponds to the absence of the '/AN' or '/FN' flag in Bank Directory Plus (BDP). Value is 'M' (main) or empty.

term_name: SWIFT National Id Format Modification Code
display_name: SWIFT National Id Format Modification Code
description: Code indicating the update status of a specific record in the SWIFT National Id Format file compared to the previous (monthly or daily) publication.
notes: This field is called 'Modification Flag' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT National Id Format National Id Bank Directory Plus Elements Code
display_name: SWIFT National Id Format National Id Bank Directory Plus Elements Code
description: A code consisting of the different components in the correct order of a national Id as published in the Bank Directory Plus file in the SWIFT National Id Format file.

term_name: SWIFT National Id Format National Id Elements Code
display_name: SWIFT National Id Format National Id Elements Code
description: A code consisting of the different components in the correct order of a national ID in the SWIFT National Id Format file.
notes: List of the components of the national ID, separated by comma, in the order of the REGEX segments. The purpose of the elements is simply to explain which components compose the account number or the national ID. The list is not a formal, fixed list.

term_name: SWIFT National Id Format National Id Example Value
display_name: SWIFT National Id Format National Id Example Value
description: Example value of a National Id in the SWIFT National Id Format file.

term_name: SWIFT National Id Format National Id IBAN Plus Elements Code
display_name: SWIFT National Id Format National Id IBAN Plus Elements Code
description: A code consisting of the different components in the correct order of a national Id as published in the IBAN Plus file in the SWIFT National Id Format file.

term_name: SWIFT National Id Format National Id In Bank Directory Plus Number of Characters
display_name: SWIFT National Id Format National Id In Bank Directory Plus Number of Characters
description: The number of characters used in a national Id as published in the Bank Directory Plus file , in the SWIFT National Id Format file.

term_name: SWIFT National Id Format National Id In IBAN Plus Number of Characters
display_name: SWIFT National Id Format National Id In IBAN Plus Number of Characters
description: The number of characters used in a National Id as published in the IBAN Plus file , in the SWIFT National Id Format file.

term_name: SWIFT National Id Format National Id Local Acronym Name
display_name: SWIFT National Id Format National Id Local Acronym Name
description: Acronym for a local name of a National Id as applied in the clearing system of the issuer, as found in the SWIFT National Id Format file.

term_name: SWIFT National Id Format National Id Local Name
display_name: SWIFT National Id Format National Id Local Name
description: Name for a National Id in the local language in the SWIFT National Id Format file.

term_name: SWIFT National Id Format National Id Number Of Characters
display_name: SWIFT National Id Format National Id Number Of Characters
description: The number of characters used in a National Id in the SWIFT National Id Format file.

term_name: SWIFT National Id Format Record Id
display_name: SWIFT National Id Format Record Id
description: Unique meaningless identification of a record in the SWIFT National Id Format file.
notes: All Record Id's start with 'NF'. This field is called 'Record Key' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT National Id Format REGEX Format National Id
display_name: SWIFT National Id Format REGEX Format National Id
description: A National Id in REGEX (Regular Expression) format in the SWIFT National Id Format file.
notes: The regular expression is a formal way of specifying the structure of a data element.

term_name: SWIFT National Id Format Used In IBAN Flag
display_name: SWIFT National Id Format Used In IBAN Flag
description: A flag indicating whether or not a National Id is used in IBAN in the SWIFT National Id Format file.
notes: The values are as follows: N = the national ID is not included in IBANS Y = the national ID is included in IBANS. However, whether the national ID is included in IBANs in its full length, or whether the IBANs also contain another type of bank ID in combination with this national ID is not specified here.

term_name: SWIFT National Id History Branch Address Line 1
display_name: SWIFT National Id History Branch Address Line 1
description: The 1st (of 4) address line of the institution/branch which might contain the building name, detailed building information, street name, and number, as found in the SWIFT National Id History file.

term_name: SWIFT National Id History Branch Address Line 2
display_name: SWIFT National Id History Branch Address Line 2
description: The 2nd (of 4) address line of the institution/branch which might contain the building name, detailed building information, street name, and number, as found in the SWIFT National Id History file.

term_name: SWIFT National Id History Branch Address Line 3
display_name: SWIFT National Id History Branch Address Line 3
description: The 3rd (of 4) address line of the institution/branch which might contain the building name, detailed building information, street name, and number, as found in the SWIFT National Id History file.

term_name: SWIFT National Id History Branch Address Line 4
display_name: SWIFT National Id History Branch Address Line 4
description: The 4th (of 4) address line of the institution/branch which might contain the building name, detailed building information, street name, and number, as found in the SWIFT National Id History file.

term_name: SWIFT National Id History Branch City Name
display_name: SWIFT National Id History Branch City Name
description: The name of the city where the institution/branch is located, as found in the SWIFT National Id History file.

term_name: SWIFT National Id History Branch CPS Name
display_name: SWIFT National Id History Branch CPS Name
description: The name of the county, province, state or other administartive region where the institution/branch is located, as found in the SWIFT National Id History file.

term_name: SWIFT National Id History Branch Information Text
display_name: SWIFT National Id History Branch Information Text
description: Text field showing Branch information derived from the BIC Directory 2018 as found in the SWIFT National Id History file.
notes: Currently, this will be provided only for entries with a BIC and only when the financial institution concerned wants to provide the extra information.

term_name: SWIFT National Id History Branch ISO Country Code
display_name: SWIFT National Id History Branch ISO Country Code
description: The ISO 3166-1 name for the country in which the institution/branch resides as found in the SWIFT National Id History file.
notes: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2

term_name: SWIFT National Id History Branch PO BOX Number
display_name: SWIFT National Id History Branch PO BOX Number
description: The post office box number of the institution/branch and the related ZIP code, as found in the SWIFT National Id History file.
notes: Example 'POB 103352, 40024' This allows customers to use the full POB address: POB 103352 40024, DUESSELDORF (CITY).

term_name: SWIFT National Id History Branch ZIP Code
display_name: SWIFT National Id History Branch ZIP Code
description: The zip code belonging to the place where the institution/branch is located, as found in the SWIFT National Id History file.

term_name: SWIFT National Id History Entity Id
display_name: SWIFT National Id History Entity Id
description: A unique entity identifier taken from the Entity Plus file in the SWIFT National ID History file.
notes: This field is called 'EID' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT National Id History Institution Name
display_name: SWIFT National Id History Institution Name
description: The trading name of the institution as found in the SWIFT National Id History file.

term_name: SWIFT National Id History Modification Code
display_name: SWIFT National Id History Modification Code
description: Code indicating the update status of a specific record in the SWIFT National Id History file compared to the previous (monthly or daily) publication.
notes: This field is called 'Modification Flag' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT National Id History National Id
display_name: SWIFT National Id History National Id
description: The National identifier of the institution/branch as found in the SWIFT National Id History file.
notes: This can also be a CHIPS code. The source of the code is indicated in the field NATIONAL ID TYPE.

term_name: SWIFT National Id History National Id Bank Directory Plus End Date
display_name: SWIFT National Id History National Id Bank Directory Plus End Date
description: The date when the National ID was deleted (ended) in the Bank Directory Plus file, in the SWIFT National Id History file.
notes: To start the file, SWIFTRef has taken data from all monthly files since the start of SWIFTRef. This is the monthly date when the data was deleted in the monthly file of Bank Directory Plus. This is for all dates before the end of November 2017. As of December 2017, SWIFTRef will populate with the exact daily deletion dates.

term_name: SWIFT National Id History National Id Type Code
display_name: SWIFT National Id History National Id Type Code
description: Code indicating the National ID Type and additional coding of an entity, as found in the SWIFT National Id History file.
notes: '- National ID Type This is the name of the national code or the name/acronym of the national code provider. Examples: BLZ for the German National Id ABA for the US National Id - National ID Type + /AN AN stand for Alternative National ID Type. The banks/branches in a country can own National IDs issued by multiple authorities. For example, banks in Brazil can own COMPE national IDs and ISPB National IDs. The second code is indicated as ISPB/AN. - National ID Type + /FN FN stands for Foreign National ID Type. In some countries, banks have a National code issued by a foreign payment clearing service, such as a German bank that has a Swiss BC. This is indicated as BC/FN.

term_name: SWIFT National Id History Record Id
display_name: SWIFT National Id History Record Id
description: Unique meaningless identification of a record in the SWIFT National Id History file.
notes: All Record Id's start with 'NH'. This field is called 'Record Key' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT PMI Alternative Service Id List
display_name: SWIFT PMI Alternative Service Id List
description: Unique list of identifications of one or more alternative service Ids, as found in the SWIFT PMI file.
notes: The various alternative IDs are prefixed as follows: ISO3: the 3-digit ISO clearing and settlement service code ISO5: the 5-digit ISO clearing and settlement service code FIN: the FIN service (VAS) code The prefix and the alternative ID are separated by ':'. The prefix/alternative ID pairs are comma-separated (if multiple).

term_name: SWIFT PMI Modification Code
display_name: SWIFT PMI Modification Code
description: Code indicating the update status of a specific record in the SWIFT PMI file compared to the previous (monthly or daily) publication.
notes: This field is called 'Modification Flag' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT PMI Platform Id
display_name: SWIFT PMI Platform Id
description: The identifier of the platform / data structure (field definition) of the service participant records, which are available in the Reach Plus file, as found in the SWIFT PMI file. .
notes: The data structure is defined in the Reach Plus Structure file and defines the meaning and size of the columns that contain the participant data in the Reach Plus file. Filtering the Reach Plus Structure records on 'Platform' will return the data specification for a service. Example: Filtering the Reach Plus Structure records on 'Platform' =

term_name: SWIFT PMI Record Id
display_name: SWIFT PMI Record Id
description: Unique meaningless identification of a record in the SWIFT PMI file.
notes: All Record Id's start with 'PM'. This field is called 'Record Key' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT PMI Service Area Country Code List
display_name: SWIFT PMI Service Area Country Code List
description: Code indicating one country, or a list of countries, at times defining an official group of countries in which the service is made available, as found in the SWIFT PMI file.

term_name: SWIFT PMI Service Comment
display_name: SWIFT PMI Service Comment
description: Commentary text field used for any other comments on services in the SWIFT PMI file.

term_name: SWIFT PMI Service Coverage Code
display_name: SWIFT PMI Service Coverage Code
description: The code that indicates the reach/coverage the service provides, as found in the SWIFT PMI file.

term_name: SWIFT PMI Service Id
display_name: SWIFT PMI Service Id
description: Unique identification of the clearing and settlement service, or the SWIFTNet service, as found in the SWIFT PMI file.
notes: It is usually prefixed with the ISO country code or the AREA code, which represents the land/area where the service is offered. Example: 'CN CIPS' or 'SADC SIRESS'

term_name: SWIFT PMI Service ISO Currency Code List
display_name: SWIFT PMI Service ISO Currency Code List
description: The comma-separated list of one or more currency codes cleared or settled on the service, as found in the SWIFT PMI file.

term_name: SWIFT PMI Service ISO Message Type Code
display_name: SWIFT PMI Service ISO Message Type Code
description: Code indicating the ISO standards ID(s) for the type of messages used by the service, as found in the SWIFT PMI file.
notes: Examples: ISO15022 (as used in the FIN MTs), ISO20022, ISO8583.

term_name: SWIFT PMI Service Local Cut-Off Time
display_name: SWIFT PMI Service Local Cut-Off Time
description: The local time + UCT offset of the acceptance of the last transaction by the service, as found in the SWIFT PMI file.

term_name: SWIFT PMI Service Local Start Time
display_name: SWIFT PMI Service Local Start Time
description: The local time + UCT offset of the start of the daily operations of the service, as found in the SWIFT PMI file.

term_name: SWIFT PMI Service Name
display_name: SWIFT PMI Service Name
description: The name of the payment service, as found in the SWIFT PMI file.

term_name: SWIFT PMI Service Network Name
display_name: SWIFT PMI Service Network Name
description: The network(s) through which the service is provided, as found in the SWIFT PMI file.
notes: Example:

term_name: SWIFT PMI Service Operating Days Code
display_name: SWIFT PMI Service Operating Days Code
description: A code indicating the range of days (in acronyms) during which the service is operational, as found in the SWIFT PMI file.
notes: Example: MON-FRI

term_name: SWIFT PMI Service Operator ISO Country Code
display_name: SWIFT PMI Service Operator ISO Country Code
description: The ISO alpha-2 country code of the operator providing the service, as found in the SWIFT PMI file.
notes: It remains blank if the operator operates from multiple countries. This is not to be confused with the Area field, which specifies the countries where the service is provided. ISO 3166-1 alpha-2

term_name: SWIFT PMI Service Operator Name
display_name: SWIFT PMI Service Operator Name
description: The legal name of the company that operates the service, as found in the SWIFT PMI file.
notes: Example: Transfond S.A.

term_name: SWIFT PMI Service Participant Id Type Code
display_name: SWIFT PMI Service Participant Id Type Code
description: Code indicating the type of identifier of the participant of the service, as found in the SWIFT PMI file.
notes: In most cases, it will either be a SWIFT BIC or a domestic routing/clearing number (with or without the branch code).

term_name: SWIFT PMI Service Technical Name
display_name: SWIFT PMI Service Technical Name
description: A technical name of the service, as found in the SWIFT PMI file.
notes: This is mainly used for services on SWIFTNet (SNET). Example: swift.bulkp.generic.rt

term_name: SWIFT PMI Service Type Code
display_name: SWIFT PMI Service Type Code
description: Code indicating the type of service, as found in the SWIFT PMI file.
notes: If applicable, one of the following: ACH - automated clearing house CHQ - cheque clearing system RTGS - real-time gross settlement RT-RPS - real-time retail payments service Other services that are not in these categories have this field empty.

term_name: SWIFT PMI Settlement Service Id
display_name: SWIFT PMI Settlement Service Id
description: The Service ID of the service that provides the settlement for this clearing service, as found in the SWIFT PMI file.
notes: Example:

term_name: SWIFT PMI Transaction Execution Period Code
display_name: SWIFT PMI Transaction Execution Period Code
description: Code indicating the maximum period necessary to execute the transaction, as found in the SWIFT PMI file.
notes: RT - real-time or instant nH - a number of hours (for example, 2H) n min - a number of minutes n sec - a number of seconds SD - same day DF - deferred, can take one or several days

term_name: SWIFT PMI Transaction Settlement Type Code
display_name: SWIFT PMI Transaction Settlement Type Code
description: Code indicating the type of settlement of the transactions, as found in the SWIFT PMI file.
notes: GS - gross settlement. Each transaction is settled individually. NS - net settlement. The transactions are aggregated and settled in batch as net differences in amounts.

term_name: SWIFT PMI Transaction Type Code List
display_name: SWIFT PMI Transaction Type Code List
description: List of codes indicating the type of one- or a comma-separated combination of several transactions, as found in the SWIFT PMI file.
notes: One or more of the following: CT - credit transfer DT - debit transfer DD - direct debit IB - inter-bank transfer Additional types may be added in the future.

term_name: SWIFT PMI Transaction Value Code
display_name: SWIFT PMI Transaction Value Code
description: Code indicating the value of the transactions, as found in the SWIFT PMI file.
domain_values: HV - high value,LV - low value,HV/LV - high and low value

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Bank Directory Plus Record Id
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Bank Directory Plus Record Id
description: Unique meaningless identification of the corresponding record in the Bank Directory Plus file, as found in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.
notes: All BDP record Id's start with 'BD'. This field is called 'Record Key' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Modification Code
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Modification Code
description: Code indicating the update status of a specific record in the SWIFT Reach Plus file compared to the previous (monthly or daily) publication.
notes: This field is called 'Modification Flag' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Participant Id
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Participant Id
description: The ID of the direct/indirect service participant, as found in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.
notes: The ID format is specific to the service.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Platform Id
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Platform Id
description: The identifier/acronym of the platform or infrastructure that operates one or multiple services, as found in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.
notes: For example, SWIFTNet is a platform operating services such as Investment Funds, Cash Reporting end Generic FileAct. All services on a platform have a common data structure. Therefore, there is only one set of field definitions in the Reach Plus Structure file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Record Activation Date
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Record Activation Date
description: The date of activation of an added record in case it is different from the monthly publication date in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Record Id
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Record Id
description: Unique meaningless identification of a record in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.
notes: All Record Id's start with 'RP'. This field is called 'Record Key' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Id
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Id
description: Unique identification/acronym of the payment service on the platform, as found in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Name
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Name
description: The name or short description of the payment service, as found in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 10 Txt
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 10 Txt
description: A free text field capturing a generic attribute containing the tenth service-specific parameter in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 11 Txt
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 11 Txt
description: A free text field capturing a generic attribute containing the eleventh service-specific parameter in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 12 Txt
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 12 Txt
description: A free text field capturing a generic attribute containing the twelfth service-specific parameter in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 13 Txt
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 13 Txt
description: A free text field capturing a generic attribute containing the thirteenth service-specific parameter in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 14 Txt
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 14 Txt
description: A free text field capturing a generic attribute containing the fourteenth service-specific parameter in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 15 Txt
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 15 Txt
description: A free text field capturing a generic attribute containing the fifteenth service-specific parameter in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 16 Txt
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 16 Txt
description: A free text field capturing a generic attribute containing the sixteenth service-specific parameter in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 17 Txt
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 17 Txt
description: A free text field capturing a generic attribute containing the seventeenth service-specific parameter in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 18 Txt
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 18 Txt
description: A free text field capturing a generic attribute containing the eighteenth service-specific parameter in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 19 Txt
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 19 Txt
description: A free text field capturing a generic attribute containing the nineteenth service-specific parameter in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 1 Txt
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 1 Txt
description: A free text field capturing a generic attribute containing the first service-specific parameter in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 20 Txt
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 20 Txt
description: A free text field capturing a generic attribute containing the twentieth service-specific parameter in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 2 Txt
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 2 Txt
description: A free text field capturing a generic attribute containing the second service-specific parameter in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 3 Txt
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 3 Txt
description: A free text field capturing a generic attribute containing the third service-specific parameter in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 4 Txt
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 4 Txt
description: A free text field capturing a generic attribute containing the fourth service-specific parameter in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 5 Txt
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 5 Txt
description: A free text field capturing a generic attribute containing the fifth service-specific parameter in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 6 Txt
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 6 Txt
description: A free text field capturing a generic attribute containing the sixth service-specific parameter in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 7 Txt
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 7 Txt
description: A free text field capturing a generic attribute containing the seventh service-specific parameter in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 8 Txt
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 8 Txt
description: A free text field capturing a generic attribute containing the eigth service-specific parameter in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 9 Txt
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Service Specific Parameter 9 Txt
description: A free text field capturing a generic attribute containing the ninth service-specific parameter in the SWIFT Reach Plus file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Structure Generic Field Name
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Structure Generic Field Name
description: The name of the data field in the Reach Plus data file, a sshown in the SWIFT Reach Plus Structure file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Structure Modification Code
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Structure Modification Code
description: Code indicating the update status of a specific record in the SWIFT Reach Plus Structure file compared to the previous (monthly or daily) publication.
notes: This field is called 'Modification Flag' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Structure Platform Id
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Structure Platform Id
description: The identifier/acronym of the platform or infrastructure that operates one or multiple services, as found in the SWIFT Reach Plus Structure file.
notes: For example, SWIFTNet is a platform operating services such as Investment Funds, Cash Reporting end Generic FileAct. All services on a platform have a common data structure.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Structure Presence Code
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Structure Presence Code
description: The mandatory or optional presence of the data in the platform-specific data field in the Reach Plus file, as shown in the SWIFT Reach Plus Structure file.
notes: Yes = Always present, No = Optional

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Structure Record Id
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Structure Record Id
description: Unique meaningless identification of a record in the SWIFT Reach Plus Structure file.
notes: All Record Id's start with 'RS'. This field is called 'Record Key' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Structure Specific Field Description
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Structure Specific Field Description
description: The platform-specific meaning/description of the data field in the Reach Plus file, as shown in the SWIFT Reach Plus Structure file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Structure Specific Field Format
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Structure Specific Field Format
description: The platform-specific format of the data field in the Reach Plus file, as shown in the SWIFT Reach Plus Structure file.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Structure Specific Field Name
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Structure Specific Field Name
description: The platform-specific name of the data field in the Reach Plus file, as shown in the SWIFT Reach Plus Structure file.
notes: Not present if the column in the REACHPLUS data file is not used for the platform.

term_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Structure Value Range Text
display_name: SWIFT Reach Plus Structure Value Range Text
description: Text field indicating the fixed value(s) if the data in the platform-specific data field in the Reach Plus file contains a fixed value or a range of fixed values for all records of the platform.

term_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Additional Optional Service Membership Code
display_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Additional Optional Service Membership Code
description: A code indicating membership of a SEPA additional optional service (AOS), as found in the SWIFT SEPA Routing file.

term_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Adherence BIC
display_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Adherence BIC
description: The BIC that (according to the financial institution that provided routing data to SWIFT) appears in the EPC Adherence Register, as found in the SWIFT SEPA Routing file.
notes: If the BIC used in a SEPA payment is not present in this file, then the institution did not register as adherent to the SEPA scheme with the EPC.

term_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Adherence End Date
display_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Adherence End Date
description: The date after which, according to the EPC Adherence Register, the institution will cease scheme operations, as found in the SWIFT SEPA Routing file.

term_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Adherence Start Date
display_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Adherence Start Date
description: The date from which, according to the EPC Adherence Register, the institution will be ready for operating the scheme, as found in the SWIFT SEPA Routing file.

term_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing City Name
display_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing City Name
description: The city name of the beneficiary BIC as found in the SWIFT SEPA Routing file.

term_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Clearing Channel Id
display_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Clearing Channel Id
description: Identification of the clearing channel through which the beneficiary institution can receive SEPA payment instructions according to the scheme, as found in the SWIFT SEPA Routing file.
notes: For a complete list of structured clearing and settlement service codes, see https://www.europeanpaymentscouncil.eu/what-we-do/sepa-payment-scheme-management/clearing-and-settlement-mechanisms

term_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Institution Name
display_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Institution Name
description: The trading name of the institution of the beneficiary BIC as found in the SWIFT SEPA Routing file.

term_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Intermediary Institution BIC
display_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Intermediary Institution BIC
description: The unique alpha-11 bank identifier code (BIC) of the intermediary institution, as found in the SWIFT SEPA Routing file.
notes: If available, the BIC of the intermediary institution in case the Reachability of the institution or its branch is 'I' (Indirect). If an 8-character BIC is issued, then it is padded with ' XXX'.

term_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing ISO Country Code
display_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing ISO Country Code
description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for the country of the beneficiary BIC, as found in the SWIFT SEPA Routing file.

term_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Modification Code
display_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Modification Code
description: Code indicating the update status of a specific record in the SWIFT SEPA Routing file compared to the previous (monthly or daily) publication.
notes: This field is called 'Modification Flag' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Preferred Channel Code
display_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Preferred Channel Code
description: A code indicating if the payment channel is the preferred payment channel of the beneficiary institution for receiving payment, as found in the SWIFT SEPA Routing file.
notes: P if preferred and empty if not.

term_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Reachability Code
display_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Reachability Code
description: A code that indicates the beneficiary institution's direct or indirect reachability through the payment channel, as found in the SWIFT SEPA Routing file.
notes: D if direct I if indirect If 'I' (Indirect), then the field 'Intermediary Institution' identifies the institution that will route the payment.

term_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Reachability End Date
display_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Reachability End Date
description: The date after which the institution is no longer reachable through a certain payment channel, as found in the SWIFT SEPA Routing file.

term_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Reachability Start Date
display_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Reachability Start Date
description: The date from which the institution becomes reachable through a certain payment channel, as found in the SWIFT SEPA Routing file.

term_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Record Id
display_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Record Id
description: Unique meaningless identification of a record in the SWIFT SEPA Routing file.
notes: All Record Id's start with 'SP'. This field is called 'Record Key' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Scheme Code
display_name: SWIFT SEPA Routing Scheme Code
description: Code for the SEPA scheme for which the bank or branch in field BIC can be reached through the payments channel, as found in the SWIFT SEPA Routing file.

term_name: SWIFT Service Directory Addressable Id
display_name: SWIFT Service Directory Addressable Id
description: The identifier to be used to send the payment/transaction to, if different from the Participaint Id or the Intermediary Id, as found in the SWIFT Service Directory file.
notes: Consists of: - BIC - National id - Service-specific member id

term_name: SWIFT Service Directory Bank Directory Plus Record Id
display_name: SWIFT Service Directory Bank Directory Plus Record Id
description: Unique meaningless identification of the corresponding record in the Bank Directory Plus file, as found in the SWIFT Service Directory file.
notes: All BDP record Id's start with 'BD'. This field is called 'Record Key' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT Service Directory City Name
display_name: SWIFT Service Directory City Name
description: The city name of the participating institute /branch from the Bank Directory Plus file, as found in the SWIFT Service Directory file.

term_name: SWIFT Service Directory End Date
display_name: SWIFT Service Directory End Date
description: Date until which the data must be used, as found in the SWIFT Service Directory file.

term_name: SWIFT Service Directory Institution Name
display_name: SWIFT Service Directory Institution Name
description: The trading name of the institution as found in the SWIFT Service Directory file.

term_name: SWIFT Service Directory Intermediary Id
display_name: SWIFT Service Directory Intermediary Id
description: The service-specific identifier of the intermediary participant that connects the indirect participant to the service, as found in the SWIFT Service Directory file.
notes: Consists of: - BIC - National id - Service-specific member id

term_name: SWIFT Service Directory ISO Country Code
display_name: SWIFT Service Directory ISO Country Code
description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for the country of the institute/ branch, as found in the SWIFT Service Directory file.

term_name: SWIFT Service Directory ISO Currency Code
display_name: SWIFT Service Directory ISO Currency Code
description: The ISO 4217 alpha-3 code for the currency in which the servioce operates as found in the SWIFT Service Directory file.
notes: If multiple currencies apply, then the field is left blank.

term_name: SWIFT Service Directory Modification Code
display_name: SWIFT Service Directory Modification Code
description: Code indicating the update status of a specific record in the SWIFT Service Directory file compared to the previous (monthly or daily) publication.
notes: This field is called 'Modification Flag' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT Service Directory Participant Direct Indirect Code
display_name: SWIFT Service Directory Participant Direct Indirect Code
description: A code indicating whether the institution is a direct or indirect service participant, as found in the SWIFT Service Directory file.
notes: If indirect, then the direct participant is specified when known.

term_name: SWIFT Service Directory Participant Id
display_name: SWIFT Service Directory Participant Id
description: The service specific identification of the service participant: as found in the SWIFT Service Directory file.
notes: Consists of: - BIC - National id - Service-specific member id The participant's BIC and the National ID can be found through the link in Bank Directory Plus.

term_name: SWIFT Service Directory Participant Name
display_name: SWIFT Service Directory Participant Name
description: The name of the participant institution as listed/used in the service, as found in the SWIFT Service Directory file.

term_name: SWIFT Service Directory Participant Type Code
display_name: SWIFT Service Directory Participant Type Code
description: A code indicating the role or the type of the participant in the service, as found in the SWIFT Service Directory file.
notes: Not to be confused with direct/indirect

term_name: SWIFT Service Directory Record Id
display_name: SWIFT Service Directory Record Id
description: Unique meaningless identification of a record in the SWIFT Service Directory file.
notes: All Record Id's start with 'SD'. This field is called 'Record Key' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT Service Directory Scheme Name
display_name: SWIFT Service Directory Scheme Name
description: The name of the scheme if the service authority operates more than one within its service, as found in the SWIFT Service Directory file.

term_name: SWIFT Service Directory Service Code
display_name: SWIFT Service Directory Service Code
description: A 3 Character code which indicates a SWIFT Service in the SWIFT Service Directory file.
notes: Also called value added service code (VAS code).

term_name: SWIFT Service Directory Service Id
display_name: SWIFT Service Directory Service Id
description: Unique identification/acronym of the service, as found in the SWIFT Service Direcory file.

term_name: SWIFT Service Directory Service Specific Attribute 1 Name
display_name: SWIFT Service Directory Service Specific Attribute 1 Name
description: Name or description of the first service-specific attribute, as found in the SWIFT Service Directory file.

term_name: SWIFT Service Directory Service Specific Attribute 1 Value
display_name: SWIFT Service Directory Service Specific Attribute 1 Value
description: The value of the first service-specific attribute, as found in the SWIFT Service Directory file.

term_name: SWIFT Service Directory Service Specific Attribute 2 Name
display_name: SWIFT Service Directory Service Specific Attribute 2 Name
description: Name or description of the second service-specific attribute, as found in the SWIFT Service Directory file.

term_name: SWIFT Service Directory Service Specific Attribute 2 Value
display_name: SWIFT Service Directory Service Specific Attribute 2 Value
description: The value of the second service-specific attribute, as found in the SWIFT Service Directory file.

term_name: SWIFT Service Directory Service Specific Attribute 3 Name
display_name: SWIFT Service Directory Service Specific Attribute 3 Name
description: Name or description of the third service-specific attribute, as found in the SWIFT Service Directory file.

term_name: SWIFT Service Directory Service Specific Attribute 3 Value
display_name: SWIFT Service Directory Service Specific Attribute 3 Value
description: The value of the third service-specific attribute, as found in the SWIFT Service Directory file.

term_name: SWIFT Service Directory Source Date
display_name: SWIFT Service Directory Source Date
description: The issue date of the source data used to populate the record, as found in the SWIFT Service Directory file.

term_name: SWIFT Service Directory Start Date
display_name: SWIFT Service Directory Start Date
description: Date from which the data can be used, as found in the SWIFT Service Directory file.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Asset Category Code
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Asset Category Code
description: The asset category also known as product area to which the SSI applies, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Correspondent BIC
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Correspondent BIC
description: The BIC of the correspondent used when there is a direct correspondent account between the owner BIC and the correspondent BIC, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V2 file.
notes: If an 8-character BIC is used, then it is padded with 'XXX'.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Correspondent Owner Account Number
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Correspondent Owner Account Number
description: The account number of the owner with correspondent, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Correspondent Preference Code
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Correspondent Preference Code
description: Code indicating whether a correspondent is preferred, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 End Date
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 End Date
description: The date when the SSI expires, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Group Id
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Group Id
description: An identification key indicating to which group the SSI belongs, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V2 file.
notes: This key is used to cross-reference to Bank Directory Plus.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Intermediary 1 Account Number
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Intermediary 1 Account Number
description: Account number of the first intermediary with the BIC of the correspondent, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Intermediary 1 BIC
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Intermediary 1 BIC
description: BIC of the first intermediary, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V2 file.
notes: To use when there is No direct account between owner and correspondent BIC. If an 8-character BIC is issued, then itis padded with 'XXX'.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Intermediary 2 Account Number
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Intermediary 2 Account Number
description: Account number of the second intermediary with the BIC of the correspondent, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Intermediary 2 BIC
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Intermediary 2 BIC
description: BIC of the second intermediary, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V2 file.
notes: Rarely used, but the database canaccommodate the scenario where there is a Second Intermediary BIC that holds the account with the INTERMEDIARY 1 BIC. If an 8-character BIC is issued, then itis padded with 'XXX'.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 ISO Owner Country Name
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 ISO Owner Country Name
description: The ISO 3166-1 name of the country of the owner of the SSI nostro account, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Modification Code
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Modification Code
description: Code indicating the update status of a specific record in the SWIFT SSI Plus V2 file compared to the previous (monthly or daily) publication.
notes: This field is called 'Modification Flag' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Owner BIC
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Owner BIC
description: The BIC of the owner of the SSI Nostro account, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V2 file.
notes: If an 8-character BIC is used, then it is padded with 'XXX'.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Owner City Name
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Owner City Name
description: The city name of the institute /branch of the owner of the SSI nostro account, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Owner CPS Name
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Owner CPS Name
description: The name of the county, province, state or other administrative region where the institution/branch is located, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Owner Institution Name
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Owner Institution Name
description: The trading name of the institution of the owner of the SSI nostro account, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V2 file.
notes: SSI = Standing Settlement Instructions

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Owner ISO Country Code
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Owner ISO Country Code
description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for the country of the owner of the SSI nostro account, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Owner ISO Currency Code
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Owner ISO Currency Code
description: The ISO 4217 alpha-3 code for the currency of the SSI nostro account of the owner, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Owner Record Id
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Owner Record Id
description: Unique meaningless identification of a record of the owner of the nostro account in the SWIFT SSI Plus V2 file.
notes: This key is used to cross-reference to Bank Directory Plus.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Record Id
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Record Id
description: Unique meaningless identification of a record in the SWIFT SSI Plus V2 file.
notes: All Record Id's start with 'SI'. This field is called 'Record Key' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Start Date
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V2 Start Date
description: The date when the SSI becomes effective, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V2 file.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Account Holding Institution Account Number
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Account Holding Institution Account Number
description: The account number of the owner BIC with the account holding institution, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V3 file.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Account Holding Institution Bank Directory Plus Record Id
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Account Holding Institution Bank Directory Plus Record Id
description: A record id of the account holding institution of the owner of the SSI nostro account from the Bank Directory Plus, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V3 file.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Account Holding Institution BIC
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Account Holding Institution BIC
description: The BIC of the Institution where the owner BIC holds the account, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V3 file.
notes: If an 8-character BIC is used, then it is padded with 'XXX'.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Account Holding Institution Entity Id
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Account Holding Institution Entity Id
description: A unique entity identifier of the account holding institution of the SSI owner taken from the Entity Plus file in the SWIFT SSI Plus V3 file.
notes: This field is called 'EID' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Account Holding Institution ISO Country Code
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Account Holding Institution ISO Country Code
description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for the country of the Institution where the owner BIC holds the account, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V3 file.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Account Holding Institution Name
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Account Holding Institution Name
description: The name of the Institution where the owner BIC holds the account, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V3 file.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Account Holding Institution Preference Code
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Account Holding Institution Preference Code
description: Code indicating whether the account holding institution is a preferred correspondent, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V3 file.
notes: P if preferred Not mandatory

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Account Holding Institution Type Code
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Account Holding Institution Type Code
description: Code indicating if the account holding institution is a local or a final correspondent, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V3 file.
notes: Local Correspondent: If the account holder is not located in the country of the currency. In this case, the next field is provided with the link to the next SSI record key. Correspondent: If the account holder is located in the country of the currency.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Asset Category Code
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Asset Category Code
description: The asset category also known as product area to which the SSI applies, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V3 file.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 End Date
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 End Date
description: The date when the SSI expires, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V3 file.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Last Traffic Date
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Last Traffic Date
description: The date when the SSI was last seen within traffic, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V3 file.
notes: Not active yet. Details will be specified as soon as a decision is made.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Last Update Date
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Last Update Date
description: The date when the SSI was last updated by the customer or the SWIFTRef data collection team, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V3 file.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Modification Code
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Modification Code
description: Code indicating the update status of a specific record in the SWIFT SSI Plus V3 file compared to the previous (monthly or daily) publication.
notes: This field is called 'Modification Flag' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Owner Bank Directory Plus Record Id
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Owner Bank Directory Plus Record Id
description: A record id of the owner of the SSI nostro account from the Bank Directory Plus, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V3 file.
notes: This can be a BIC or a non-BIC customer. This key is used to cross-reference to Bank Directory Plus.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Owner BIC
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Owner BIC
description: The BIC of the owner of the SSI Nostro account, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V3 file.
notes: If an 8-character BIC is used, then it is padded with 'XXX'.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Owner City Name
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Owner City Name
description: The city name of the institute /branch of the owner of the SSI nostro account, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V3 file.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Owner Entity Id
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Owner Entity Id
description: A unique entity identifier of the SSI owner taken from the Entity Plus file in the SWIFT SSI Plus V3 file.
notes: This field is called 'EID' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Owner Group Id
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Owner Group Id
description: An identification key indicating to which group the owner's SSI belongs, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V3 file.
notes: This key is used to cross-reference to Bank Directory Plus.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Owner Institution Name
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Owner Institution Name
description: The trading name of the institution of the owner of the SSI nostro account, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V3 file.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Owner ISO Country Code
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Owner ISO Country Code
description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for the country of the owner of the SSI nostro account, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V3 file.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Owner ISO Currency Code
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Owner ISO Currency Code
description: The ISO 4217 alpha-3 code for the currency of the SSI nostro account of the owner, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V3 file.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Record Id
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Record Id
description: Unique meaningless identification of a record in the SWIFT SSI Plus V3 file.
notes: All Record Id's start with 'SI'. This field is called 'Record Key' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Start Date
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Start Date
description: The date when the SSI becomes effective, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V3 file.

term_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Traffic Flag
display_name: SWIFT SSI Plus V3 Traffic Flag
description: Flag indicating if the SSI has been seen within traffic over the previous 12 months, as found in the SWIFT SSI Plus V3 file.

term_name: SWIFT Timezone Difference Number Of Hours And Minutes
display_name: SWIFT Timezone Difference Number Of Hours And Minutes
description: The difference in hours and minutes from the timezone with Greenwich Mean Time (GMT) as found in the SWIFT Timezone file.
notes: Format (HHMM)

term_name: SWIFT Timezone End Date
display_name: SWIFT Timezone End Date
description: Date at which a certain timezone ends, as found in the SWIFT Timezone file.
notes: Takes daylight saving time (if applicable) into account.

term_name: SWIFT Timezone Id
display_name: SWIFT Timezone Id
description: Unique meaningless identification of a timezone in the SWIFT Timezone file.

term_name: SWIFT Timezone ISO Country Code
display_name: SWIFT Timezone ISO Country Code
description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for the country for which the timezone in the SWIFT Timezone file applies.

term_name: SWIFT Timezone ISO Country Name
display_name: SWIFT Timezone ISO Country Name
description: The ISO 3166-1 name of the country for which the timezone in the SWIFT Timezone file applies.

term_name: SWIFT Timezone Modification Code
display_name: SWIFT Timezone Modification Code
description: Code indicating the update status of a specific record in the SWIFT Timezone file compared to the previous (monthly or daily) publication.
notes: This field is called 'Modification Flag' by SWIFT.

term_name: SWIFT Timezone Region Code
display_name: SWIFT Timezone Region Code
description: Code indicating the first character of the party suffix of the BIC, as found in the SWIFT Timezone file.
notes: A '*' is filled for the entire country

term_name: SWIFT Timezone Start Date
display_name: SWIFT Timezone Start Date
description: Date at which a certain timezone starts, as found in the SWIFT Timezone file.
notes: Takes daylight saving time (if applicable) into account.

term_name: SWIFT Timezone Tag Code
display_name: SWIFT Timezone Tag Code
description: Code used to tag the specific SWIFT Timezone file in SWIFT Reference data.
notes: For the Timezone file this Tag is always 'TZ'.

term_name: SWIFT Transaction Code
display_name: SWIFT Transaction Code
description: The code assigned to a transaction and reported in various SWIFT messages such as MT940, 942, 950 etc.
notes: This is a combination of two elements: 'Transaction Type' and 'Identification Code'. 'Transaction Type' values: S  - SWIFT transfer, N - Non-SWIFT transfer, F - First advice. If 'N' or 'F' 'Transaction Type'is follwed by an 'Identification Code'. Values (MT): BNK, BOE, BRF, CAR etc.

term_name: Target2 Account Holder BIC
display_name: Target2 Account Holder BIC
description: The unique alpha-11 bank identifier code (BIC) of the account holder (the settlement bank), as found in the Target2 file.
notes: BIC (party prefix, country, and party suffix) where: party prefix (4 char) country code (2 char) party suffix (2 char)

term_name: Target2 Addressee BIC
display_name: Target2 Addressee BIC
description: The unique alpha-11 bank identifier code (BIC) of the addressee to be used in the header of the BIC CUG message, as found in the Target2 file.
notes: BIC (party prefix, country, and party suffix) where: party prefix (4 char) country code (2 char) party suffix (2 char)

term_name: Target2 Change Type Code
display_name: Target2 Change Type Code
description: Code indicating the type of change for a record as found in the Target2 file.
notes: It should be noted that if a participant changes the BIC in the version

term_name: Target2 Participant BIC
display_name: Target2 Participant BIC
description: The unique alpha-11 bank identifier code (BIC) of the participant, as found in the Target2 file.
notes: BIC (party prefix, country, and party suffix) where: party prefix (4 char) country code (2 char) party suffix (2 char)

term_name: Target2 Participant City Name
display_name: Target2 Participant City Name
description: The name of the city where the participant is established as found in the Target2 file.

term_name: Target2 Participant Institution Name
display_name: Target2 Participant Institution Name
description: The company name of the participant as found in the Target2 file.
notes: The allowed set of characters is the full SWIFT

term_name: Target2 Participant Main BIC Flag
display_name: Target2 Participant Main BIC Flag
description: Flag indicating whether or not a participant BIC could be used to address the payments if the sender has no other information where to send to, as found in the Target2 file.
notes: The Main BIC Flag field is intended to help a participant to send a payment to another one when the latter is not precisely known as regards the branch to be quoted

term_name: Target2 Participant National Sorting Code
display_name: Target2 Participant National Sorting Code
description: The national sorting code of the participant as found in the Target2 file.
notes: The national sorting codes are published only for information purpose. The field will be present only if available in the BankDirectoryPlus Database provided by SWIFT each month.

term_name: Target2 Participation Type Code
display_name: Target2 Participation Type Code
description: Code indicating the type of participation, as found in the Target2 file.

term_name: Target2 Reserve Attribute Value
display_name: Target2 Reserve Attribute Value
description: Value of a reserve/spare attribute with the purpose of future use, as found in the Target2 file.
notes: Is empty and will only be filled when a new attribute is formally added to the Target2 file.

term_name: Target2 Valid From Date
display_name: Target2 Valid From Date
description: Date from which the record entry is valid, as found in the Target2 file.

term_name: Target2 Valid Until Date
display_name: Target2 Valid Until Date
description: Date up to which the record entry is valid, as found in the Target2 file.
notes: If not specified, the date is equal to

term_name: To Be Settled Credit Interest Smallest Unit Amount
display_name: To Be Settled Credit Interest Smallest Unit Amount
description: The accrued but not yet settled credit interest amount up to and including DGS date, expressed in the smallest unit of the currency of the agreement

term_name: To Be Settled Debit Interest Smallest Unit Amount
display_name: To Be Settled Debit Interest Smallest Unit Amount
description: The accrued but not yet settled debit interest amount up to and including DGS date, expressed in the smallest unit of the currency of the agreement

term_name: Transaction Cost Structure Currency Code
display_name: Transaction Cost Structure Currency Code
description: The code which identifies the currency of the cost structure for transaction costs.
notes: The ISO Standard 4217 (3 characters) code that identifies the currency.

term_name: Transaction Cost Structure Description
display_name: Transaction Cost Structure Description
description: Description of the cost structure for transaction costs.

term_name: Transaction Cost Structure Id
display_name: Transaction Cost Structure Id
description: The unique identification of the cost structure for transaction costs.

term_name: Transaction Currency Amount
display_name: Transaction Currency Amount
description: The amount in the specific currency to be settled with the beneficiary party. In other words the amount that has to be payed by the customer to the beneficiary.

term_name: Transaction Type Code
display_name: Transaction Type Code
description: The code to indicate the type of a financial transaction. This code is used for customer reporting.
notes: Examples are 'ac ' --> Acceptgiro 'ba ' --> Betaalautomaat (ATM) 'id ' --> iDeal and so on

term_name: Transaction Type Description
display_name: Transaction Type Description
description: Description - per language - of the type of a financial transaction.

term_name: Transaction Type Language Code
display_name: Transaction Type Language Code
description: The ISO 639-1 2 character code that specifies the language of the description of the financial transaction type.
notes: EN -- Engels,NL -- Nederlands

term_name: Year
display_name: Year
description: Year of the month the data belong to
notes: Format: YYYY
